Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.NaturalNumbers.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.StandardFiniteSets.
Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.FiniteSets.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalCategoriesTensored.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalFunctorsTensored.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


(* This file defines: the augmented simplex category Δ or Δ_sd, in several different ways
    * as a precategory, [precat_Delta]
    * as a category, [category_Delta] := ([precat_Delta],, [Delta_has_homsets])
    * as a monoidal category, [AugmentedSimplexCategory] with tensor product [tensor_functor_ord] given by ordinal addition and unit [tensor_unit] the zero ordinal
    * as a strict monoidal category, [FinOrdStrict]

 Similarly, it defines the category of finite cardinals, [FinCard] or Δ_sdg,
    * as a precategory, [precat_fincard]
    * as a category, [category_fincard] := ([precat_fincard],, [fincard_has_homsets])
    * as a monoidal category, [FinCard] with tensor product [tensor_product_card] given by ordinal addition and unit [tensor_unit] the zero ordinal
    * as a strict monoidal category [FinCardStrict]

and the obvious forgetful functor between them,
    * as a functor [fget_monoton_functor]
    * as a lax monoidal functor [U_Mon_Lax]
    * as a strong monoidal functor [U_Mon_Strong]

  In addition the file contains some helper lemmas -

  - [iscontr_inequal],  (n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m) is contractible for n, m : nat
  - [iscontr_inequal'], (n < m) ⨿ (n ≥ m) is contractible for n, m : nat
  - [natlthorgeh_left_branch] and [natlthorgeh_right_branch] which allow you to pursue the left branch or the right branch of the preceding proposition if you know which is true
  - [fincard_hom_extensionality], maps between finite cardinals agree iff they agree pointwise
  - [morphism_extensionality] same but for maps between finite ordinals
  - [U_Faithful], which says that the forgetful functor U is faithful
  - [mon_iso_mon_inv] - if f : n --> m  in Δ_sd and U(f) is an isomorphism, then U(f)^{-1} is monotonic
  - [U_reflects_isos] - if f : n--> m in Δ_sd and U(f) is an isomorphism, then so is f
  - computational lemmas and rules about the behavior of ordinal addition on morphisms, see for example [pr_n_m_l] and [proj_incl_r]
*)


Definition fincard_has_homsets (n m : nat) : isaset ((⟦ n ⟧)%stn -> (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) :=
  (Propositions.funspace_isaset (isasetstn m)).


n, m: nat
iscontr ((n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m))


n, m: nat
iscontr ((n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m))

  
n, m: nat
∑ cntr : (n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m),
∏ t : (n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m), t = cntr

  
n, m: nat
∏ t : (n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m), t = natgthorleh n m
 
n, m: nat
t: (n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m)
t = natgthorleh n m

  
n, m: nat
a: n > m
inl a = natgthorleh n m
n, m: nat
b: n ≤ m
inr b = natgthorleh n m

  
n, m: nat
a: n > m
inl a = natgthorleh n m
 
n, m: nat
a: n > m
inl a =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (n > m) ⨿ ¬ (n > m), (n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m))
  (λ a : n > m, inl a)
  (λ a : ¬ (n > m), inr (negnatgthtoleh a))
  (isdecrelnatgth n m)

    
n, m: nat
a, a0: n > m
inl a =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (n > m) ⨿ ¬ (n > m), (n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m))
  (λ a : n > m, inl a)
  (λ a : ¬ (n > m), inr (negnatgthtoleh a)) (inl a0)
n, m: nat
a: n > m
b: ¬ (n > m)
inl a =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (n > m) ⨿ ¬ (n > m), (n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m))
  (λ a : n > m, inl a)
  (λ a : ¬ (n > m), inr (negnatgthtoleh a)) (inr b)

inl a =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (n > m) ⨿ ¬ (n > m), (n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m))
  (λ a : n > m, inl a)
  (λ a : ¬ (n > m), inr (negnatgthtoleh a)) (inl a0)
 
n, m: nat
a, a0: n > m
inl a = inl a0
 
n, m: nat
a, a0: n > m
a = a0
 apply (pr2 (n > m)).
    
n, m: nat
a: n > m
b: ¬ (n > m)
inl a =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (n > m) ⨿ ¬ (n > m), (n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m))
  (λ a : n > m, inl a)
  (λ a : ¬ (n > m), inr (negnatgthtoleh a)) (inr b)
 contradiction.

b: n ≤ m
inr b = natgthorleh n m

  (λ _ : (n > m) ⨿ ¬ (n > m), (n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m))
  (λ a : n > m, inl a)

b0: ¬ (n > m)
b = negnatgthtoleh b0
 apply (pr2 (n ≤ m)).
Defined.

iscontr ((n < m) ⨿ (n ≥ m))

iscontr ((n < m) ⨿ (n ≥ m))

n, m: nat
iscontr ((m > n) ⨿ (m ≤ n))

  exact (iscontr_inequal m n).

n, m: nat

(∏ x : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pr1 (f x) = pr1 (g x)) → f = g

  
n, m: nat
f, g: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
X: ∏ x : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pr1 (f x) = pr1 (g x)
f = g
 
n, m: nat
f, g: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
X: ∏ x : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pr1 (f x) = pr1 (g x)
f ~ g

  
n, m: nat
f, g: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
X: ∏ x : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pr1 (f x) = pr1 (g x)
x: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
f x = g x
 
n, m: nat
f, g: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
X: ∏ x : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, pr1 (f x) = pr1 (g x)
x: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
pr1 (f x) = pr1 (g x)

  exact (X x).
Qed.

Definition ordconstr {n : nat} (k : nat) (bd : k < n) : stn n := k,,bd.


precategory_data

(* This definition does differ from the one in CategoryTheory.SimplicialSets. The objects of that category are
 \[0\] = {0}
 \[1\] = {0,1}
 \[2\] = {0, 1, 2}
  and so on. I call this the "topologists' indexing" as calling the ordinal [2] reflects that it is 2-dimensional.
  The objects of the category in this file are
  0 = \emptyset
  1 = {0}
  2 = {0,1}
  and so on, as in the definition of the von Neumann ordinals. The category in CategoryTheory.SimplicialSets does not have the unit object which is necessary for the proposed addition functor. The reindexing / renaming of the objects allows us to define the addition bifunctor sensibly, so that n + m has the obvious meaning; in the category in CategoryTheory.SimplicialSets we have the unfortunate fact that [n] \oplus [m] = [n+m+1]. *)

precategory_data

  
precategory_ob_mor
∏ c : ?C, (?C ⟦ c, c ⟧)%cat
∏ a b c : ?C,
(?C ⟦ a, b ⟧)%cat
→ (?C ⟦ b, c ⟧)%cat → (?C ⟦ a, c ⟧)%cat

  
precategory_ob_mor
 exact (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn).
  
∏ c : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
(make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn ⟦ c, c ⟧)%cat
 
m: make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
(make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn ⟦ m, m ⟧)%cat
 apply monfunstnid. (* defining identity and composition law *)
  
∏ a b c : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
(make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn ⟦ a, b ⟧)%cat
→ (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn ⟦ b, c ⟧)%cat
  → (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn ⟦ a, c ⟧)%cat
  
l, m, n: make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
f: (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn ⟦ l, m ⟧)%cat
g: (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn ⟦ m, n ⟧)%cat
(make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn ⟦ l, n ⟧)%cat
 exact (monfunstncomp f g).
Defined.


is_precategory precat_Delta_precategory_data


is_precategory precat_Delta_precategory_data

  
is_precategory
  (make_precategory_data
     (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
     (λ m : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
      monfunstnid m)
     (λ (l m
         n : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
      (f : (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn ⟦ l,
            m ⟧)%cat)
      (g : (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn ⟦ m,
            n ⟧)%cat), monfunstncomp f g))

  
((∏

   (a b c

(∏
 (a
  b : make_precategory_data

         (g : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
              ⟦ m, n ⟧), monfunstncomp f0 g) ⟦ b, c ⟧)%cat)
(h : (make_precategory_data
        (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
        (λ m : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
         monfunstnid m)
        (λ (l m
            n : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
         (f0 : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
               ⟦ l, m ⟧)
         (g0 : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
               ⟦ m, n ⟧), monfunstncomp f0 g0) ⟦ c, d
      ⟧)%cat), (f · (g · h))%cat = (f · g · h)%cat
∏
(a b c
 d : make_precategory_data
       (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
       (λ m : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
        monfunstnid m)
       (λ (l m
           n : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
        (f : (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
              ⟦ l, m ⟧)%cat)
        (g : (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
              ⟦ m, n ⟧)%cat), monfunstncomp f g))
(f : (make_precategory_data
        (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
        (λ m : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
         monfunstnid m)
        (λ (l m

         (f : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
              ⟦ l, m ⟧)

              ⟦ m, n ⟧), monfunstncomp f g) ⟦ a, b ⟧)%cat)
(g : (make_precategory_data
        (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
        (λ m : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
         monfunstnid m)
        (λ (l m
            n : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
         (f0 : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
               ⟦ l, m ⟧)
         (g : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
              ⟦ m, n ⟧), monfunstncomp f0 g) ⟦ b, c ⟧)%cat)
(h : (make_precategory_data
        (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
        (λ m : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
         monfunstnid m)
        (λ (l m

         (f0 : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
               ⟦ l, m ⟧)
         (g0 : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
               ⟦ m, n ⟧), monfunstncomp f0 g0) ⟦ c, d
      ⟧)%cat), (f · g · h)%cat = (f · (g · h))%cat

    
∏
(a b c
 d : make_precategory_data
       (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
       (λ m : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
        monfunstnid m)
       (λ (l m
           n : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
        (f : (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
              ⟦ l, m ⟧)%cat)
        (g : (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
              ⟦ m, n ⟧)%cat), monfunstncomp f g))
(f : (make_precategory_data
        (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
        (λ m : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
         monfunstnid m)
        (λ (l m

              ⟦ l, m ⟧)

              ⟦ m, n ⟧), monfunstncomp f g) ⟦ a, b ⟧)%cat)
(g : (make_precategory_data
        (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
        (λ m : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
         monfunstnid m)
        (λ (l m
            n : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
         (f0 : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
               ⟦ l, m ⟧)
         (g : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
              ⟦ m, n ⟧), monfunstncomp f0 g) ⟦ b, c ⟧)%cat)
(h : (make_precategory_data
        (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
        (λ m : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
         monfunstnid m)
        (λ (l m
            n : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
         (f0 : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
               ⟦ l, m ⟧)
         (g0 : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
               ⟦ m, n ⟧), monfunstncomp f0 g0) ⟦ c, d
      ⟧)%cat), (f · (g · h))%cat = (f · g · h)%cat
 reflexivity.
    
∏
(a b c
 d : make_precategory_data
       (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
       (λ m : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
        monfunstnid m)
       (λ (l m
           n : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
        (f : (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
              ⟦ l, m ⟧)%cat)
        (g : (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
              ⟦ m, n ⟧)%cat), monfunstncomp f g))
(f : (make_precategory_data
        (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
        (λ m : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
         monfunstnid m)
        (λ (l m
            n : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
         (f : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
              ⟦ l, m ⟧)
         (g : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
              ⟦ m, n ⟧), monfunstncomp f g) ⟦ a, b ⟧)%cat)
(g : (make_precategory_data
        (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
        (λ m : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
         monfunstnid m)
        (λ (l m
            n : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
         (f0 : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
               ⟦ l, m ⟧)
         (g : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
              ⟦ m, n ⟧), monfunstncomp f0 g) ⟦ b, c ⟧)%cat)
(h : (make_precategory_data
        (make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
        (λ m : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn,
         monfunstnid m)
        (λ (l m
            n : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn)
         (f0 : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
               ⟦ l, m ⟧)
         (g0 : make_precategory_ob_mor nat monfunstn
               ⟦ m, n ⟧), monfunstncomp f0 g0) ⟦ c, d
      ⟧)%cat), (f · g · h)%cat = (f · (g · h))%cat
 reflexivity.
  }
Qed.

Definition precat_Delta : precategory :=
  (precat_Delta_precategory_data,, precat_Delta_is_precategory).

precategory_ob_mor
 
UU
?ob → ?ob → UU

    
UU
 exact nat.
    
nat → nat → UU
 exact (λ n, λ m, (⟦n⟧%stn → ⟦m⟧%stn)). (* Morphisms *)
  
∏
c : make_precategory_ob_mor nat
      (λ n m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn),
(make_precategory_ob_mor nat
   (λ n m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) ⟦ c, c ⟧)%cat
 
c: make_precategory_ob_mor nat
  (λ n m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(make_precategory_ob_mor nat
   (λ n m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) ⟦ c, c ⟧)%cat
 exact (idfun (⟦c⟧)%stn).        (* Identity *)
  
∏
a b
 c : make_precategory_ob_mor nat
       (λ n m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn),
(make_precategory_ob_mor nat
   (λ n m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) ⟦ a, b ⟧)%cat
→ (make_precategory_ob_mor nat
     (λ n m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) ⟦ b, c ⟧)%cat
  → (make_precategory_ob_mor nat
       (λ n m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) ⟦ a, c
     ⟧)%cat
 
n, m, k: make_precategory_ob_mor nat
  (λ n m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
f: (make_precategory_ob_mor nat
   (λ n m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) ⟦ n, m
 ⟧)%cat
g: (make_precategory_ob_mor nat
   (λ n m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) ⟦ m, k
 ⟧)%cat
(make_precategory_ob_mor nat
   (λ n m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) ⟦ n, k ⟧)%cat
 exact (g∘f).  (* Composition law *)
Defined.

Definition precat_fincard : precategory := (precat_fincard_data,, precat_fincard_is_precategory).


has_homsets precat_Delta


has_homsets precat_Delta

  
∏ a b : precat_Delta,
isaset (precat_Delta ⟦ a, b ⟧)%cat
 
∏ a b : nat, isaset (monfunstn a b)
 
a, b: nat
isaset (monfunstn a b)

  
a, b: nat
isaset ((⟦ a ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b ⟧)%stn)
a, b: nat
∏ x : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b ⟧)%stn,
isaset (∏ x0 y : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, x0 ≤ y → x x0 ≤ x y)

  
a, b: nat
isaset ((⟦ a ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b ⟧)%stn)
 exact (fincard_has_homsets a b).
  
a, b: nat
∏ x : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b ⟧)%stn,
isaset (∏ x0 y : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, x0 ≤ y → x x0 ≤ x y)
 
a, b: nat
f: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
isaset (∏ x y : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, x ≤ y → f x ≤ f y)
 
a, b: nat
f: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
∏ t : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn,
isaset (∏ y : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, t ≤ y → f t ≤ f y)
 
a, b: nat
f: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn
isaset (∏ y : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, x ≤ y → f x ≤ f y)

f: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b ⟧)%stn

∏ t : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, isaset (x ≤ t → f x ≤ f t)

a, b: nat
f: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
x, y: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn
x ≤ y → isaset (f x ≤ f y)

    
a, b: nat
f: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
x, y: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn
t: x ≤ y
isaset (f x ≤ f y)
 exact (isasetaprop (propproperty (f x ≤ f y))).
Qed.

Definition category_Delta : category := (precat_Delta,, Delta_has_homsets).
Definition category_fincard : category := (precat_fincard,, fincard_has_homsets).

(* The notational convention here is that a subscript d means "has face maps"
   subscript s means "has degeneracies" and subscript g means "has permutations." *)

Notation Δ_sdg := category_fincard.
Notation Δ := category_Delta.
Notation Δ_sd := category_Delta.

Definition Δ_ob_constr ( n : nat) : Δ := n.
Definition Δ_sdg_ob_constr ( n : nat) : Δ_sdg := n.

Open Scope cat.

Definition Δ_mor_constr { n m : nat } ( f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn -> (⟦ m ⟧)%stn )
           ( pk : ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, x ≤ y -> f x ≤ f y) : (Δ_ob_constr n) --> (Δ_ob_constr m)
:= (make_monfunstn f pk).

Definition Δ_sdg_mor_constr { n m : nat } ( f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn -> (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ) :
  Δ_sdg_ob_constr n -->   Δ_sdg_ob_constr m := f.


functor_data Δ_sd Δ_sdg


functor_data Δ_sd Δ_sdg

    
Δ_sd → Δ_sdg
(λ F : Δ_sd → Δ_sdg,
 ∏ a b : Δ_sd, Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧ → Δ_sdg ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  ?pr1
 
Δ_sd → Δ_sdg
 exact (idfun nat). 
(λ F : Δ_sd → Δ_sdg,
 ∏ a b : Δ_sd, Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧ → Δ_sdg ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  (idfun nat)

    
a, b: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
Δ_sdg ⟦ idfun nat a, idfun nat b ⟧
 exact (pr1 f).
Defined.


is_functor fget_monoton_functor_data


is_functor fget_monoton_functor_data

  
functor_idax fget_monoton_functor_data
(λ _ : functor_idax fget_monoton_functor_data,
 functor_compax fget_monoton_functor_data) ?pr1

  
functor_idax fget_monoton_functor_data
 
∏ a : Δ_sd,
# fget_monoton_functor_data (id a) =
id fget_monoton_functor_data a
 reflexivity.
  
(λ _ : functor_idax fget_monoton_functor_data,
 functor_compax fget_monoton_functor_data)
  ((λ a : Δ_sd,
    idpath (id fget_monoton_functor_data a))
   :
   functor_idax fget_monoton_functor_data)
 
∏ (a b c : Δ_sd) (f : Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : Δ_sd ⟦ b, c ⟧),
# fget_monoton_functor_data (f · g) =
# fget_monoton_functor_data f
· # fget_monoton_functor_data g
 reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition fget_monoton_functor : functor category_Delta category_fincard :=
  (fget_monoton_functor_data,, fget_monoton_is_functor).

Local Notation U := fget_monoton_functor.


a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
# U f = # U g → f = g


a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
# U f = # U g → f = g

  
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
isPredicate
  (λ f : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b ⟧)%stn,
   ∏ x y : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, x ≤ y → f x ≤ f y)
 
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ x : Δ_sdg ⟦ U a, U b ⟧,
isaprop (∏ x0 y : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, x0 ≤ y → x x0 ≤ x y)

  
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: Δ_sdg ⟦ U a, U b ⟧
isaprop (∏ x0 y : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, x0 ≤ y → x x0 ≤ x y)
 
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: Δ_sdg ⟦ U a, U b ⟧
∏ t : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn,
isaprop (∏ y : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, t ≤ y → x t ≤ x y)

  
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: Δ_sdg ⟦ U a, U b ⟧
t: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn
isaprop (∏ y : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, t ≤ y → x t ≤ x y)
 
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: Δ_sdg ⟦ U a, U b ⟧
t: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn
∏ t0 : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, isaprop (t ≤ t0 → x t ≤ x t0)

  
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: Δ_sdg ⟦ U a, U b ⟧
t, t0: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn
isaprop (t ≤ t0 → x t ≤ x t0)
 
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: Δ_sdg ⟦ U a, U b ⟧
t, t0: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn
t ≤ t0 → isaprop (x t ≤ x t0)

  
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: Δ_sdg ⟦ U a, U b ⟧
t, t0: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn
t1: t ≤ t0
isaprop (x t ≤ x t0)
 apply propproperty.
Qed.


a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
(∏ x : (⟦ U a ⟧)%stn, # U f x = # U g x) → f = g


a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
(∏ x : (⟦ U a ⟧)%stn, # U f x = # U g x) → f = g

  
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
ext_hypothesis: ∏ x : (⟦ U a ⟧)%stn,
# U f x = # U g x
f = g

  
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
ext_hypothesis: ∏ x : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, pr1 f x = pr1 g x
f = g
 
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
ext_hypothesis: ∏ x : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, pr1 f x = pr1 g x
# U f = # U g
 
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
ext_hypothesis: ∏ x : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, pr1 f x = pr1 g x
pr1 f = pr1 g

  
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
ext_hypothesis: ∏ x : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, pr1 f x = pr1 g x
∏ x : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, pr1 (pr1 f x) = pr1 (pr1 g x)
 
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
ext_hypothesis: ∏ x : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, pr1 f x = pr1 g x
x: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn
pr1 (pr1 f x) = pr1 (pr1 g x)
 
a, b: Δ_sd
f, g: Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
ext_hypothesis: ∏ x : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, pr1 f x = pr1 g x
x: (⟦ a ⟧)%stn
pr1 f x = pr1 g x
 exact (ext_hypothesis x).
Qed.

(* If f : n -> m is monotonic and has an inverse in fin_card, its inverse is also monotonic.*)

n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
I: is_z_isomorphism (# U f)
∏ x y : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y
→ is_z_isomorphism_mor I x ≤ is_z_isomorphism_mor I y


n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
I: is_z_isomorphism (# U f)
∏ x y : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y
→ is_z_isomorphism_mor I x ≤ is_z_isomorphism_mor I y

  
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
I: is_z_isomorphism (# U f)
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
is_z_isomorphism_mor I x ≤ is_z_isomorphism_mor I y

  
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
I: ∑ g : Δ_sdg ⟦ U m, U n ⟧,
is_inverse_in_precat (# U f) g
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
is_z_isomorphism_mor I x ≤ is_z_isomorphism_mor I y
 
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
I: ∑ g : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
is_inverse_in_precat (pr1 f) g
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
is_z_isomorphism_mor I x ≤ is_z_isomorphism_mor I y

  
n, m: Δ_sd
f_fn: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fn x ≤ f_fn y
I_fn: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
I_is_inverse_in_preord: is_inverse_in_precat
  (pr1 (f_fn,, f_guarantee))
  I_fn
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
is_z_isomorphism_mor (I_fn,, I_is_inverse_in_preord) x
≤ is_z_isomorphism_mor (I_fn,, I_is_inverse_in_preord)
    y

  
n, m: Δ_sd
f_fn: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fn x ≤ f_fn y
I_fn: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
I_is_inverse_in_preord: is_inverse_in_precat
  (pr1 (f_fn,, f_guarantee))
  I_fn
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
a: x < y
is_z_isomorphism_mor (I_fn,, I_is_inverse_in_preord) x
≤ is_z_isomorphism_mor (I_fn,, I_is_inverse_in_preord)
    y
n, m: Δ_sd
f_fn: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fn x ≤ f_fn y
I_fn: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
I_is_inverse_in_preord: is_inverse_in_precat
  (pr1 (f_fn,, f_guarantee))
  I_fn
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
a': x = y
is_z_isomorphism_mor (I_fn,, I_is_inverse_in_preord) x
≤ is_z_isomorphism_mor (I_fn,, I_is_inverse_in_preord)
    y

f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,

    y

(I_fn · f_fn) z = z

f_fn: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn

n, m: Δ_sd
f_fn: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn

x ≤ y → f_fn x ≤ f_fn y

I_is_inverse_in_preord: is_inverse_in_precat
  (pr1 (f_fn,, f_guarantee))
  I_fn
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
a: x < y
a0: I_fn x > I_fn y
z: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j:= pr2 I_is_inverse_in_preord: (λ _ : pr1 (f_fn,, f_guarantee) · I_fn = id n,
 I_fn · pr1 (f_fn,, f_guarantee) = id m)
  (pr1 I_is_inverse_in_preord)
(I_fn · f_fn) z = z
 
n, m: Δ_sd
f_fn: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn

x ≤ y → f_fn x ≤ f_fn y

  (pr1 (f_fn,, f_guarantee))

a: x < y
a0: I_fn x > I_fn y
z: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j:= pr2 I_is_inverse_in_preord: I_fn · f_fn = id m
(I_fn · f_fn) z = z

        
n, m: Δ_sd
f_fn: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fn x ≤ f_fn y
I_fn: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
I_is_inverse_in_preord: is_inverse_in_precat
  (pr1 (f_fn,, f_guarantee))
  I_fn
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
a: x < y
a0: I_fn x > I_fn y
z: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j:= pr2 I_is_inverse_in_preord: I_fn · f_fn = id m
(id m) z = z
 reflexivity.
        
n, m: Δ_sd
f_fn: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fn x ≤ f_fn y
I_fn: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
I_is_inverse_in_preord: is_inverse_in_precat
  (pr1 (f_fn,, f_guarantee))
  I_fn
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
a: x < y
a0: I_fn x > I_fn y
X: ∏ z : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, f_fn (I_fn z) = z
x ≥ y

      
n, m: Δ_sd
f_fn: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn

x ≤ y → f_fn x ≤ f_fn y

  (pr1 (f_fn,, f_guarantee))
  I_fn
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
a: x < y
a0: I_fn x > I_fn y
X: ∏ z : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, f_fn (I_fn z) = z
I_fn y ≤ I_fn x
 exact (natlthtoleh _ _ a0).

f_fn: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn

  (pr1 (f_fn,, f_guarantee))

is_z_isomorphism_mor (I_fn,, I_is_inverse_in_preord) x

    y
 exact b.

n, m: Δ_sd
f_fn: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fn x ≤ f_fn y

  (pr1 (f_fn,, f_guarantee))
  I_fn

I_fn x ≤ I_fn x

Qed.


n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
I: is_z_isomorphism (# U f)
is_inverse_in_precat f
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor I,, mon_iso_mon_inv I)


n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
I: is_z_isomorphism (# U f)
is_inverse_in_precat f
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor I,, mon_iso_mon_inv I)

  
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
I: ∑ g : Δ_sdg ⟦ U m, U n ⟧,
is_inverse_in_precat (# U f) g
is_inverse_in_precat f
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor I,, mon_iso_mon_inv I)
 
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
I: ∑ g : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
is_inverse_in_precat (pr1 f) g
is_inverse_in_precat f
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor I,, mon_iso_mon_inv I)

  
n, m: Δ_sd
ffun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
fguarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → ffun x ≤ ffun y
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
is_inverse: is_inverse_in_precat
  (pr1 (ffun,, fguarantee)) g
is_inverse_in_precat (ffun,, fguarantee)
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (g,, is_inverse),,
   mon_iso_mon_inv (g,, is_inverse))

  
n, m: Δ_sd
ffun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
fguarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → ffun x ≤ ffun y
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
is_inverse: is_inverse_in_precat ffun g
is_inverse_in_precat (ffun,, fguarantee)
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (g,, is_inverse),,
   mon_iso_mon_inv (g,, is_inverse))
 
n, m: Δ_sd
ffun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
fguarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → ffun x ≤ ffun y
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
l: ffun · g = id n
r: g · ffun = id m
is_inverse_in_precat (ffun,, fguarantee)
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (g,, l,, r),,
   mon_iso_mon_inv (g,, l,, r))

  
n, m: Δ_sd
ffun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
fguarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → ffun x ≤ ffun y
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
l: ffun · g = id n
r: g · ffun = id m
(ffun,, fguarantee)
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (g,, l,, r),,
   mon_iso_mon_inv (g,, l,, r)) = id n
n, m: Δ_sd
ffun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn

x ≤ y → ffun x ≤ ffun y
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
l: ffun · g = id n
r: g · ffun = id m
(is_z_isomorphism_mor (g,, l,, r),,
 mon_iso_mon_inv (g,, l,, r)) · 
(ffun,, fguarantee) = id m

  
n, m: Δ_sd

g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
l: ffun · g = id n
r: g · ffun = id m
(ffun,, fguarantee)
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (g,, l,, r),,
   mon_iso_mon_inv (g,, l,, r)) = id n
 
n, m: Δ_sd
ffun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
fguarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → ffun x ≤ ffun y
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
l: ffun · g = id n
r: g · ffun = id m
∏ x : (⟦ U n ⟧)%stn,
# U
  ((ffun,, fguarantee)
   · (is_z_isomorphism_mor (g,, l,, r),,
      mon_iso_mon_inv (g,, l,, r))) x = 
# U (id n) x

l: ffun · g = id n
r: g · ffun = id m
∏ x : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, g (ffun x) = x

x ≤ y → ffun x ≤ ffun y

l: ffun · g = id n
r: g · ffun = id m

pr1 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) m x = x

Qed.

  (is_z_isomorphism_mor I,, mon_iso_mon_inv I)

  exact (fincard_inv_is_inverse_in_precat n m f I).

(⟦ n ⟧)%stn

(⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn

n, n', m, m': nat

g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn

 exact (stnlt (f x')).

(⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn

g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn

(⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn

    
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn

n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
geq_n: x ≥ n
x':= pr_n_m_r x geq_n: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
m + g x' < m + m'
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
geq_n: x ≥ n
x':= pr_n_m_r x geq_n: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g x' < m'
 exact (stnlt (g x')).
Defined.


n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
pr_n_m_l x s = x


n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
pr_n_m_l x s = x

  reflexivity.
Qed.


n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
pr_n_m_r x s = x - n


n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
pr_n_m_r x s = x - n

  reflexivity.
Qed.


n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
stn_left n m (pr_n_m_l x s) = x


n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
stn_left n m (pr_n_m_l x s) = x

  
n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
pr1 (pr_n_m_l x s),,
natlthlehtrans (pr1 (pr_n_m_l x s)) n (n + m)
  (pr2 (pr_n_m_l x s)) (natlehnplusnm n m) = x
 
n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
x,, natlthlehtrans x n (n + m) s (natlehnplusnm n m) =
x

  
n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
pr1
  (x,,
   natlthlehtrans x n (n + m) s (natlehnplusnm n m)) =
pr1 x

  reflexivity.
Qed.


n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
stn_right n m (pr_n_m_r x s) = x


n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
stn_right n m (pr_n_m_r x s) = x

  
n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
n + pr1 (pr_n_m_r x s),,
natlthandplusl (pr1 (pr_n_m_r x s)) m n
  (pr2 (pr_n_m_r x s)) = x
 
n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
n + (x - n),,
natlthandplusl (x - n) m n (nat_split (stnlt x) s) = x

  
n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
pr1
  (n + (x - n),,
   natlthandplusl (x - n) m n (nat_split (stnlt x) s)) =
pr1 x

  
n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
n + (x - n) = pr1 x

  
n, m: nat
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
x - n + n = pr1 x
 exact (minusplusnmm x n s).
Qed.

Definition natlthorgeh_left_branch {n m : nat} (s : n < m) (j : (n < m) ⨿ (n ≥ m)) : j = inl s
  := (proofirrelevancecontr (iscontr_inequal m n) j (inl s)).
Definition natlthorgeh_right_branch {n m : nat} (s : n ≥ m) (j : (n < m) ⨿ (n ≥ m)) : j = inr s
  := (proofirrelevancecontr (iscontr_inequal m n) j (inr s)).


n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
sumfn f g x < m


n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
sumfn f g x < m

  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)) (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (natlthorgeh x n) < m

  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)) (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (inl s) < m

  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
natgtb m (f (pr_n_m_l x s)) = true

  exact (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x s))).
Qed.


n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
sumfn f g x ≥ m


n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
sumfn f g x ≥ m

  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)) (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (natlthorgeh x n) ≥ m
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)) (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (inr s) ≥ m

  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
match m with
| 0 => true
| S m0 => natgtb (g (pr_n_m_r x s) + m) m0
end = true
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
g (pr_n_m_r x s) + m ≥ m
 exact (natlehmplusnm _ m).
Qed.


n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
f (pr_n_m_l x s) =
pr_n_m_l (sumfn f g x) (sumfn_l f g x s)


n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
f (pr_n_m_l x s) =
pr_n_m_l (sumfn f g x) (sumfn_l f g x s)

  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
pr1 (f (pr_n_m_l x s)) =
pr1 (pr_n_m_l (sumfn f g x) (sumfn_l f g x s))

  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
pr1 (f (pr_n_m_l x s)) = sumfn f g x
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
pr1 (f (pr_n_m_l x s)) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)) (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (natlthorgeh x n)
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
pr1 (f (pr_n_m_l x s)) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)) (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (inl s)

  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
pr1 (f (pr_n_m_l x s)) = f (pr_n_m_l x s)
 reflexivity.
Qed.


n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
g (pr_n_m_r x s) =
pr_n_m_r (sumfn f g x) (sumfn_r f g x s)


n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
g (pr_n_m_r x s) =
pr_n_m_r (sumfn f g x) (sumfn_r f g x s)

  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
pr1 (g (pr_n_m_r x s)) =
pr1 (pr_n_m_r (sumfn f g x) (sumfn_r f g x s))

  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
pr1 (g (pr_n_m_r x s)) = sumfn f g x - m
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
pr1 (g (pr_n_m_r x s)) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)) (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (natlthorgeh x n) - m
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
pr1 (g (pr_n_m_r x s)) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)) (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (inr s) - m

  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
pr1 (g (pr_n_m_r x s)) = g (pr_n_m_r x s) + m - m
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
pr1 (g (pr_n_m_r x s)) = g (pr_n_m_r x s)
 reflexivity.
Qed.


n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
stn_left m m' (f (pr_n_m_l x s)) = sumfn f g x


n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
stn_left m m' (f (pr_n_m_l x s)) = sumfn f g x

  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x < n
stn_left m m'
  (pr_n_m_l (sumfn f g x) (sumfn_l f g x s)) =
sumfn f g x
 exact (proj_incl_l (sumfn f g x) (sumfn_l f g x s)).
Qed.


n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
stn_right m m' (g (pr_n_m_r x s)) = sumfn f g x


n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
stn_right m m' (g (pr_n_m_r x s)) = sumfn f g x

  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
s: x ≥ n
stn_right m m'
  (pr_n_m_r (sumfn f g x) (sumfn_r f g x s)) =
sumfn f g x
 exact (proj_incl_r (sumfn f g x) (sumfn_r f g x s)).
Qed.


n, m: nat
∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → stn_left n m x ≤ stn_left n m y


n, m: nat
∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → stn_left n m x ≤ stn_left n m y

  
n, m: nat
x, y: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
stn_left n m x ≤ stn_left n m y

  exact l.
Qed.


n, m: nat
∏ x y : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → stn_right n m x ≤ stn_right n m y


n, m: nat
∏ x y : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → stn_right n m x ≤ stn_right n m y

  
n, m: nat
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
stn_right n m x ≤ stn_right n m y
 
n, m: nat
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
match n + pr1 x with
| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb (n + pr1 y) m
end = true

  
n, m: nat
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
n + x ≤ n + y

  
n, m: nat
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
x + n ≤ n + y
 
n, m: nat
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
x + n ≤ y + n
 
n, m: nat
x, y: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
x ≤ y

  exact l.
Qed.

Definition monfunmonprop { n m : nat } (f : monfunstn n m) := pr2 f.

Local Arguments precategory_binproduct_mor /.


∏ a b : Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd,
Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ Δ_sd ⟦ ordinal_addition a, ordinal_addition b ⟧


∏ a b : Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd,
Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ Δ_sd ⟦ ordinal_addition a, ordinal_addition b ⟧

  
∏ a b : nat × nat,
monfunstn (pr1 a) (pr1 b) × monfunstn (pr2 a) (pr2 b)
→ monfunstn (pr1 a + pr2 a) (pr1 b + pr2 b)
 
nn', mm': nat × nat
monfunstn (pr1 nn') (pr1 mm')
× monfunstn (pr2 nn') (pr2 mm')
→ monfunstn (pr1 nn' + pr2 nn') (pr1 mm' + pr2 mm')
 
n, n', m, m': nat
monfunstn (pr1 (n,, n')) (pr1 (m,, m'))
× monfunstn (pr2 (n,, n')) (pr2 (m,, m'))
→ monfunstn (n + n') (m + m')

  
n, n', m, m': nat
fg: monfunstn (pr1 (n,, n')) (pr1 (m,, m'))
× monfunstn (pr2 (n,, n')) (pr2 (m,, m'))
monfunstn (n + n') (m + m')
 
n, n', m, m': nat
fg: monfunstn n m × monfunstn n' m'
monfunstn (n + n') (m + m')
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f: monfunstn n m
g: monfunstn n' m'
monfunstn (n + n') (m + m')

  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: monfunstn n m
g: monfunstn n' m'
(⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn
n, n', m, m': nat
f: monfunstn n m
g: monfunstn n' m'
∏ x y : (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn, x ≤ y → ?Goal x ≤ ?Goal y

  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: monfunstn n m
g: monfunstn n' m'
(⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn
 exact (sumfn f g).
  
n, n', m, m': nat
f: monfunstn n m
g: monfunstn n' m'
∏ x y : (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → sumfn f g x ≤ sumfn f g y
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f: monfunstn n m
g: monfunstn n' m'
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
x ≤ y → sumfn f g x ≤ sumfn f g y

    
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g: monfunstn n' m'
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
x ≤ y
→ sumfn (f_fun,, f_guarantee) g x
  ≤ sumfn (f_fun,, f_guarantee) g y
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
x ≤ y
→ sumfn (f_fun,, f_guarantee) (g_fun,, g_guarantee) x
  ≤ sumfn (f_fun,, f_guarantee) 
      (g_fun,, g_guarantee) y

    
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
sumfn (f_fun,, f_guarantee) (g_fun,, g_guarantee) x
≤ sumfn (f_fun,, f_guarantee) (g_fun,, g_guarantee) y
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
match stntonat (m + m') (sumfn f_fun g_fun x) with
| 0 => true
| S m0 => natgtb (sumfn f_fun g_fun y) m0
end = true
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
sumfn f_fun g_fun x ≤ sumfn f_fun g_fun y

    
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl 
           (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (natlthorgeh x n)
≤ coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (y < n) ⨿ (y ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
    (λ less_n : y < n,
     ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
       (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
          (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
          (natlehnplusnm m m')
          (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n)))))
    (λ geq_n : y ≥ n,
     ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
          (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
          (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))
          (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
          (natlthandplusl 
             (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m' m
             (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))))
          (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m)))
    (natlthorgeh y n)

    
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xl: x < n
yl: y < n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl 
           (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (inl xl)
≤ coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (y < n) ⨿ (y ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
    (λ less_n : y < n,
     ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
       (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
          (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
          (natlehnplusnm m m')
          (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n)))))
    (λ geq_n : y ≥ n,
     ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
          (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
          (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))
          (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
          (natlthandplusl 
             (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m' m
             (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))))
          (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m)))
    (inl yl)
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xl: x < n
ygth: y ≥ n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl 
           (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (inl xl)
≤ coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (y < n) ⨿ (y ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
    (λ less_n : y < n,
     ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
       (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
          (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
          (natlehnplusnm m m')
          (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n)))))
    (λ geq_n : y ≥ n,
     ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
          (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
          (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))
          (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
          (natlthandplusl 
             (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m' m
             (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))))
          (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m)))
    (inr ygth)
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xgth: x ≥ n
yl: y < n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))

   ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')

           (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))

≤ coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (y < n) ⨿ (y ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
    (λ less_n : y < n,
     ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
       (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
          (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
          (natlehnplusnm m m')
          (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n)))))
    (λ geq_n : y ≥ n,
     ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
          (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
          (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))
          (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
          (natlthandplusl 
             (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m' m
             (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))))
          (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m)))
    (inl yl)
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xgth: x ≥ n
ygth: y ≥ n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl 
           (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (inr xgth)
≤ coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (y < n) ⨿ (y ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
    (λ less_n : y < n,
     ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
       (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
          (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
          (natlehnplusnm m m')
          (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n)))))
    (λ geq_n : y ≥ n,
     ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
          (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
          (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))
          (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
          (natlthandplusl 
             (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m' m
             (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))))
          (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m)))
    (inr ygth)

    
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xl: x < n
yl: y < n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl 
           (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (inl xl)
≤ coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (y < n) ⨿ (y ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
    (λ less_n : y < n,
     ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
       (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
          (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
          (natlehnplusnm m m')
          (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n)))))
    (λ geq_n : y ≥ n,
     ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
          (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
          (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))
          (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
          (natlthandplusl 
             (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m' m
             (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))))
          (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m)))
    (inl yl)
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xl: x < n
yl: y < n
match stntonat m (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x xl)) with
| 0 => true
| S m0 => natgtb (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y yl)) m0
end = true
 exact (f_guarantee (pr_n_m_l x xl) (pr_n_m_l y yl) l).
    
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xl: x < n
ygth: y ≥ n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl 
           (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (inl xl)
≤ coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (y < n) ⨿ (y ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
    (λ less_n : y < n,
     ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
       (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
          (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
          (natlehnplusnm m m')
          (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n)))))
    (λ geq_n : y ≥ n,
     ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
          (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
          (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))
          (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
          (natlthandplusl 
             (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m' m
             (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))))
          (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m)))
    (inr ygth)
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xl: x < n
ygth: y ≥ n
match stntonat m (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x xl)) with
| 0 => true
| S m0 => natgtb (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y ygth) + m) m0
end = true
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xl: x < n
ygth: y ≥ n
f_fun (pr_n_m_l x xl) < g_fun (pr_n_m_r y ygth) + m
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xl: x < n
ygth: y ≥ n
g_fun (pr_n_m_r y ygth) + m ≥ m
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xl: x < n
ygth: y ≥ n
m > f_fun (pr_n_m_l x xl)

      
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xl: x < n
ygth: y ≥ n
g_fun (pr_n_m_r y ygth) + m ≥ m
 exact (natlehmplusnm _ m).
      
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xl: x < n
ygth: y ≥ n
m > f_fun (pr_n_m_l x xl)
 exact (stnlt (f_fun _)).
    
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xgth: x ≥ n
yl: y < n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl 
           (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (inr xgth)
≤ coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (y < n) ⨿ (y ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
    (λ less_n : y < n,
     ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
       (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
          (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
          (natlehnplusnm m m')
          (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n)))))
    (λ geq_n : y ≥ n,
     ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
          (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
          (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))
          (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
          (natlthandplusl 
             (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m' m
             (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))))
          (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m)))
    (inl yl)
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xgth: x ≥ n
yl: y < n
n ≤ y
 exact (istransnatleh xgth l).
    
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xgth: x ≥ n
ygth: y ≥ n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : x < n,
   ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
        (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm m m')
        (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
   ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
        (natlthandplusl 
           (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m' m
           (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
  (inr xgth)
≤ coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (y < n) ⨿ (y ≥ n), (⟦ m + m' ⟧)%stn)
    (λ less_n : y < n,
     ordconstr (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
       (natgehgthtrans (m + m') m
          (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
          (natlehnplusnm m m')
          (stnlt (f_fun (pr_n_m_l y less_n)))))
    (λ geq_n : y ≥ n,
     ordconstr (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
          (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + m)
          (m + g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))
          (λ n : nat, n < m + m')
          (natlthandplusl 
             (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m' m
             (stnlt (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))))
          (natpluscomm (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) m)))
    (inr ygth)
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xgth: x ≥ n
ygth: y ≥ n
match g_fun (pr_n_m_r x xgth) + m with
| 0 => true
| S m0 => natgtb (g_fun (pr_n_m_r y ygth) + m) m0
end = true
 
n, n', m, m': nat

x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y

g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xgth: x ≥ n
ygth: y ≥ n
g_fun (pr_n_m_r x xgth) + m
≤ g_fun (pr_n_m_r y ygth) + m

      
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn

x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y

g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y

l: x ≤ y
