ygth: y ≥ n
g_fun (pr_n_m_r x xgth) ≤ g_fun (pr_n_m_r y ygth)
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xgth: x ≥ n
ygth: y ≥ n
pr_n_m_r x xgth ≤ pr_n_m_r y ygth
 
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xgth: x ≥ n
ygth: y ≥ n
x - n ≤ pr_n_m_r y ygth

      
n, n', m, m': nat
f_fun: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → f_fun x ≤ f_fun y
g_fun: (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
g_guarantee: ∏ x y : (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn,
x ≤ y → g_fun x ≤ g_fun y
x, y: (⟦ n + n' ⟧)%stn
l: x ≤ y
xgth: x ≥ n
ygth: y ≥ n
x - n ≤ y - n
 exact (natgehandminusr _ _ n l).
Defined.


functor_data (Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg


functor_data (Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg

  
Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg → Δ_sdg
∏ a b : Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg,
Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg ⟦ a, b ⟧ → Δ_sdg ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

  
Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg → Δ_sdg
 exact ordinal_addition.
  
∏ a b : Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg,
Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ Δ_sdg ⟦ ordinal_addition a, ordinal_addition b ⟧
 
a, b: Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg
pr: Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg ⟦ a, b ⟧
Δ_sdg ⟦ ordinal_addition a, ordinal_addition b ⟧
 
a, b: Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg
f: Δ_sdg ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧
g: Δ_sdg ⟦ pr2 a, pr2 b ⟧
Δ_sdg ⟦ ordinal_addition a, ordinal_addition b ⟧
 exact (sumfn f g).
Defined.


functor_data (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd


functor_data (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
 
Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd → Δ_sd
∏ a b : Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd,
Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧ → Δ_sd ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

       
Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd → Δ_sd
 exact ordinal_addition.
       
∏ a b : Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd,
Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ Δ_sd ⟦ ordinal_addition a, ordinal_addition b ⟧
 exact ordinal_hom.
Defined.


functor_idax tensor_data_card


functor_idax tensor_data_card

  
a: Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg
# tensor_data_card (id a) = id tensor_data_card a
 
n, m: Δ_sdg
# tensor_data_card (id (n,, m)) =
id tensor_data_card (n,, m)
 
n, m: Δ_sdg
sumfn (id n) (id m) = id (n + m)
 
n, m: Δ_sdg
(λ x : (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn,
 coprod_rect
   (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn)
   (λ less_n : x < n,
    ordconstr ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
      (natgehgthtrans (n + m) n
         ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
         (natlehnplusnm n m)
         (stnlt ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
   (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
    ordconstr ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + n)
      (internal_paths_rew_r nat
         ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + n)
         (n + (id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
         (λ n0 : nat, n0 < n + m)
         (natlthandplusl ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m
            n (stnlt ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
         (natpluscomm ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) n)))
   (natlthorgeh x n)) = id (n + m)
 
n, m: Δ_sdg
∏ x : (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : x < n,
      ordconstr ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n + m) n
           ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n m)
           (stnlt ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
      ordconstr ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + n)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + n)
           (n + (id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n0 : nat, n0 < n + m)
           (natlthandplusl ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              m n (stnlt ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) n)))
     (natlthorgeh x n)) = pr1 ((id (n + m)) x)

  
n, m: Δ_sdg
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : x < n,
      ordconstr ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n + m) n
           ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n m)
           (stnlt ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
      ordconstr ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + n)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + n)
           (n + (id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n0 : nat, n0 < n + m)
           (natlthandplusl ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              m n (stnlt ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) n)))
     (natlthorgeh x n)) = pr1 ((id (n + m)) x)

  
n, m: Δ_sdg
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
a: x < n
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : x < n,
      ordconstr ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n + m) n
           ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n m)
           (stnlt ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
      ordconstr ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + n)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + n)
           (n + (id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n0 : nat, n0 < n + m)
           (natlthandplusl ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              m n (stnlt ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) n)))
     (inl a)) = pr1 ((id (n + m)) x)
n, m: Δ_sdg
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
b: x ≥ n
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : x < n,
      ordconstr ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n + m) n
           ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n m)
           (stnlt ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
      ordconstr ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + n)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + n)
           (n + (id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n0 : nat, n0 < n + m)
           (natlthandplusl ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              m n (stnlt ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) n)))
     (inr b)) = pr1 ((id (n + m)) x)

  
n, m: Δ_sdg
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
a: x < n
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : x < n,
      ordconstr ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n + m) n
           ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n m)
           (stnlt ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
      ordconstr ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + n)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + n)
           (n + (id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n0 : nat, n0 < n + m)
           (natlthandplusl ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              m n (stnlt ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) n)))
     (inl a)) = pr1 ((id (n + m)) x)
 
n, m: Δ_sdg
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
a: x < n
x = pr1 ((id (n + m)) x)
 
n, m: Δ_sdg
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
a: x < n
x = pr1 (pr1 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) (n + m) x)
 reflexivity.
  
n, m: Δ_sdg
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
b: x ≥ n
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : x < n,
      ordconstr ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n + m) n
           ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n m)
           (stnlt ((id n) (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
      ordconstr ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + n)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + n)
           (n + (id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n0 : nat, n0 < n + m)
           (natlthandplusl ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              m n (stnlt ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm ((id m) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) n)))
     (inr b)) = pr1 ((id (n + m)) x)
 
n, m: Δ_sdg
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
b: x ≥ n
x - n + n = pr1 ((id (n + m)) x)
 
n, m: Δ_sdg
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
b: x ≥ n
x - n + n =
pr1 (pr1 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) (n + m) x)
 
n, m: Δ_sdg
x: (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
b: x ≥ n
x - n + n = pr1 x
 exact (minusplusnmm x n b).
Qed.


functor_idax tensor_data_ord


functor_idax tensor_data_ord

  
a: Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd
# tensor_data_ord (id a) = id tensor_data_ord a

  
a: Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd
# U (# tensor_data_ord (id a)) =
id U (tensor_data_ord a)
 
a: Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd
# U
  (# (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
        ordinal_addition ordinal_hom) (id a)) =
id U
     (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
        ordinal_addition ordinal_hom a)

  apply (tensor_id_card).
Qed.


functor_compax tensor_data_card


functor_compax tensor_data_card

  
∏ (a b c : Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg) (f : Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg ⟦ b, c ⟧),
# tensor_data_card (f · g) =
# tensor_data_card f · # tensor_data_card g
 
∏ (a b c : Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg) (f : Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg ⟦ b, c ⟧),
# (functor_data_constr (Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg
     ordinal_addition
     (λ (a0 b0 : Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg)
      (pr : Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
      sumfn (pr1 pr) (pr2 pr))) (f · g) =
# (functor_data_constr (Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg
     ordinal_addition
     (λ (a0 b0 : Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg)
      (pr : Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
      sumfn (pr1 pr) (pr2 pr))) f
· # (functor_data_constr (Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg
       ordinal_addition
       (λ (a0 b0 : Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg)
        (pr : Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
        sumfn (pr1 pr) (pr2 pr))) g
 
∏ (a b c : nat × nat)
(f : ((⟦ pr1 a ⟧)%stn → (⟦ pr1 b ⟧)%stn)
     × ((⟦ pr2 a ⟧)%stn → (⟦ pr2 b ⟧)%stn))
(g : ((⟦ pr1 b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ pr1 c ⟧)%stn)
     × ((⟦ pr2 b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ pr2 c ⟧)%stn)),
sumfn (pr1 f · pr1 g) (pr2 f · pr2 g) =
sumfn (pr1 f) (pr2 f) · sumfn (pr1 g) (pr2 g)

  
a, b, c: nat × nat
f: ((⟦ pr1 a ⟧)%stn → (⟦ pr1 b ⟧)%stn)
× ((⟦ pr2 a ⟧)%stn → (⟦ pr2 b ⟧)%stn)
g: ((⟦ pr1 b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ pr1 c ⟧)%stn)
× ((⟦ pr2 b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ pr2 c ⟧)%stn)
sumfn (pr1 f · pr1 g) (pr2 f · pr2 g) =
sumfn (pr1 f) (pr2 f) · sumfn (pr1 g) (pr2 g)

  
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f: ((⟦ pr1 (a0,, a1) ⟧)%stn → (⟦ pr1 (b0,, b1) ⟧)%stn)
× ((⟦ pr2 (a0,, a1) ⟧)%stn
   → (⟦ pr2 (b0,, b1) ⟧)%stn)
g: ((⟦ pr1 (b0,, b1) ⟧)%stn → (⟦ pr1 (c0,, c1) ⟧)%stn)
× ((⟦ pr2 (b0,, b1) ⟧)%stn
   → (⟦ pr2 (c0,, c1) ⟧)%stn)
sumfn (pr1 f · pr1 g) (pr2 f · pr2 g) =
sumfn (pr1 f) (pr2 f) · sumfn (pr1 g) (pr2 g)

  
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f: ((⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn)
× ((⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn)
g: ((⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn)
× ((⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn)
sumfn (pr1 f · pr1 g) (pr2 f · pr2 g) =
sumfn (pr1 f) (pr2 f) · sumfn (pr1 g) (pr2 g)
 
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
sumfn (pr1 (f0,, f1) · pr1 (g0,, g1))
  (pr2 (f0,, f1) · pr2 (g0,, g1)) =
sumfn f0 f1 · sumfn g0 g1


  
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
∏ x : (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  (sumfn (pr1 (f0,, f1) · pr1 (g0,, g1))
     (pr2 (f0,, f1) · pr2 (g0,, g1)) x) =
pr1 ((sumfn f0 f1 · sumfn g0 g1) x)
 
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
∏ x : (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn,
pr1 (sumfn (f0 · g0) (f1 · g1) x) =
pr1 ((sumfn f0 f1 · sumfn g0 g1) x)
 
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
pr1 (sumfn (f0 · g0) (f1 · g1) x) =
pr1 ((sumfn f0 f1 · sumfn g0 g1) x)

  
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (sumfn
     (pr2 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) a0 b0 c0 f0 g0)
     (pr2 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) a1 b1 c1 f1 g1) x) =
pr1
  (pr2 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) (a0 + a1) (b0 + b1)
     (c0 + c1) (sumfn f0 f1) (sumfn g0 g1) x)
 
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
pr1 (sumfn (g0 ∘ f0)%functions (g1 ∘ f1)%functions x) =
pr1 (sumfn g0 g1 (sumfn f0 f1 x))
 
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0), (⟦ c0 + c1 ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : x < a0,
      ordconstr
        ((g0 ∘ f0)%functions (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (c0 + c1) c0
           ((g0 ∘ f0)%functions (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm c0 c1)
           (stnlt
              ((g0 ∘ f0)%functions (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,
      ordconstr
        ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + c0)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) +
            c0)
           (c0 +
            (g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, n < c0 + c1)
           (natlthandplusl
              ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              c1 c0
              (stnlt
                 ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions
                    (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              c0))) (natlthorgeh x a0)) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (coprod_rect
               (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)
               (λ less_n : x < a0,
                ordconstr (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                  (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
                     (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                     (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
                     (stnlt (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
               (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,
                ordconstr (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                     (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                     (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                     (λ n : nat, n < b0 + b1)
                     (natlthandplusl
                        (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b1 b0
                        (stnlt (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
                     (natpluscomm
                        (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b0)))
               (natlthorgeh x a0) < b0)
            ⨿ (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                  (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : x < a0,
                  ordconstr (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
                       (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
                       (stnlt (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,
                  ordconstr
                    (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                       (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                       (λ n : nat, n < b0 + b1)
                       (natlthandplusl
                          (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b1
                          b0
                          (stnlt
                             (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                          (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b0)))
                 (natlthorgeh x a0) ≥ b0),
      (⟦ c0 + c1 ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : coprod_rect
                   (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                    (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)
                   (λ less_n : x < a0,
                    ordconstr (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                      (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
                         (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                         (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
                         (stnlt
                            (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
                   (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,
                    ordconstr
                      (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                      (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                         (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                         (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                         (λ n : nat, n < b0 + b1)
                         (natlthandplusl
                            (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b1
                            b0
                            (stnlt
                               (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
                         (natpluscomm
                            (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b0)))
                   (natlthorgeh x a0) < b0,
      ordconstr
        (g0
           (pr_n_m_l
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                  (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : x < a0,
                  ordconstr (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
                       (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
                       (stnlt
                          (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,
                  ordconstr
                    (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                       (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                       (λ n : nat, n < b0 + b1)
                       (natlthandplusl
                          (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b1
                          b0
                          (stnlt
                             (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                          (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b0)))
                 (natlthorgeh x a0)) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (c0 + c1) c0
           (g0
              (pr_n_m_l
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                     (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)
                    (λ less_n0 : x < a0,
                     ordconstr
                       (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n0))
                       (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
                          (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n0))
                          (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
                          (stnlt
                             (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n0)))))
                    (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,
                     ordconstr
                       (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                          (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                          (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                          (λ n : nat, n < b0 + b1)
                          (natlthandplusl
                             (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                             b1 b0 (stnlt (f1 (...))))
                          (natpluscomm
                             (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                             b0))) (natlthorgeh x a0))
                 less_n)) (natlehnplusnm c0 c1)
           (stnlt
              (g0
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (coprod_rect
                       (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                        (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)
                       (λ less_n0 : x < a0,
                        ordconstr
                          (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n0))
                          (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
                             (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n0))
                             (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
                             (stnlt (f0 (...)))))
                       (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,
                        ordconstr
                          (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                          (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                             (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) +
                              b0)
                             (b0 +
                              f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                             (λ n : nat, n < b0 + b1)
                             (natlthandplusl
                                (f1 (...)) b1 b0
                                (stnlt (...)))
                             (natpluscomm (f1 (...))
                                b0)))
                       (natlthorgeh x a0)) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : coprod_rect
                  (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                   (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)
                  (λ less_n : x < a0,
                   ordconstr (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                     (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
                        (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                        (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
                        (stnlt
                           (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
                  (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,
                   ordconstr
                     (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                        (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                        (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                        (λ n : nat, n < b0 + b1)
                        (natlthandplusl
                           (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b1
                           b0
                           (stnlt
                              (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
                        (natpluscomm
                           (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b0)))
                  (natlthorgeh x a0) ≥ b0,
      ordconstr
        (g1
           (pr_n_m_r
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                  (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : x < a0,
                  ordconstr (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
                       (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
                       (stnlt (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : x ≥ a0,
                  ordconstr
                    (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0) + b0)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0) + b0)
                       (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0))
                       (λ n : nat, n < b0 + b1)
                       (natlthandplusl
                          (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0)) b1
                          b0
                          (stnlt
                             (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                          (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0)) b0)))
                 (natlthorgeh x a0)) geq_n) + c0)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (g1
              (pr_n_m_r
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                     (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)
                    (λ less_n : x < a0,
                     ordconstr
                       (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                       (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
                          (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                          (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
                          (stnlt
                             (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
                    (λ geq_n0 : x ≥ a0,
                     ordconstr
                       (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0) + b0)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                          (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0) + b0)
                          (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0))
                          (λ n : nat, n < b0 + b1)
                          (natlthandplusl
                             (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0))
                             b1 b0 (stnlt (f1 ...)))
                          (natpluscomm
                             (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0))
                             b0))) (natlthorgeh x a0))
                 geq_n) + c0)
           (c0 +
            g1
              (pr_n_m_r
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                     (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)
                    (λ less_n : x < a0,
                     ordconstr
                       (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                       (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
                          (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))

f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn

        ((g0 ∘ f0)%functions (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (c0 + c1) c0
           ((g0 ∘ f0)%functions (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm c0 c1)
           (stnlt
              ((g0 ∘ f0)%functions (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,

        ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + c0)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat

           (c0 +

              c1 c0

                 ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions
                    (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              c0))) (inr b)) =

a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
a: x < a0
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0), (⟦ c0 + c1 ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : x < a0,
      ordconstr
        ((g0 ∘ f0)%functions (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (c0 + c1) c0
           ((g0 ∘ f0)%functions (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm c0 c1)
           (stnlt
              ((g0 ∘ f0)%functions (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,
      ordconstr
        ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + c0)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) +
            c0)
           (c0 +
            (g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, n < c0 + c1)
           (natlthandplusl
              ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              c1 c0
              (stnlt
                 ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions
                    (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              c0))) (inl a)) =

                     (stnlt (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))

                       (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
                       (stnlt (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : x ≥ a0,
                  ordconstr
                    (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0) + b0)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0) + b0)
                       (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0))
                       (λ n : nat, n < b0 + b1)
                       (natlthandplusl
                          (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0)) b1
                          b0
                          (stnlt
                             (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                          (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0)) b0)))
                 (inl a)) geq_n) + c0)

           (g1
              (pr_n_m_r

           (c0 +

                             b1 b0 (stnlt (f1 ...)))
                          (natpluscomm
                             (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n0))
                             b0))) (inl a)) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, n < c0 + c1)
           (natlthandplusl
              (g1
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (coprod_rect
                       (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                        (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)

                                (f1 (...)) b1 b0
                                (stnlt (...)))
                             (natpluscomm (f1 (...))
                                b0))) (inl a)) geq_n))
              c1 c0
              (stnlt
                 (g1
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (coprod_rect
                          (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),

                                (f1 ... + b0)
                                (b0 + f1 ...)

                                   b1 b0 (...))

           (natpluscomm
              (g1
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (coprod_rect
                       (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                        (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)

                             (natpluscomm (f1 (...))
                                b0))) (inl a)) geq_n))
              c0))) (inl (stnlt (f0 (ordconstr x a)))))
 
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
a: natgtb a0 x = true
g0 (f0 (pr_n_m_l x a)) =
g0
  (pr_n_m_l
     (ordconstr (f0 (pr_n_m_l x a))
        (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
           (f0 (pr_n_m_l x a)) (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
           (stnlt (f0 (pr_n_m_l x a)))))
     (stnlt (f0 (ordconstr x a))))

    
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
a: natgtb a0 x = true
g0 (f0 (pr_n_m_l x a)) =
g0
  (pr_n_m_l
     (ordconstr (f0 (pr_n_m_l x a))
        (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
           (f0 (pr_n_m_l x a)) (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
           (stnlt (f0 (pr_n_m_l x a)))))
     (stnlt (f0 (ordconstr x a))))
 
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
a: natgtb a0 x = true
f0 (pr_n_m_l x a) =
pr_n_m_l
  (ordconstr (f0 (pr_n_m_l x a))
     (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0 (f0 (pr_n_m_l x a))
        (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
        (stnlt (f0 (pr_n_m_l x a)))))
  (stnlt (f0 (ordconstr x a)))

    
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
a: natgtb a0 x = true
pr1 (f0 (pr_n_m_l x a)) =
pr1
  (pr_n_m_l
     (ordconstr (f0 (pr_n_m_l x a))
        (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
           (f0 (pr_n_m_l x a)) (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
           (stnlt (f0 (pr_n_m_l x a)))))
     (stnlt (f0 (ordconstr x a))))

                              reflexivity.
  
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
b: x ≥ a0
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0), (⟦ c0 + c1 ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : x < a0,
      ordconstr
        ((g0 ∘ f0)%functions (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (c0 + c1) c0
           ((g0 ∘ f0)%functions (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm c0 c1)
           (stnlt
              ((g0 ∘ f0)%functions (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,
      ordconstr
        ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + c0)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) +
            c0)
           (c0 +
            (g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, n < c0 + c1)
           (natlthandplusl
              ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              c1 c0
              (stnlt
                 ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions
                    (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              c0))) (inr b)) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (coprod_rect
               (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)
               (λ less_n : x < a0,
                ordconstr (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                  (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
                     (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                     (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
                     (stnlt (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
               (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,
                ordconstr (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                     (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                     (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                     (λ n : nat, n < b0 + b1)
                     (natlthandplusl
                        (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b1 b0
                        (stnlt (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
                     (natpluscomm
                        (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b0)))
               (inr b) < b0)
            ⨿ (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                  (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : x < a0,
                  ordconstr (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
                       (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm b0 b1)
                       (stnlt (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,
                  ordconstr
                    (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)

                       (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)
                       (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                       (λ n : nat, n < b0 + b1)

                          (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b1
                          b0
                          (stnlt
                             (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                          (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b0)))
                 (inr b) ≥ b0), (⟦ c0 + c1 ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : coprod_rect
                   (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                    (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)
                   (λ less_n : x < a0,
                    ordconstr (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))

                         (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))

                   (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,

                      (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + b0)

                         (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                         (λ n : nat, n < b0 + b1)

                            (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b1
                            b0
                            (stnlt
                               (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
                         (natpluscomm
                            (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b0)))
                   (inr b) < b0,
      ordconstr
        (g0
           (pr_n_m_l
              (coprod_rect

                 (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,

                       (natpluscomm
                          (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b0)))
                 (inr b)) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (c0 + c1) c0
           (g0
              (pr_n_m_l
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                     (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)

                    (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,

                          (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                          (λ n : nat, n < b0 + b1)
                          (natlthandplusl
                             (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                             b1 b0 (stnlt (f1 (...))))
                          (natpluscomm
                             (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                             b0))) (inr b)) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm c0 c1)
           (stnlt
              (g0
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (coprod_rect
                       (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),

                             (λ n : nat, n < b0 + b1)

                                (f1 (...)) b1 b0
                                (stnlt (...)))
                             (natpluscomm (f1 (...))
                                b0))) (inr b)) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : coprod_rect
                  (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),
                   (⟦ b0 + b1 ⟧)%stn)
                  (λ less_n : x < a0,
                   ordconstr (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))

                  (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,

                  (inr b) ≥ b0,
      ordconstr
        (g1
           (pr_n_m_r
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),

           (c0 +
            g1
              (pr_n_m_r

                    (λ less_n : x < a0,
                     ordconstr
                       (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
                       (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0

                        ordconstr

        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),

a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
b: x ≥ a0
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0), (⟦ c0 + c1 ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : x < a0,
      ordconstr
        ((g0 ∘ f0)%functions (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (c0 + c1) c0
           ((g0 ∘ f0)%functions (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm c0 c1)
           (stnlt
              ((g0 ∘ f0)%functions (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,
      ordconstr
        ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + c0)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) +
            c0)
           (c0 +
            (g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, n < c0 + c1)
           (natlthandplusl
              ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              c1 c0
              (stnlt
                 ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions
                    (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              ((g1 ∘ f1)%functions (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              c0))) (inr b)) =

               (λ _ : (x < a0) ⨿ (x ≥ a0),

                  (natgehgthtrans (b0 + b1) b0
                     (f0 (pr_n_m_l x less_n))

               (λ geq_n : x ≥ a0,

                        (stnlt (f1 (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
                     (natpluscomm

               (inr b) < b0)

                 (inr b) ≥ b0), (⟦ c0 + c1 ⟧)%stn)

                   (inr b) < b0,

        (natgehgthtrans (c0 + c1) c0

a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
b: match a0 with
| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb x m
end = true
g1 (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) + c0 =
g1
  (pr_n_m_r
     (ordconstr (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b) + b0)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b) + b0)
           (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x b))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (b0 + b1) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) b1 b0
              (stnlt (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b))))
           (natpluscomm (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) b0)))
     (natgehplusnmm (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) b0)) + c0

    
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
b: match a0 with
| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb x m
end = true
g1 (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) =
g1
  (pr_n_m_r
     (ordconstr (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b) + b0)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b) + b0)
           (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x b))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (b0 + b1) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) b1 b0
              (stnlt (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b))))
           (natpluscomm (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) b0)))
     (natgehplusnmm (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) b0))
 
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
b: match a0 with
| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb x m
end = true
g1 (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) =
g1
  (pr_n_m_r
     (ordconstr (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b) + b0)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b) + b0)
           (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x b))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (b0 + b1) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) b1 b0
              (stnlt (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b))))
           (natpluscomm (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) b0)))
     (natgehplusnmm (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) b0))
 
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
b: match a0 with
| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb x m
end = true
f1 (pr_n_m_r x b) =
pr_n_m_r
  (ordconstr (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b) + b0)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b) + b0)
        (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x b))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (b0 + b1) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) b1 b0
           (stnlt (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b))))
        (natpluscomm (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) b0)))
  (natgehplusnmm (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) b0)

    
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
b: match a0 with
| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb x m
end = true
pr1 (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) =
pr1
  (pr_n_m_r
     (ordconstr (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b) + b0)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b) + b0)
           (b0 + f1 (pr_n_m_r x b))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (b0 + b1) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) b1 b0
              (stnlt (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b))))
           (natpluscomm (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) b0)))
     (natgehplusnmm (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) b0))

                              
a0, a1, b0, b1, c0, c1: nat
f0: (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn
f1: (⟦ a1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn
g0: (⟦ b0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c0 ⟧)%stn
g1: (⟦ b1 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c1 ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ a0 + a1 ⟧)%stn
b: match a0 with
| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb x m
end = true
pr1 (f1 (pr_n_m_r x b)) = f1 (pr_n_m_r x b) + b0 - b0
 exact (pathsinv0 (plusminusnmm _ b0)).
Qed.


functor_compax tensor_data_ord


functor_compax tensor_data_ord

  
∏ (a b c : Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) (f : Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd ⟦ b, c ⟧),
# (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
     ordinal_addition ordinal_hom) (f · g) =
# (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
     ordinal_addition ordinal_hom) f
· # (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
       ordinal_addition ordinal_hom) g
 
a, b, c: Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd ⟦ b, c ⟧
# (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
     ordinal_addition ordinal_hom) (f · g) =
# (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
     ordinal_addition ordinal_hom) f
· # (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
       ordinal_addition ordinal_hom) g

  
a, b, c: Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd
f0: Δ_sd ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧
f1: Δ_sd ⟦ pr2 a, pr2 b ⟧
g0: Δ_sd ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧
g1: Δ_sd ⟦ pr2 b, pr2 c ⟧
# (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
     ordinal_addition ordinal_hom)
  ((f0,, f1) · (g0,, g1)) =
# (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
     ordinal_addition ordinal_hom) (f0,, f1)
· # (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
       ordinal_addition ordinal_hom) (g0,, g1)

  
a, b, c: Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd
f0: Δ_sd ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧
f1: Δ_sd ⟦ pr2 a, pr2 b ⟧
g0: Δ_sd ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧
g1: Δ_sd ⟦ pr2 b, pr2 c ⟧
Uf:= make_dirprod (# U f0) (# U f1): Δ_sdg ⟦ U (pr1 a), U (pr1 b) ⟧
× Δ_sdg ⟦ U (pr2 a), U (pr2 b) ⟧
# (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
     ordinal_addition ordinal_hom)
  ((f0,, f1) · (g0,, g1)) =
# (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
     ordinal_addition ordinal_hom) (f0,, f1)
· # (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
       ordinal_addition ordinal_hom) (g0,, g1)

  
a, b, c: Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd
f0: Δ_sd ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧
f1: Δ_sd ⟦ pr2 a, pr2 b ⟧
g0: Δ_sd ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧
g1: Δ_sd ⟦ pr2 b, pr2 c ⟧
Uf:= make_dirprod (# U f0) (# U f1): Δ_sdg ⟦ U (pr1 a), U (pr1 b) ⟧
× Δ_sdg ⟦ U (pr2 a), U (pr2 b) ⟧
Ug:= make_dirprod (# U g0) (# U g1): Δ_sdg ⟦ U (pr1 b), U (pr1 c) ⟧
× Δ_sdg ⟦ U (pr2 b), U (pr2 c) ⟧
# (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
     ordinal_addition ordinal_hom)
  ((f0,, f1) · (g0,, g1)) =
# (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
     ordinal_addition ordinal_hom) (f0,, f1)
· # (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
       ordinal_addition ordinal_hom) (g0,, g1)

  
a, b, c: Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd
f0: Δ_sd ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧
f1: Δ_sd ⟦ pr2 a, pr2 b ⟧
g0: Δ_sd ⟦ pr1 b, pr1 c ⟧
g1: Δ_sd ⟦ pr2 b, pr2 c ⟧
Uf:= make_dirprod (# U f0) (# U f1): Δ_sdg ⟦ U (pr1 a), U (pr1 b) ⟧
× Δ_sdg ⟦ U (pr2 a), U (pr2 b) ⟧
Ug:= make_dirprod (# U g0) (# U g1): Δ_sdg ⟦ U (pr1 b), U (pr1 c) ⟧
× Δ_sdg ⟦ U (pr2 b), U (pr2 c) ⟧
# U
  (# (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
        ordinal_addition ordinal_hom)
     ((f0,, f1) · (g0,, g1))) =
# U
  (# (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
        ordinal_addition ordinal_hom) (f0,, f1)
   · # (functor_data_constr (Δ_sd ⊠ Δ_sd) Δ_sd
          ordinal_addition ordinal_hom) (g0,, g1))
 exact (tensor_comp_card a b c Uf Ug).
Qed.

   is_functor_identity Δ_sd)

⟦ (functor_fix_fst_arg_data Δ_sd Δ_sd Δ_sd

 exact (id n).
    
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (functor_fix_fst_arg_data Δ_sd Δ_sd Δ_sd
            tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit,,

 is_nat_trans

   (functor_identity_data Δ_sd,,

  ((λ n : Δ_sd, id n)
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (functor_fix_fst_arg_data Δ_sd Δ_sd Δ_sd
        tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit,,
      is_functor_functor_fix_fst_arg_data Δ_sd Δ_sd
        Δ_sd tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit)
     (functor_identity_data Δ_sd,,
      is_functor_identity Δ_sd))
 abstract (cbv beta;
      unfold is_nat_trans; intros n m f; apply morphism_extensionality;
      unfold tensor_functor_ord; simpl;
      unfold functor_fix_fst_arg_ob, sumfn;  simpl;
      intro x;
      apply subtypeInjectivity_prop;
      simpl; rewrite natplusr0;
      apply maponpaths, maponpaths, subtypeInjectivity_prop; simpl; exact (natminuseqn x)).
  
(λ μ : (functor_fix_fst_arg_data Δ_sd Δ_sd Δ_sd
          tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit,,
        is_functor_functor_fix_fst_arg_data Δ_sd Δ_sd
          Δ_sd tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit)
       ⟹ (functor_identity_data Δ_sd,,
          is_functor_identity Δ_sd), is_nat_z_iso μ)
  (((λ n : Δ_sd, id n)
    :
    nat_trans_data
      (functor_fix_fst_arg_data Δ_sd Δ_sd Δ_sd
         tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit,,
       is_functor_functor_fix_fst_arg_data Δ_sd Δ_sd
         Δ_sd tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit)
      (functor_identity_data Δ_sd,,
       is_functor_identity Δ_sd)),,
   tensor_left_unitor_ord_subproof
   :
   (functor_fix_fst_arg_data Δ_sd Δ_sd Δ_sd
      tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit,,
    is_functor_functor_fix_fst_arg_data Δ_sd Δ_sd Δ_sd
      tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit)
   ⟹ (functor_identity_data Δ_sd,,

g : Δ_sd

       is_functor_identity Δ_sd) c,

is_inverse_in_precat
  (((λ n : Δ_sd, id n),,
    tensor_left_unitor_ord_subproof) c) g

  (((λ n : Δ_sd, id n),,
    tensor_left_unitor_ord_subproof) c) (id c)

    split;
    unfold tensor_functor_ord, functor_fix_fst_arg_ob, tensor_data_ord; simpl;
    exact (id_left (id c))).

∏ (x x' : Δ_sdg) (f : Δ_sdg ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (I_posttensor tensor_functor_card tensor_unit) f
· internal_paths_rew_r nat (x' + 0) x'
    (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x' ⟧)%stn)
    (idfun (⟦ x' ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 x') =
internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) x
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 x)
· # (functor_identity Δ_sdg) f
 
∏ (x x' : nat) (f : (⟦ x ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x' ⟧)%stn),
functor_fix_snd_arg_mor precat_fincard precat_fincard
  precat_fincard tensor_functor_card 0 x x' f
· internal_paths_rew_r nat (x' + 0) x'
    (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x' ⟧)%stn)
    (idfun (⟦ x' ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 x') =
internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) x
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 x) · f

  
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
functor_fix_snd_arg_mor precat_fincard precat_fincard
  precat_fincard tensor_functor_card 0 n m f
· internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
    (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
    (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m) =
internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
  (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) · f
 
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
sumfn f (id 0)
· internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
    (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
    (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m) =
internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
  (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) · f

  
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
∏ x : (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  ((sumfn f (id 0)
    · internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)) x) =
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
      (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) · f) x)

  
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
pr1
  ((sumfn f (id 0)
    · internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)) x) =
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
      (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) · f) x)

  
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)
     (sumfn f (id 0) x)) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))
  
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)
     (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + 0 ⟧)%stn)
        (λ less_n : x < n,
         ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
           (natgehgthtrans (m + 0) m
              (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
              (natlehnplusnm m 0)
              (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
        (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
         ordconstr ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
              (m + (id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              (λ n : nat, n < m + 0)
              (natlthandplusl
                 ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 0 m
                 (stnlt ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
              (natpluscomm ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                 m))) (natlthorgeh x n))) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))

  
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
x < n
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
j: x < n
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)
     (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + 0 ⟧)%stn)
        (λ less_n : x < n,
         ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
           (natgehgthtrans (m + 0) m
              (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
              (natlehnplusnm m 0)
              (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
        (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
         ordconstr ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
              (m + (id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              (λ n : nat, n < m + 0)
              (natlthandplusl
                 ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 0 m
                 (stnlt ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
              (natpluscomm ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                 m))) (natlthorgeh x n))) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))
 
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
x < n
 simpl; induction (natplusr0 n); exact (stnlt x). 
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
j: x < n
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)
     (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + 0 ⟧)%stn)
        (λ less_n : x < n,
         ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
           (natgehgthtrans (m + 0) m
              (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
              (natlehnplusnm m 0)
              (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
        (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
         ordconstr ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
              (m + (id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              (λ n : nat, n < m + 0)
              (natlthandplusl
                 ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 0 m
                 (stnlt ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
              (natpluscomm ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                 m))) (natlthorgeh x n))) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))

  
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
j: x < n
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)
     (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + 0 ⟧)%stn)
        (λ less_n : x < n,
         ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
           (natgehgthtrans (m + 0) m
              (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
              (natlehnplusnm m 0)
              (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
        (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
         ordconstr ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
              (m + (id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
              (λ n : nat, n < m + 0)
              (natlthandplusl
                 ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 0 m
                 (stnlt ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
              (natpluscomm ((id 0) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
                 m))) (inl j))) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))
 
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
j: x < n
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)
     (ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x j))
        (natgehgthtrans (m + 0) m (f (pr_n_m_l x j))
           (paths_rect nat m
              (λ (n0 : nat) (_ : m = n0),
               match m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb n0 m
               end = true) (isreflnatleh m) (m + 0)
              (! natplusr0 m))
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x j)))))) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))

  
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
j: x < n
∏ (h : ∏ k : nat, m + 0 ≥ m → m > k → m + 0 > k)
(p : m = m + 0),
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)
     (ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x j))
        (h (f (pr_n_m_l x j))
           (paths_rect nat m
              (λ (n0 : nat) (_ : m = n0),
               match m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb n0 m
               end = true) (isreflnatleh m) (m + 0) p)
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x j)))))) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))
 
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
j: x < n
h: ∏ k : nat, m + 0 ≥ m → m > k → m + 0 > k
p: m = m + 0
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)
     (ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x j))
        (h (f (pr_n_m_l x j))
           (paths_rect nat m
              (λ (n0 : nat) (_ : m = n0),
               match m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb n0 m
               end = true) (isreflnatleh m) (m + 0) p)
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x j)))))) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))

  
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
j: x < n
h: ∏ k : nat, m + 0 ≥ m → m > k → m + 0 > k
p: m = m + 0
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)
     (ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x j))
        (h (f (pr_n_m_l x j))
           (paths_rect nat m
              (λ (n0 : nat) (_ : m = n0),
               match m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb n0 m
               end = true) (isreflnatleh m) (m + 0) p)
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x j)))))) =
pr1 (f (ordconstr x j))
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
j: x < n
h: ∏ k : nat, m + 0 ≥ m → m > k → m + 0 > k
p: m = m + 0
pr1 (f (ordconstr x j)) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))

  
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
j: x < n
h: ∏ k : nat, m + 0 ≥ m → m > k → m + 0 > k
p: m = m + 0
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)
     (ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x j))
        (h (f (pr_n_m_l x j))
           (paths_rect nat m
              (λ (n0 : nat) (_ : m = n0),
               match m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb n0 m
               end = true) (isreflnatleh m) (m + 0) p)
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x j)))))) =
pr1 (f (ordconstr x j))
 
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
j: x < n
h: ∏ k : nat, m + 0 ≥ m → m > k → m + 0 > k
p: m = m + 0
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) (m + 0)
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m + 0 ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ m + 0 ⟧)%stn) (idpath (m + 0))
     (ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x j))
        (h (f (pr_n_m_l x j))
           (paths_rect nat m
              (λ (n0 : nat) (_ : m = n0),
               match m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb n0 m
               end = true) (isreflnatleh m) (m + 0) p)
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x j)))))) =
pr1 (f (ordconstr x j))
  reflexivity.
  
n, m: nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
j: x < n
h: ∏ k : nat, m + 0 ≥ m → m > k → m + 0 > k
p: m = m + 0
pr1 (f (ordconstr x j)) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))
 apply maponpaths, maponpaths, subtypeInjectivity_prop;
      simpl; induction (natplusr0 n); reflexivity.
Qed.

 is_inverse_in_precat

  (((internal_paths_rew_r nat (c + 0) c
       (λ n : nat, (⟦ c ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)

      induction (natplusr0 c); simpl; exact (id_left (id Δ_sdg_ob_constr (c + 0)))).

   · tensor_right_unitor_ord_nt_data m) =

f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
sumfn f (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn)
· internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
    (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
    (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m) =
(f
 ∘ internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
     (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n))%functions

f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
pr2 (pr2 precat_fincard_data)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta precat_Delta
     precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord 0 n)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta precat_Delta
     precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord 0 m) m
  (sumfn f (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn))
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)) =

 ∘ internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n

     (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n))%functions

(internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
   (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
   (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)
 ∘ sumfn f (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn))%functions =
(f
 ∘ internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
     (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n))%functions

f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
∏
x : (⟦ functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta
         precat_Delta precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord
         0 n ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
      (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)
    ∘ sumfn f (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn))%functions x) =
pr1
  ((f
    ∘ internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n))%functions x)

      
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
∏
x : (⟦ make_functor tensor_data_ord
         tensor_ord_is_functor (n,, 0) ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
      (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)
    ∘ sumfn f (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn))%functions x) =

    ∘ internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n))%functions x)
 
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
∏ x : (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) m
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ m ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 m)
     (sumfn f (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn) x)) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))

      
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
∏ x : (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (m + 0) (m + 0)
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m + 0 ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ m + 0 ⟧)%stn) (idpath (m + 0))
     (sumfn f (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn) x)) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))
 
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
∏ x : (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn,
pr1 (sumfn f (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn) x) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))
 
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
pr1 (sumfn f (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn) x) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))


      
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + 0 ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : x < n,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (m + 0) m
           (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)) (natlehnplusnm m 0)
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
      ordconstr
        (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
           (m + idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, n < m + 0)
           (natlthandplusl
              (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 0
              m
              (stnlt
                 (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
     (natlthorgeh x n)) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))

      
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
x < n
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
xbd: x < n
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + 0 ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : x < n,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (m + 0) m
           (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)) (natlehnplusnm m 0)
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
      ordconstr
        (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
           (m + idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, n < m + 0)
           (natlthandplusl
              (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 0
              m
              (stnlt
                 (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
     (natlthorgeh x n)) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))
 
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
x < n
 
n, m: nat
f: monfunstn n m
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
natgtb n x = true
 
n, m: nat
f: monfunstn n m
x: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
natgtb n x = true
 exact (stnlt x). 
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
xbd: x < n
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + 0 ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : x < n,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (m + 0) m
           (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)) (natlehnplusnm m 0)
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
      ordconstr
        (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
           (m + idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, n < m + 0)
           (natlthandplusl
              (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 0
              m
              (stnlt
                 (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
     (natlthorgeh x n)) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))

      
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
xbd: x < n
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), (⟦ m + 0 ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : x < n,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (m + 0) m
           (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)) (natlehnplusnm m 0)
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ n,
      ordconstr
        (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + m)
           (m + idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))

              (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 0
              m
              (stnlt
                 (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (idfun (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) m)))
     (inl xbd)) =
pr1
  (f
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
        (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x))

x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
xbd: x < n
f (pr_n_m_l x xbd) =

f
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n

f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
xbd: x < n
pr_n_m_l x xbd =
internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
  (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x

pr1 (pr_n_m_l x xbd) =

  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) n
     (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 n) x)

      
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
xbd: x < n
pr1 (pr_n_m_l x xbd) =
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + 0) (n + 0)
     (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn) (idpath (n + 0)) x)
 
n, m: Δ_sd
f: Δ_sd ⟦ n, m ⟧
x: (⟦ n + 0 ⟧)%stn
xbd: x < n
x = pr1 x
 reflexivity.
Qed.

  (I_posttensor tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit)
  (functor_identity Δ_sd)

⟹ functor_identity Δ_sd
(λ μ : I_posttensor tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit
       ⟹ functor_identity Δ_sd, is_nat_z_iso μ) ?pr1

⟹ functor_identity Δ_sd
 exact (tensor_right_unitor_ord_nt_data,,tensor_right_unitor_ord_is_nat_trans). 
(λ μ : I_posttensor tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit
       ⟹ functor_identity Δ_sd, is_nat_z_iso μ)
  (tensor_right_unitor_ord_nt_data,,
   tensor_right_unitor_ord_is_nat_trans)

  
is_nat_z_iso
  (tensor_right_unitor_ord_nt_data,,
   tensor_right_unitor_ord_is_nat_trans)
 
∏ c : Δ_sd,
is_z_isomorphism
  ((tensor_right_unitor_ord_nt_data,,
    tensor_right_unitor_ord_is_nat_trans) c)
 
∏ c : nat,
is_z_isomorphism
  (make_monfunstn
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (c + 0) c
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ c ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 c))
     (λ (x
         y : (⟦ functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta
                  precat_Delta precat_Delta
                  tensor_functor_ord 0 c ⟧)%stn)
      (leq : match
               stntonat
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta
                    precat_Delta precat_Delta
                    tensor_functor_ord 0 c) x
             with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb y m
             end = true),
      paths_rect nat (c + 0)
        (λ (a : nat) (p0 : c + 0 = a),
         match
           stntonat a
             (internal_paths_rew_r nat (c + 0) a
                (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) p0 x)
         with
         | 0 => true
         | S m =>
             natgtb
               (internal_paths_rew_r nat (c + 0) a
                  (λ n : nat,
                   (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                  (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) p0 y) m
         end = true) leq c (natplusr0 c)))
 
c: nat
is_z_isomorphism
  (make_monfunstn
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (c + 0) c
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ c ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 c))
     (λ (x
         y : (⟦ functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta
                  precat_Delta precat_Delta
                  tensor_functor_ord 0 c ⟧)%stn)
      (leq : match
               stntonat
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta
                    precat_Delta precat_Delta
                    tensor_functor_ord 0 c) x
             with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb y m
             end = true),
      paths_rect nat (c + 0)
        (λ (a : nat) (p0 : c + 0 = a),

                (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) p0 x)
         with
         | 0 => true
         | S m =>
             natgtb
               (internal_paths_rew_r nat (c + 0) a
                  (λ n : nat,
                   (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                  (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) p0 y) m
         end = true) leq c (natplusr0 c)))
 
c: nat
∑
g : precat_Delta_precategory_data ⟦ c,
    functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta precat_Delta
      precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord 0 c ⟧,
is_inverse_in_precat
  (make_monfunstn
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (c + 0) c
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ c ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 c))
     (λ (x
         y : (⟦ functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta

                (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)

         with
         | 0 => true
         | S m =>

functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta precat_Delta
  precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord 0 c ⟧

monfunstn c c

(λ g : precat_Delta_precategory_data ⟦ c,

         0 c ⟧,

      (λ (x
          y : (⟦ functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta
                   precat_Delta precat_Delta

       (leq : match
                stntonat

                     precat_Delta precat_Delta
                     tensor_functor_ord 0 c) x
              with
              | 0 => true
              | S m => natgtb y m
              end = true),
       paths_rect nat (c + 0)

                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)

          with
          | 0 => true

                   (λ n : nat,
                    (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                   (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) p0 y) m
          end = true) leq c (natplusr0 c))) g)
  (((internal_paths_rew_r nat (c + 0) c
       (λ n : nat, monfunstn c n) (monfunstnid c)
       (natplusr0 c)
     :
     monfunstn c (tensor_functor_ord (c,, 0)))

     precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord 0 c ⟧)

  
c: nat
(λ g : precat_Delta_precategory_data ⟦ c,
       functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta
         precat_Delta precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord
         0 c ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (make_monfunstn
      (internal_paths_rew_r nat (c + 0) c
         (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c ⟧)%stn)

      (λ (x
          y : (⟦ functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta
                   precat_Delta precat_Delta

       (leq : match
                stntonat
