                     precat_Delta precat_Delta
                     tensor_functor_ord 0 c) x
              with
              | 0 => true
              | S m => natgtb y m
              end = true),
       paths_rect nat (c + 0)
         (λ (a : nat) (p0 : c + 0 = a),
          match
            stntonat a
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat (c + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) p0 x)
          with
          | 0 => true
          | S m =>
              natgtb
                (internal_paths_rew_r nat (c + 0) a
                   (λ n : nat,
                    (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                   (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) p0 y) m
          end = true) leq c (natplusr0 c))) g)
  (((internal_paths_rew_r nat (c + 0) c
       (λ n : nat, monfunstn c n) (monfunstnid c)
       (natplusr0 c)
     :
     monfunstn c (tensor_functor_ord (c,, 0)))
    :
    monfunstn c
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta
         precat_Delta precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord
         0 c))
   :
   precat_Delta_precategory_data ⟦ c,
   functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta precat_Delta
     precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord 0 c ⟧)

    abstract(cbv beta; unfold tensor_right_unitor_ord_nt_data;
             split;
               unfold functor_fix_snd_arg_ob; simpl;
               induction (natplusr0 c); simpl; reflexivity;
               induction (natplusr0 c); reflexivity).
  }
Defined.


nat_trans_data (assoc_left tensor_functor_card)
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_card)


nat_trans_data (assoc_left tensor_functor_card)
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_card)

  
∏
x : category_binproduct
      (category_binproduct Δ_sdg Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg,
Δ_sdg ⟦ assoc_left tensor_functor_card x,
assoc_right tensor_functor_card x ⟧
 
∏ x : (nat × nat) × nat,
(⟦ pr1 (pr1 x) + pr2 (pr1 x) + pr2 x ⟧)%stn
→ (⟦ pr1 (pr1 x) + (pr2 (pr1 x) + pr2 x) ⟧)%stn
 
n, m, k: nat
(⟦ pr1 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)) + pr2 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)) +
   pr2 ((n,, m),, k) ⟧)%stn
→ (⟦ pr1 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)) +
     (pr2 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)) + pr2 ((n,, m),, k)) ⟧)%stn

   
n, m, k: nat
(⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
 
n, m, k: nat
(⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
 exact (idfun _).
Defined.

Arguments tensor_associator_card_nat_trans_data /.


is_nat_trans (assoc_left tensor_functor_card)
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_card)
  tensor_associator_card_nat_trans_data


is_nat_trans (assoc_left tensor_functor_card)
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_card)
  tensor_associator_card_nat_trans_data

  
∏
(x
 x' : category_binproduct
        (category_binproduct Δ_sdg Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg)
(f : category_binproduct
       (category_binproduct Δ_sdg Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg ⟦ x, x'
     ⟧),
# (assoc_left tensor_functor_card) f
· tensor_associator_card_nat_trans_data x' =
tensor_associator_card_nat_trans_data x
· # (assoc_right tensor_functor_card) f
 
∏ (x x' : (nat × nat) × nat)
(f : (((⟦ pr1 (pr1 x) ⟧)%stn → (⟦ pr1 (pr1 x') ⟧)%stn)
      × ((⟦ pr2 (pr1 x) ⟧)%stn
         → (⟦ pr2 (pr1 x') ⟧)%stn))
     × ((⟦ pr2 x ⟧)%stn → (⟦ pr2 x' ⟧)%stn)),
sumfn (sumfn (pr1 (pr1 f)) (pr2 (pr1 f))) (pr2 f)
· internal_paths_rew_r nat
    (pr1 (pr1 x') + pr2 (pr1 x') + pr2 x')
    (pr1 (pr1 x') + (pr2 (pr1 x') + pr2 x'))
    (λ n : nat,
     (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
     → (⟦ pr1 (pr1 x') + (pr2 (pr1 x') + pr2 x') ⟧)%stn)
    (idfun
       (⟦ pr1 (pr1 x') + (pr2 (pr1 x') + pr2 x') ⟧)%stn)
    (natplusassoc (pr1 (pr1 x')) (pr2 (pr1 x'))
       (pr2 x')) =
internal_paths_rew_r nat
  (pr1 (pr1 x) + pr2 (pr1 x) + pr2 x)
  (pr1 (pr1 x) + (pr2 (pr1 x) + pr2 x))
  (λ n : nat,
   (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
   → (⟦ pr1 (pr1 x) + (pr2 (pr1 x) + pr2 x) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ pr1 (pr1 x) + (pr2 (pr1 x) + pr2 x) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc (pr1 (pr1 x)) (pr2 (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))
· sumfn (pr1 (pr1 f)) (sumfn (pr2 (pr1 f)) (pr2 f))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
∏
f : (((⟦ pr1 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)) ⟧)%stn
      → (⟦ pr1 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')) ⟧)%stn)
     × ((⟦ pr2 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)) ⟧)%stn
        → (⟦ pr2 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')) ⟧)%stn))
    × ((⟦ pr2 ((n,, m),, k) ⟧)%stn
       → (⟦ pr2 ((n',, m'),, k') ⟧)%stn),
sumfn (sumfn (pr1 (pr1 f)) (pr2 (pr1 f))) (pr2 f)
· internal_paths_rew_r nat (n' + m' + k')
    (n' + (m' + k'))
    (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
    (idfun (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
    (natplusassoc n' m' k') =
internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn) (natplusassoc n m k)
· sumfn (pr1 (pr1 f)) (sumfn (pr2 (pr1 f)) (pr2 f))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
∏
f : (((⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn)
     × ((⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn))
    × ((⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn),
sumfn (sumfn (pr1 (pr1 f)) (pr2 (pr1 f))) (pr2 f)
· internal_paths_rew_r nat (n' + m' + k')
    (n' + (m' + k'))
    (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
    (idfun (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
    (natplusassoc n' m' k') =
internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn) (natplusassoc n m k)
· sumfn (pr1 (pr1 f)) (sumfn (pr2 (pr1 f)) (pr2 f))
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
sumfn
  (sumfn (pr1 (pr1 ((f,, g),, h)))
     (pr2 (pr1 ((f,, g),, h)))) (pr2 ((f,, g),, h))
· internal_paths_rew_r nat (n' + m' + k')
    (n' + (m' + k'))
    (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
    (idfun (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
    (natplusassoc n' m' k') =
internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn) (natplusassoc n m k)
· sumfn (pr1 (pr1 ((f,, g),, h)))
    (sumfn (pr2 (pr1 ((f,, g),, h)))
       (pr2 ((f,, g),, h)))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
pr2 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) (n + m + k)
  (n' + m' + k') (n' + (m' + k'))
  (sumfn
     (sumfn (pr1 (pr1 ((f,, g),, h)))
        (pr2 (pr1 ((f,, g),, h)))) (pr2 ((f,, g),, h)))
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n' + m' + k')
     (n' + (m' + k'))
     (λ n : nat,
      (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (natplusassoc n' m' k')) =
pr2 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) (n + m + k)
  (n + (m + k)) (n' + (m' + k'))
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
     (natplusassoc n m k))
  (sumfn (pr1 (pr1 ((f,, g),, h)))
     (sumfn (pr2 (pr1 ((f,, g),, h)))
        (pr2 ((f,, g),, h))))
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
(internal_paths_rew_r nat (n' + m' + k')
   (n' + (m' + k'))
   (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
   (idfun (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
   (natplusassoc n' m' k') ∘ sumfn (sumfn f g) h)%functions =
(sumfn f (sumfn g h)
 ∘ internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
     (natplusassoc n m k))%functions

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
∏ x : (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat (n' + m' + k')
      (n' + (m' + k'))
      (λ n : nat,
       (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
      (natplusassoc n' m' k') ∘ sumfn (sumfn f g) h)%functions
     x) =
pr1
  ((sumfn f (sumfn g h)
    ∘ internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + m + k)
        (n + (m + k))
        (λ n0 : nat,
         (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc n m k))%functions x)
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
∏ x : (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n' + m' + k')
     (n' + (m' + k'))
     (λ n : nat,
      (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (natplusassoc n' m' k') (sumfn (sumfn f g) h x)) =
pr1
  (sumfn f (sumfn g h)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + m + k)
        (n + (m + k))
        (λ n0 : nat,
         (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc n m k) x))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n' + m' + k')
     (n' + (m' + k'))
     (λ n : nat,
      (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (natplusassoc n' m' k')
     (sumfn (sumfn f g) h (xval,, xbd))) =
pr1
  (sumfn f (sumfn g h)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + m + k)
        (n + (m + k))
        (λ n0 : nat,
         (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc n m k) (xval,, xbd)))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n' + m' + k') (n' + (m' + k'))
     (λ n : nat,
      (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (natplusassoc n' m' k')
     (sumfn (sumfn f g) h (xval,, xbd))) =
pr1
  (sumfn f (sumfn g h)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
        (λ n0 : nat,
         (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc n m k) 
        (xval,, xbd)))
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n' + m' + k') (n' + m' + k')
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (idpath (n' + m' + k'))
     (sumfn (sumfn f g) h (xval,, xbd))) =
pr1
  (sumfn f (sumfn g h)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
        (λ n0 : nat,
         (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc n m k) 
        (xval,, xbd)))
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
pr1 (sumfn (sumfn f g) h (xval,, xbd)) =
pr1
  (sumfn f (sumfn g h)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
        (λ n0 : nat,
         (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc n m k) 
        (xval,, xbd)))

  (* We go by cases depending on the value of x *)
  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (xval,, xbd < n + m)
            ⨿ (xval,, xbd ≥ n + m),
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : xval,, xbd < n + m,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n < n)
                  ⨿ (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n ≥ n),
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n <
                        n,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       less_n0)) 
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n ≥ n,
            ordconstr
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    geq_n) + n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, n < n' + m')
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) m' n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
           (natlthorgeh (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
              n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n < n)
                     ⨿ (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n
                        ≥ n), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : 
                  pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n < n,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n ≥ n,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat, n < n' + m')
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) m' n'
                       (stnlt
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
              (natlthorgeh
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) n))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n <
                        n)
                        ⨿ 
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n
                        ≥ n), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : 
                     pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n < n,
                  ordconstr
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                        (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n ≥ n,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                        g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                       (λ n : nat, n < n' + m')
                       (natlthandplusl
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        m' n'
                        (stnlt
                        (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        n')))
                 (natlthorgeh
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) n)))))
     (λ geq_n : xval,, xbd ≥ n + m,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, n < n' + m' + k')
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m'))))
     (natlthorgeh (xval,, xbd) (n + m))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
               (n + m + k) 
               (n + (m + k))
               (λ n0 : nat,
                (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
               (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
               (natplusassoc n m k) 
               (xval,, xbd) < n)
            ⨿ (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (n + m + k) 
                 (n + (m + k))
                 (λ n0 : nat,
                  (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                 (natplusassoc n m k) 
                 (xval,, xbd) ≥ n),
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                   (n + m + k) 
                   (n + (m + k))
                   (λ n0 : nat,
                    (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn
                    → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                   (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                   (natplusassoc n m k) 
                   (xval,, xbd) < n,
      ordconstr
        (f
           (pr_n_m_l
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (n + m + k) 
                 (n + (m + k))
                 (λ n0 : nat,
                  (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                 (natplusassoc n m k) 
                 (xval,, xbd)) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n' + (m' + k')) n'
           (f
              (pr_n_m_l
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                    (n + m + k) 
                    (n + (m + k))
                    (λ n0 : nat,
                     (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn
                     → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                    (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                    (natplusassoc n m k) 
                    (xval,, xbd)) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n' (m' + k'))
           (stnlt
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ

                        m' (stnlt (h (...))))
                        (natpluscomm
                        (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) m')))
                    (natlthorgeh
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                        (n + m + k) 
                        (n + (m + k))
                        (λ 
                        n0 : nat,
                        (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn
                        → 
                        (⟦ n + ... ⟧)%stn)
                        (idfun (⟦ n + (...) ⟧)%stn)
                        (natplusassoc n m k)
                        (xval,, xbd)) geq_n) m))))
           (natpluscomm
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (pr_n_m_r
                        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                        (n + m + k) 
                        (n + (m + k))
                        (λ 
                        n0 : nat,
                        (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ ... ⟧)%stn)
                        (idfun (⟦ n + ... ⟧)%stn)
                        (natplusassoc n m k)
                        (xval,, xbd)) geq_n < m)
                        ⨿ 
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                        (n + m + k) 
                        (n + (m + k))
                        (λ 
                        n0 : nat,
                        (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ ... ⟧)%stn)
                        (idfun (⟦ n + ... ⟧)%stn)
                        (natplusassoc n m k)
                        (xval,, xbd)) geq_n ≥ m),
                  (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : 
                     pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                        (n + m + k) 
                        (n + (m + k))
                        (λ 
                        n0 : nat,
                        (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn
                        → 
                        (⟦ n + (...) ⟧)%stn)
                        (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                        (natplusassoc n m k)
                        (xval,, xbd)) geq_n < m,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                        (n + m + k) 
                        (n + (...))
                        (λ n0 : nat, ...%stn → ...%stn)
                        (idfun (...)%stn)
                        (natplusassoc n m k)
                        (xval,, xbd)) geq_n) less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                        (...) 
                        (...) 
                        (...) 
                        (...) 
                        (...) 
                        (...)) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                        (n + m + k) 
                        (n + (m + k))
                        (λ 
                        n0 : nat,
                        (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn
                        → 
                        (⟦ n + (...) ⟧)%stn)
                        (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                        (natplusassoc n m k)
                        (xval,, xbd)) geq_n ≥ m,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                        (... + k) 
                        (n + ...) 
                        (λ ..., ...) 
                        (idfun ...%stn)
                        (natplusassoc n m k)
                        (xval,, xbd)) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (internal_paths_rew_r nat ...
                        ... ... ... ... ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0) + m')
                       (m' +
                        h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (internal_paths_rew_r nat ...
                        ... ... ... ... ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0))
                       (λ n : nat, n < m' + k')
                       (natlthandplusl
                        (h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                        k' m'
                        (stnlt
                        (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                        (h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                        m')))
                 (natlthorgeh
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                        (n + m + k) 
                        (n + (m + k))
                        (λ 
                        n0 : nat,
                        (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn
                        → 
                        (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                        (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                        (natplusassoc n m k)
                        (xval,, xbd)) geq_n) m)) n')))
     (natlthorgeh
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
           (λ n0 : nat,
            (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
           (natplusassoc n m k) 
           (xval,, xbd)) n))
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb xval m
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       less_n0)) 
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m => natgtb xval m
                      end = true,
            ordconstr
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    geq_n) + n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) m' n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
           (natlthorgeh xval n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m => natgtb xval m
                        end = true), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m => natgtb xval m
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) m' n'
                       (stnlt
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
              (natlthorgeh xval n))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                        ⨿ 
                        (match n with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m => natgtb xval m
                        end = true), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
                  ordconstr

                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)

                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                        (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb xval m
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                        g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                       (λ 
                        n : nat,
                        natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                        (g

                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        m' n'
                        (stnlt
                        (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        n'))) 
                 (natlthorgeh xval n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb n
               (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                  (n + m + k) 
                  (n + (m + k))
                  (λ n0 : nat,
                   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn
                   → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                  (natplusassoc n m k) 
                  (xval,, xbd)) = true)
            ⨿ (match n with
               | 0 => true

                        (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                        (natplusassoc n m k)
                        (xval,, xbd)) m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb n
                   (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                      (n + m + k) 
                      (n + (m + k))
                      (λ 
                       n0 : nat,
                       (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn
                       → 
                       (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                      (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                      (natplusassoc n m k)
                      (xval,, xbd)) = true,
      ordconstr
        (f
           (pr_n_m_l
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (n + m + k) 
                 (n + (m + k))
                 (λ n0 : nat,
                  (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                 (natplusassoc n m k)

        (natgehgthtrans (n' + (m' + k')) n'
           (f
              (pr_n_m_l
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                    (n + m + k) 
                    (n + (m + k))
                    (λ n0 : nat,
                     (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn
                     → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                    (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                    (natplusassoc n m k) 
                    (xval,, xbd)) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n' (m' + k'))
           (stnlt
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k)

                       (λ

                        (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn

     (λ geq_n : match n with

                        (xval,, xbd)) m0

        (coprod_rect

                     | 0 => true

                        (internal_paths_rew_r nat

            (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n : natgtb m
                        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                        (n + m + k)

                        (λ 
                        n0 : nat,
                        (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn

                 (pr_n_m_l

                        (n + m + k)

                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (internal_paths_rew_r nat

                        (n + (m + k))
                        (λ 
                        n0 : nat,

                        (idfun (⟦ ... ⟧)%stn)
                        (natplusassoc n m k)
                        (xval,, xbd)) geq_n) less_n))
                 (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                 (stnlt

                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (internal_paths_rew_r nat

           (λ geq_n0 : match m with

           (natlthorgeh

                 (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
                 (natplusassoc n m k)

        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m
                        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                        (n + m + k) 
                        (n + (m + k))
                        (λ 
                        n0 : nat,
                        (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ ... ⟧)%stn)
                        (idfun (⟦ n + ... ⟧)%stn)
                        (natplusassoc n m k)
                        (xval,, xbd) - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                        | 0 => true

                        (λ n0 : nat, ...%stn → ...%stn)
                        (idfun (...)%stn)
                        (natplusassoc n m k)
                        (xval,, xbd) - n) m0
                        end = true), 
               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n : 
                  natgtb m
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ 
                        n0 : nat,
                        (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn

           (xval,, xbd)) n))


  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb xval m
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       less_n0)) 
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m => natgtb xval m
                      end = true,
            ordconstr
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    geq_n) + n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) m' n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
           (natlthorgeh xval n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m => natgtb xval m
                        end = true), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m => natgtb xval m
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) m' n'
                       (stnlt
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
              (natlthorgeh xval n))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                        ⨿ 
                        (match n with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m => natgtb xval m
                        end = true), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                        (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb xval m
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                        g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                       (λ 
                        n : nat,
                        natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        m' n'
                        (stnlt
                        (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        n'))) 
                 (natlthorgeh xval n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb n (QQ (xval,, xbd)) = true)
            ⨿ (match n with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb (QQ (xval,, xbd)) m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb n (QQ (xval,, xbd)) = true,
      ordconstr
        (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ (xval,, xbd)) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n' + (m' + k')) n'
           (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ (xval,, xbd)) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n' (m' + k'))
           (stnlt
              (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ (xval,, xbd)) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb (QQ (xval,, xbd)) m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =
                   true)
                  ⨿ (match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 =>
                        natgtb 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)

                       true,
            ordconstr
              (g

                    (pr_n_m_r (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                    less_n))

                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r

                       less_n)) 
                 (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                 (stnlt
                    (g

                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        less_n)))))
           (λ geq_n0 : match m with

                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m0

            ordconstr

                 (m' +

                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)

                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)

                    (h

                        geq_n0)) k' m'
                    (stnlt

                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        geq_n0)) m')))
           (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m) + n')
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =
                      true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                        | 0 => true

                  true,
               ordconstr

                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (m' + k') m'

                    (stnlt
                       (g

              (λ geq_n0 :

                    (m' +

                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)

              (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m) +
            n')
           (n' +
            coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =

              (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m))
           (λ n : nat,
            natgtb (n' + (m' + k')) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (natgtb m
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) = true)
                        ⨿

                    (natgehgthtrans

                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with

                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat

                        geq_n0) + m')
                       (m' +
                        h

                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                        n : nat,

                        (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))

                        (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                        m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m))
              (m' + k') n'
              (stnlt
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : 
                        (natgtb m
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) = true)
                        ⨿ 
                        (match m with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m0 =>
                        natgtb (QQ ... - n) m0
                        end = true), 
                     (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                    (λ less_n :

                        true,

                        m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m))
              n'))) (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd)) n))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xval < n + (m + k)
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb xval m
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       less_n0)) 
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m => natgtb xval m
                      end = true,
            ordconstr
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    geq_n) + n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) m' n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
           (natlthorgeh xval n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m => natgtb xval m
                        end = true), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m => natgtb xval m
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) m' n'
                       (stnlt
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
              (natlthorgeh xval n))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                        ⨿ 
                        (match n with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m => natgtb xval m
                        end = true), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                        (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb xval m
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                        g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                       (λ 
                        n : nat,
                        natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        m' n'
                        (stnlt
                        (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        n'))) 
                 (natlthorgeh xval n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb n (QQ (xval,, xbd)) = true)
            ⨿ (match n with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb (QQ (xval,, xbd)) m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb n (QQ (xval,, xbd)) = true,
      ordconstr
        (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ (xval,, xbd)) less_n))

           (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ (xval,, xbd)) less_n))

                | 0 => true

                        natgtb

                        geq_n0)) k' m'
                    (stnlt

                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        geq_n0)) m')))
           (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m) + n')
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =

                 (natgehgthtrans

                    (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                    (stnlt

              (λ geq_n0 :

                    (m' +

                        geq_n0))

              (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m) +
            n')
           (n' +
            coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =

              (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m))
           (λ n : nat,

           (natlthandplusl
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (natgtb m

                    (natgehgthtrans

                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with

                       (m' +

                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0))

                        m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m))
              (m' + k') n'
              (stnlt

                    (λ _ : 
                        (natgtb m
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) = true)
                        ⨿

                        | 0 => true

                        true,

                    (natlthorgeh

           (natpluscomm
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (natgtb m

                 (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m))

n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xval < n + (m + k)

f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn

xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xval < n + m + k
 exact xbd. 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb xval m
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       less_n0)) 
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m => natgtb xval m
                      end = true,
            ordconstr
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    geq_n) + n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) m' n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
           (natlthorgeh xval n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m => natgtb xval m
                        end = true), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m => natgtb xval m
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) m' n'
                       (stnlt
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
              (natlthorgeh xval n))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                        ⨿ 
                        (match n with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m => natgtb xval m
                        end = true), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                        (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb xval m
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                        g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                       (λ 
                        n : nat,
                        natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        m' n'
                        (stnlt
                        (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        n'))) 
                 (natlthorgeh xval n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb n (QQ (xval,, xbd)) = true)
            ⨿ (match n with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb (QQ (xval,, xbd)) m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb n (QQ (xval,, xbd)) = true,
      ordconstr
        (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ (xval,, xbd)) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n' + (m' + k')) n'
           (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ (xval,, xbd)) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n' (m' + k'))
           (stnlt
              (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ (xval,, xbd)) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb (QQ (xval,, xbd)) m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =
                   true)
                  ⨿ (match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 =>
                        natgtb 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n : natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =
                       true,
            ordconstr
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (pr_n_m_r (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                    less_n))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (m' + k') m'
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                       less_n)) 
                 (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                 (stnlt
                    (g

                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        less_n)))))
           (λ geq_n0 : match m with
                       | 0 => true

                        natgtb 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m0

            ordconstr
              (h

                    geq_n0) + m')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (h

                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                       geq_n0) + m')
                 (m' +

                       (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                       geq_n0))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)

                    (h

                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        geq_n0)) k' m'
                    (stnlt
                       (h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        geq_n0)) m')))
           (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m) + n')
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =
                      true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m0 =>

                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m0

               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n :

                  true,
               ordconstr
                 (g

                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                       less_n))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (m' + k') m'
                    (g

                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        less_n)) 
                    (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_l

                        less_n)))))
              (λ geq_n0 :

                    (m' +

                    (λ n : nat,

                        geq_n0)) k' m'

                        (pr_n_m_r ... geq_n) geq_n0))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0)) m')))
              (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m) +
            n')
           (n' +
            coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =
                      true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                        | 0 => true

                        end = true), 
               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n : 
                  natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =
                  true,

                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (m' + k') m'

                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)

                    (stnlt

                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)

                        geq_n0)) m')))
              (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m))
           (λ n : nat,
            natgtb (n' + (m' + k')) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (natgtb m
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) = true)
                        ⨿ 
                        (match m with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m0 =>

                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m0
                        end = true), 
                  (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n :

                     true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)

                    (natgehgthtrans

                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true

                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        geq_n0) + m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0) + m')
                       (m' +
                        h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                        n : nat,
                        natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                        (h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                        k' m'
                        (stnlt

                       (natpluscomm

                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                        m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m))
              (m' + k') n'
              (stnlt
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : 
                        (natgtb m
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) = true)
                        ⨿ 
                        (match m with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m0 =>
                        natgtb (QQ ... - n) m0
                        end = true), 
                     (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                    (λ less_n :

                        true,

                       (g

                        geq_n0) + m')

                        (pr_n_m_r ... geq_n) geq_n0) +
                        m')

                    (natlthorgeh

                 (λ _ : (natgtb m
