                        m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m))
              n'))) (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd)) n))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
j: QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb xval m
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       less_n0)) 
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m => natgtb xval m
                      end = true,
            ordconstr
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    geq_n) + n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) m' n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
           (natlthorgeh xval n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m => natgtb xval m
                        end = true), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m => natgtb xval m
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) m' n'
                       (stnlt
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
              (natlthorgeh xval n))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                        ⨿ 
                        (match n with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m => natgtb xval m
                        end = true), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                        (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb xval m
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                        g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                       (λ 
                        n : nat,
                        natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        m' n'
                        (stnlt
                        (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        n'))) 
                 (natlthorgeh xval n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb n (QQ (xval,, xbd)) = true)
            ⨿ (match n with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb (QQ (xval,, xbd)) m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb n (QQ (xval,, xbd)) = true,
      ordconstr
        (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ (xval,, xbd)) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n' + (m' + k')) n'
           (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ (xval,, xbd)) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n' (m' + k'))
           (stnlt
              (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ (xval,, xbd)) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb (QQ (xval,, xbd)) m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =
                   true)
                  ⨿ (match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 =>
                        natgtb 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n : natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =
                       true,
            ordconstr
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (pr_n_m_r (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                    less_n))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (m' + k') m'
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                       less_n)) 
                 (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        less_n)))))
           (λ geq_n0 : match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 =>
                        natgtb 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m0
                       end = true,
            ordconstr
              (h

                    (pr_n_m_r (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                    geq_n0) + m')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (h

                       (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                       geq_n0) + m')
                 (m' +
                  h
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                       geq_n0))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        geq_n0)) k' m'
                    (stnlt
                       (h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        geq_n0)) m')))
           (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m) + n')
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =
                      true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m0 =>
                        natgtb 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m0
                        end = true), 
               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n : 
                  natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =
                  true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                       less_n))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (m' + k') m'
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        less_n)) 
                    (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        less_n)))))
              (λ geq_n0 : 
                  match m with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 =>
                      natgtb (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r

                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                       geq_n0) + m')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ (...)) geq_n)
                        geq_n0) + m')
                    (m' +
                     h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ (...)) geq_n)
                        geq_n0))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0)) k' m'
                       (stnlt

                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (pr_n_m_r ... geq_n) geq_n0))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0)) m')))
              (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m) +
            n')
           (n' +
            coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =
                      true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m0 =>
                        natgtb 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m0
                        end = true), 
               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n : 
                  natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =
                  true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                       less_n))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (m' + k') m'
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        less_n)) 
                    (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        less_n)))))
              (λ geq_n0 : 
                  match m with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 =>
                      natgtb (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m0

               ordconstr
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                       geq_n0) + m')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ (...)) geq_n)
                        geq_n0) + m')
                    (m' +
                     h

                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ (...)) geq_n)
                        geq_n0))
                    (λ n : nat,

                       (h

                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0)) k' m'
                       (stnlt
                        (h
                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (pr_n_m_r ... geq_n) geq_n0))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0)) m')))
              (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m))
           (λ n : nat,
            natgtb (n' + (m' + k')) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (natgtb m
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) = true)
                        ⨿ 
                        (match m with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m0 =>
                        natgtb 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m0
                        end = true), 
                  (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : 
                     natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =
                     true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ (...)) geq_n)
                        less_n)) 
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')

                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 =>
                        natgtb 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        geq_n0) + m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0) + m')
                       (m' +
                        h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                        n : nat,
                        natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                        (h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                        k' m'
                        (stnlt

                       (natpluscomm

                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                        m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m))
              (m' + k') n'
              (stnlt
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : 
                        (natgtb m
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) = true)
                        ⨿ 
                        (match m with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m0 =>
                        natgtb (QQ ... - n) m0
                        end = true), 
                     (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                    (λ less_n : 
                        natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =
                        true,
                     ordconstr
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ (...)) geq_n)
                        less_n))
                       (natgehgthtrans

                        (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) less_n))

                    (λ geq_n0 :

                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0) + m')
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat

                        (pr_n_m_r ... geq_n) geq_n0) +
                        m')
                        (m' +
                        h

                        m' (stnlt (h (...))))
                        (natpluscomm
                        (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) m')))
                    (natlthorgeh 
                       (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m))))
           (natpluscomm
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (natgtb m
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) = true)
                        ⨿ 
                        (match m with

                        end = true),

                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with

                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r

                        geq_n0) + m')

                        geq_n0) + m')
                       (m' +

                        geq_n0))

                        n : nat,

                       (natlthandplusl

                        k' m'
                        (stnlt

                       (natpluscomm
                        (h
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                        m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m))
              n'))) (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd)) n))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
pr1 (QQ (xval,, xbd)) = pr1 (xval,, xbd')
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + m + k)
  (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn) 
  (idpath (n + m + k)): (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
xbd': xval < n + m + k
pr1 (QQ (xval,, xbd)) = pr1 (xval,, xbd')
 reflexivity. 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
j: QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb xval m
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       less_n0))

                 (stnlt

                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m => natgtb xval m
                      end = true,

              (g

                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    geq_n) + n')

                    (stnlt

                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)

                 (natpluscomm
                    (g

                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
           (natlthorgeh xval n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m => natgtb xval m

               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,

                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')

                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n :

                  | S m => natgtb xval m
                  end = true,

                 (g

                       geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g

                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,

                       (g

                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) m' n'
                       (stnlt
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g

                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
              (natlthorgeh xval n))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                        ⨿ 
                        (match n with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m => natgtb xval m

                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,

                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)

                    (natgehgthtrans

                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                        (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb xval m
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                        g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                       (λ 
                        n : nat,
                        natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                        (g

                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        m' n'
                        (stnlt
                        (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        n'))) 
                 (natlthorgeh xval n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))

           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))

  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb n (QQ (xval,, xbd)) = true)
            ⨿ (match n with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb (QQ (xval,, xbd)) m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)

      ordconstr

        (natgehgthtrans (n' + (m' + k')) n'
           (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ (xval,, xbd)) less_n))

                | 0 => true

           (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) =

                    less_n))

                        (pr_n_m_r

                        less_n)))))
           (λ geq_n0 : match m with

                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)

                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        geq_n0)) k' m'

                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)
                        geq_n0))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        geq_n0)) m')))
           (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m) + n')

           (natlthandplusl
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (natgtb m

                    (natgehgthtrans

                 (λ geq_n0 :

                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h

                       (m' +

                    (λ _ : 
                        (natgtb m
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) = true)
                        ⨿

                        | 0 => true
                        | S m0 =>

                        end = true),

              n'))) (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd)) n))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
j: QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb xval m
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       less_n0)) 
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m => natgtb xval m
                      end = true,
            ordconstr
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                    geq_n) + n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) m' n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
           (natlthorgeh xval n))
        (natgehgthtrans (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m => natgtb xval m
                        end = true), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m => natgtb xval m
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g

                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) m' n'
                       (stnlt
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n)) n')))
              (natlthorgeh xval n))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : (natgtb n xval = true)
                        ⨿ 
                        (match n with
                        | 0 => true
                        | S m => natgtb xval m
                        end = true), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n xval = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                        (f
                        (pr_n_m_l
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n)
                        less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb xval m
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                        g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                        geq_n))
                       (λ 
                        n : nat,
                        natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        m' n'
                        (stnlt
                        (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                        (g
                        (pr_n_m_r
                        (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n) geq_n))
                        n'))) 
                 (natlthorgeh xval n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'

           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =

  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb n (QQ (xval,, xbd)) = true)
            ⨿ (match n with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb (QQ (xval,, xbd)) m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)

      ordconstr

           (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ (xval,, xbd)) less_n))

                        (pr_n_m_r (QQ ...) geq_n)

                 (natpluscomm
                    (h

                        (pr_n_m_r 
                        (QQ (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)
                        geq_n0)) m')))
           (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m) + n')
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat

              (natlthorgeh (QQ (xval,, xbd) - n) m))
           (λ n : nat,

           (natlthandplusl
              (coprod_rect
