n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
j: QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
INDXGTN: xval ≥ n
XNGTM: xval ≥ n + m
xval - n ≥ m
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
j: QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
INDXGTN: xval ≥ n
XNGTM: xval ≥ n + m
xval - n ≥ m + n - n

        
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
j: QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
INDXGTN: xval ≥ n
XNGTM: xval ≥ n + m
xval ≥ m + n
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
j: QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
INDXGTN: xval ≥ n
XNGTM: xval ≥ n + m
xval ≥ n + m
 exact XNGTM.
      
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
j: QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
INDXGTN: xval ≥ n
XNGTM: xval ≥ n + m
SS: xval - n ≥ m
h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) XNGTM) + (n' + m') =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb m (xval - n) = true)
         ⨿ (match m with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (xval - n) m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb m (xval - n) = true,
   ordconstr
     (g
        (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
           less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m' + k') m'
        (g
           (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
              less_n)) (natlehnplusnm m' k')
        (stnlt
           (g
              (pr_n_m_l
                 (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
                 less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : match m with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb (xval - n) m
             end = true,
   ordconstr
     (h
        (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
           geq_n) + m')
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (h
           (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
              geq_n) + m')
        (m' +
         h
           (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
              geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
        (natlthandplusl
           (h
              (pr_n_m_r
                 (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
                 geq_n)) k' m'
           (stnlt
              (h
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
                    geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm
           (h
              (pr_n_m_r
                 (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
                 geq_n)) m')))
  (natlthorgeh (xval - n) m) + n'

      
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
j: QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
INDXGTN: xval ≥ n
XNGTM: xval ≥ n + m
SS: xval - n ≥ m
h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) XNGTM) + (n' + m') =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb m (xval - n) = true)
         ⨿ (match m with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (xval - n) m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb m (xval - n) = true,
   ordconstr
     (g
        (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
           less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m' + k') m'
        (g
           (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
              less_n)) (natlehnplusnm m' k')
        (stnlt
           (g
              (pr_n_m_l
                 (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
                 less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : match m with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb (xval - n) m
             end = true,
   ordconstr
     (h
        (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
           geq_n) + m')
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (h
           (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
              geq_n) + m')
        (m' +
         h
           (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
              geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
        (natlthandplusl
           (h
              (pr_n_m_r
                 (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
                 geq_n)) k' m'
           (stnlt
              (h
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
                    geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm
           (h
              (pr_n_m_r
                 (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN)
                 geq_n)) m'))) 
  (inr SS) + n'
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
j: QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
INDXGTN: xval ≥ n
XNGTM: xval ≥ n + m
SS: xval - n ≥ m
h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) XNGTM) + (n' + m') =
h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN) SS) + m' +
n'

      
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
j: QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
INDXGTN: xval ≥ n
XNGTM: xval ≥ n + m
SS: xval - n ≥ m
h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) XNGTM) + (m' + n') =
h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN) SS) +
(m' + n')

      
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
j: QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
INDXGTN: xval ≥ n
XNGTM: xval ≥ n + m
SS: xval - n ≥ m
pr1 (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) XNGTM) =
pr1 (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd') INDXGTN) SS)

      
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
j: QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
INDXGTN: xval ≥ n
XNGTM: xval ≥ n + m
SS: xval - n ≥ m
xval - (n + m) = xval - n - m
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n' ⟧)%stn
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ m' ⟧)%stn
h: (⟦ k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ k' ⟧)%stn
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat,
   (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
  (n + m + k)
xbd': xval < n + (m + k)
j: QQ (xval,, xbd) = xval,, xbd'
INDXGTN: xval ≥ n
XNGTM: xval ≥ n + m
SS: xval - n ≥ m
xval - (n + m) = xval - (n + m)
 reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition tensor_associator_card_nat_trans : nat_trans (assoc_left tensor_functor_card) (assoc_right tensor_functor_card)
  := (tensor_associator_card_nat_trans_data,,tensor_associator_card_is_nat_trans).


nat_trans_data (assoc_left tensor_functor_ord)
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_ord)


nat_trans_data (assoc_left tensor_functor_ord)
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_ord)

  
∏
x : category_binproduct
      (category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd) Δ_sd,
Δ_sd ⟦ assoc_left tensor_functor_ord x,
assoc_right tensor_functor_ord x ⟧
 
x: category_binproduct
  (category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd) Δ_sd
Δ_sd ⟦ assoc_left tensor_functor_ord x,
assoc_right tensor_functor_ord x ⟧
 
n, m, k: Δ_sd
Δ_sd ⟦ assoc_left tensor_functor_ord ((n,, m),, k),
assoc_right tensor_functor_ord ((n,, m),, k) ⟧

  
n, m, k: Δ_sd
Δ_sd
⟦ assoc_left
    (make_functor tensor_data_ord
       tensor_ord_is_functor) ((n,, m),, k),
assoc_right
  (make_functor tensor_data_ord tensor_ord_is_functor)
  ((n,, m),, k) ⟧
 
n, m, k: Δ_sd
monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))

  
n, m, k: Δ_sd
monfunstn (n + (m + k)) (n + (m + k))
 exact (monfunstnid _).
Defined.

Arguments tensor_associator_ord_nat_trans_data /.


is_nat_trans (assoc_left tensor_functor_ord)
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_ord)
  tensor_associator_ord_nat_trans_data


is_nat_trans (assoc_left tensor_functor_ord)
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_ord)
  tensor_associator_ord_nat_trans_data

  
is_nat_trans (assoc_left tensor_functor_ord)
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_ord)
  tensor_associator_ord_nat_trans_data
 
∏
(x
 x' : category_binproduct
        (category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd) Δ_sd)
(f : category_binproduct
       (category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd) Δ_sd ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (assoc_left tensor_functor_ord) f
· internal_paths_rew_r nat
    (pr1 (pr1 x') + pr2 (pr1 x') + pr2 x')
    (pr1 (pr1 x') + (pr2 (pr1 x') + pr2 x'))
    (λ n : nat,
     monfunstn n
       (pr1 (pr1 x') + (pr2 (pr1 x') + pr2 x')))
    (monfunstnid
       (pr1 (pr1 x') + (pr2 (pr1 x') + pr2 x')))
    (natplusassoc (pr1 (pr1 x')) (pr2 (pr1 x'))
       (pr2 x')) =
internal_paths_rew_r nat
  (pr1 (pr1 x) + pr2 (pr1 x) + pr2 x)
  (pr1 (pr1 x) + (pr2 (pr1 x) + pr2 x))
  (λ n : nat,
   monfunstn n (pr1 (pr1 x) + (pr2 (pr1 x) + pr2 x)))
  (monfunstnid (pr1 (pr1 x) + (pr2 (pr1 x) + pr2 x)))
  (natplusassoc (pr1 (pr1 x)) (pr2 (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))
· # (assoc_right tensor_functor_ord) f
 
∏ (x x' : (nat × nat) × nat)
(f : (monfunstn (pr1 (pr1 x)) (pr1 (pr1 x'))
      × monfunstn (pr2 (pr1 x)) (pr2 (pr1 x')))
     × monfunstn (pr2 x) (pr2 x')),
ordinal_hom (pr1 (pr1 x) + pr2 (pr1 x), pr2 x)
  (pr1 (pr1 x') + pr2 (pr1 x'), pr2 x')
  (ordinal_hom (pr1 x) (pr1 x') (pr1 f) #, pr2 f)
· internal_paths_rew_r nat
    (pr1 (pr1 x') + pr2 (pr1 x') + pr2 x')
    (pr1 (pr1 x') + (pr2 (pr1 x') + pr2 x'))
    (λ n : nat,
     monfunstn n
       (pr1 (pr1 x') + (pr2 (pr1 x') + pr2 x')))
    (monfunstnid
       (pr1 (pr1 x') + (pr2 (pr1 x') + pr2 x')))
    (natplusassoc (pr1 (pr1 x')) (pr2 (pr1 x'))
       (pr2 x')) =
internal_paths_rew_r nat
  (pr1 (pr1 x) + pr2 (pr1 x) + pr2 x)
  (pr1 (pr1 x) + (pr2 (pr1 x) + pr2 x))
  (λ n : nat,
   monfunstn n (pr1 (pr1 x) + (pr2 (pr1 x) + pr2 x)))
  (monfunstnid (pr1 (pr1 x) + (pr2 (pr1 x) + pr2 x)))
  (natplusassoc (pr1 (pr1 x)) (pr2 (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))
· ordinal_hom (pr1 (pr1 x), pr2 (pr1 x) + pr2 x)
    (pr1 (pr1 x'), pr2 (pr1 x') + pr2 x')
    (pr1 (pr1 f)
    #, ordinal_hom (pr2 (pr1 x),, pr2 x)
         (pr2 (pr1 x'),, pr2 x') (pr2 (pr1 f),, pr2 f))

  
nmk, n'm'k': (nat × nat) × nat
fgh: (monfunstn (pr1 (pr1 nmk)) (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k'))
 × monfunstn (pr2 (pr1 nmk)) (pr2 (pr1 n'm'k')))
× monfunstn (pr2 nmk) (pr2 n'm'k')
ordinal_hom (pr1 (pr1 nmk) + pr2 (pr1 nmk), pr2 nmk)
  (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k') + pr2 (pr1 n'm'k'), pr2 n'm'k')
  (ordinal_hom (pr1 nmk) (pr1 n'm'k') (pr1 fgh)
  #, pr2 fgh)
· internal_paths_rew_r nat
    (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k') + pr2 (pr1 n'm'k') + pr2 n'm'k')
    (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k') +
     (pr2 (pr1 n'm'k') + pr2 n'm'k'))
    (λ n : nat,
     monfunstn n
       (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k') +
        (pr2 (pr1 n'm'k') + pr2 n'm'k')))
    (monfunstnid
       (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k') +
        (pr2 (pr1 n'm'k') + pr2 n'm'k')))
    (natplusassoc (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k'))
       (pr2 (pr1 n'm'k')) (pr2 n'm'k')) =
internal_paths_rew_r nat
  (pr1 (pr1 nmk) + pr2 (pr1 nmk) + pr2 nmk)
  (pr1 (pr1 nmk) + (pr2 (pr1 nmk) + pr2 nmk))
  (λ n : nat,
   monfunstn n
     (pr1 (pr1 nmk) + (pr2 (pr1 nmk) + pr2 nmk)))
  (monfunstnid
     (pr1 (pr1 nmk) + (pr2 (pr1 nmk) + pr2 nmk)))
  (natplusassoc (pr1 (pr1 nmk)) (pr2 (pr1 nmk))
     (pr2 nmk))
· ordinal_hom (pr1 (pr1 nmk), pr2 (pr1 nmk) + pr2 nmk)
    (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k'), pr2 (pr1 n'm'k') + pr2 n'm'k')
    (pr1 (pr1 fgh)
    #, ordinal_hom (pr2 (pr1 nmk),, pr2 nmk)
         (pr2 (pr1 n'm'k'),, pr2 n'm'k')
         (pr2 (pr1 fgh),, pr2 fgh))
 
n, m, k: nat
n'm'k': (nat × nat) × nat
fgh: (monfunstn (pr1 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)))
   (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k'))
 × monfunstn (pr2 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)))
     (pr2 (pr1 n'm'k')))
× monfunstn (pr2 ((n,, m),, k)) (pr2 n'm'k')
ordinal_hom
  (pr1 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)) + pr2 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)),
  pr2 ((n,, m),, k))
  (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k') + pr2 (pr1 n'm'k'), pr2 n'm'k')
  (ordinal_hom (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)) 
     (pr1 n'm'k') (pr1 fgh) #, 
  pr2 fgh)
· internal_paths_rew_r nat
    (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k') + pr2 (pr1 n'm'k') + pr2 n'm'k')
    (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k') +
     (pr2 (pr1 n'm'k') + pr2 n'm'k'))
    (λ n : nat,
     monfunstn n
       (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k') +
        (pr2 (pr1 n'm'k') + pr2 n'm'k')))
    (monfunstnid
       (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k') +
        (pr2 (pr1 n'm'k') + pr2 n'm'k')))
    (natplusassoc (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k'))
       (pr2 (pr1 n'm'k')) 
       (pr2 n'm'k')) =
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k)
· ordinal_hom
    (pr1 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)),
    pr2 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)) + pr2 ((n,, m),, k))
    (pr1 (pr1 n'm'k'), pr2 (pr1 n'm'k') + pr2 n'm'k')
    (pr1 (pr1 fgh)
    #, ordinal_hom
         (pr2 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)),, pr2 ((n,, m),, k))
         (pr2 (pr1 n'm'k'),, pr2 n'm'k')
         (pr2 (pr1 fgh),, pr2 fgh))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
fgh: (monfunstn (pr1 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)))
   (pr1 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')))
 × monfunstn (pr2 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)))
     (pr2 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k'))))
× monfunstn (pr2 ((n,, m),, k))
    (pr2 ((n',, m'),, k'))
ordinal_hom
  (pr1 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)) + pr2 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)),
  pr2 ((n,, m),, k))
  (pr1 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')) +
   pr2 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')), 
  pr2 ((n',, m'),, k'))
  (ordinal_hom (pr1 ((n,, m),, k))
     (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')) 
     (pr1 fgh) #, pr2 fgh)
· internal_paths_rew_r nat 
    (n' + m' + k') (n' + (m' + k'))
    (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (n' + (m' + k')))
    (monfunstnid (n' + (m' + k')))
    (natplusassoc n' m' k') =
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k)
· ordinal_hom
    (pr1 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)),
    pr2 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)) + pr2 ((n,, m),, k))
    (pr1 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')),
    pr2 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')) + pr2 ((n',, m'),, k'))
    (pr1 (pr1 fgh)
    #, ordinal_hom
         (pr2 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)),, pr2 ((n,, m),, k))
         (pr2 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')),,
          pr2 ((n',, m'),, k'))
         (pr2 (pr1 fgh),, pr2 fgh))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn (pr1 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)))
  (pr1 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')))
g: monfunstn (pr2 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)))
  (pr2 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')))
h: monfunstn (pr2 ((n,, m),, k))
  (pr2 ((n',, m'),, k'))
ordinal_hom
  (pr1 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)) + pr2 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)),
  pr2 ((n,, m),, k))
  (pr1 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')) +
   pr2 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')), 
  pr2 ((n',, m'),, k'))
  (ordinal_hom (pr1 ((n,, m),, k))
     (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')) 
     (pr1 ((f,, g),, h)) #, 
  pr2 ((f,, g),, h))
· internal_paths_rew_r nat 
    (n' + m' + k') (n' + (m' + k'))
    (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (n' + (m' + k')))
    (monfunstnid (n' + (m' + k')))
    (natplusassoc n' m' k') =
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k)
· ordinal_hom
    (pr1 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)),
    pr2 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)) + pr2 ((n,, m),, k))
    (pr1 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')),
    pr2 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')) + pr2 ((n',, m'),, k'))
    (pr1 (pr1 ((f,, g),, h))
    #, ordinal_hom
         (pr2 (pr1 ((n,, m),, k)),, pr2 ((n,, m),, k))
         (pr2 (pr1 ((n',, m'),, k')),,
          pr2 ((n',, m'),, k'))
         (pr2 (pr1 ((f,, g),, h)),, pr2 ((f,, g),, h)))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
ordinal_hom (n + m, k) (n' + m', k')
  (ordinal_hom (n,, m) (n',, m') (f,, g) #, h)
· internal_paths_rew_r nat 
    (n' + m' + k') (n' + (m' + k'))
    (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (n' + (m' + k')))
    (monfunstnid (n' + (m' + k')))
    (natplusassoc n' m' k') =
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k)
· ordinal_hom (n, m + k) 
    (n', m' + k')
    (f #, ordinal_hom (m,, k) (m',, k') (g,, h))
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
# U
  (ordinal_hom (n + m, k) 
     (n' + m', k')
     (ordinal_hom (n,, m) (n',, m') (f,, g) #, h)
   · internal_paths_rew_r nat 
       (n' + m' + k') (n' + (m' + k'))
       (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (n' + (m' + k')))
       (monfunstnid (n' + (m' + k')))
       (natplusassoc n' m' k')) =
# U
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
     (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
     (natplusassoc n m k)
   · ordinal_hom (n, m + k) 
       (n', m' + k')
       (f #, ordinal_hom (m,, k) (m',, k') (g,, h)))
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
# (fget_monoton_functor_data,, fget_monoton_is_functor)
  (ordinal_hom (n + m, k) 
     (n' + m', k')
     (ordinal_hom (n,, m) (n',, m') (f,, g) #, h)
   · internal_paths_rew_r nat 
       (n' + m' + k') (n' + (m' + k'))
       (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (n' + (m' + k')))
       (monfunstnid (n' + (m' + k')))
       (natplusassoc n' m' k')) =
# (fget_monoton_functor_data,, fget_monoton_is_functor)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
     (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
     (natplusassoc n m k)
   · ordinal_hom (n, m + k) 
       (n', m' + k')
       (f #, ordinal_hom (m,, k) (m',, k') (g,, h)))
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
(internal_paths_rew_r nat 
   (n' + m' + k') (n' + (m' + k'))
   (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (n' + (m' + k')))
   (monfunstnid (n' + (m' + k')))
   (natplusassoc n' m' k') ∘ 
 sumfn (sumfn f g) h)%functions =
(sumfn f (sumfn g h)
 ∘ internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
     (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
     (natplusassoc n m k))%functions

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
∏ x : (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat 
      (n' + m' + k') (n' + (m' + k'))
      (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (n' + (m' + k')))
      (monfunstnid (n' + (m' + k')))
      (natplusassoc n' m' k') ∘ 
    sumfn (sumfn f g) h)%functions x) =
pr1
  ((sumfn f (sumfn g h)
    ∘ internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
        (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
        (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
        (natplusassoc n m k))%functions x)
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat 
      (n' + m' + k') (n' + (m' + k'))
      (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (n' + (m' + k')))
      (monfunstnid (n' + (m' + k')))
      (natplusassoc n' m' k') ∘ 
    sumfn (sumfn f g) h)%functions x) =
pr1
  ((sumfn f (sumfn g h)
    ∘ internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
        (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
        (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
        (natplusassoc n m k))%functions x)
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n' + m' + k') (n' + (m' + k'))
     (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (n' + (m' + k')))
     (monfunstnid (n' + (m' + k')))
     (natplusassoc n' m' k') 
     (sumfn (sumfn f g) h x)) =
pr1
  (sumfn f (sumfn g h)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
        (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
        (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
        (natplusassoc n m k) x))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n' + m' + k') (n' + m' + k')
     (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (n' + m' + k'))
     (monfunstnid (n' + m' + k'))
     (idpath (n' + m' + k')) 
     (sumfn (sumfn f g) h x)) =
pr1
  (sumfn f (sumfn g h)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
        (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
        (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
        (natplusassoc n m k) x))
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
pr1 (sumfn (sumfn f g) h x) =
pr1
  (sumfn f (sumfn g h)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
        (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
        (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
        (natplusassoc n m k) x))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < n + m) ⨿ (x ≥ n + m),
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : x < n + m,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (pr_n_m_l x less_n < n)
                  ⨿ (pr_n_m_l x less_n ≥ n),
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : pr_n_m_l x less_n < n,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : pr_n_m_l x less_n ≥ n,
            ordconstr
              (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) +
               n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, n < n' + m')
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                    n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
           (natlthorgeh (pr_n_m_l x less_n) n))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (pr_n_m_l x less_n < n)
                     ⨿ (pr_n_m_l x less_n ≥ n),
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : pr_n_m_l x less_n < n,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : pr_n_m_l x less_n ≥ n,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat, n < n' + m')
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
              (natlthorgeh (pr_n_m_l x less_n) n))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (pr_n_m_l x less_n < n)
                     ⨿ (pr_n_m_l x less_n ≥ n),
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : pr_n_m_l x less_n < n,
                  ordconstr
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : pr_n_m_l x less_n ≥ n,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                       g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                       (λ n : nat, n < n' + m')
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
                 (natlthorgeh (pr_n_m_l x less_n) n)))))
     (λ geq_n : x ≥ n + m,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, n < n' + m' + k')
           (natlthandplusl 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) k' 
              (n' + m') 
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh x (n + m))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
               (n + m + k) 
               (n + (m + k))
               (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
               (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
               (natplusassoc n m k) x < n)
            ⨿ (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (n + m + k) 
                 (n + (m + k))
                 (λ n0 : nat,
                  monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
                 (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
                 (natplusassoc n m k) x ≥ n),
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                   (n + m + k) 
                   (n + (m + k))
                   (λ n0 : nat,
                    monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
                   (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
                   (natplusassoc n m k) x < n,
      ordconstr
        (f
           (pr_n_m_l
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (n + m + k) 
                 (n + (m + k))
                 (λ n0 : nat,
                  monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
                 (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
                 (natplusassoc n m k) x) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + (m' + k')) n'
           (f
              (pr_n_m_l
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                    (n + m + k) 
                    (n + (m + k))
                    (λ n0 : nat,
                     monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
                    (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
                    (natplusassoc n m k) x) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n' (m' + k'))
           (stnlt
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ 
                       n0 : nat,
                       monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
                       (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                  (n + m + k) 
                  (n + (m + k))
                  (λ n0 : nat,
                   monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
                  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
                  (natplusassoc n m k) x ≥ n,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (pr_n_m_r
                     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ 
                       n0 : nat,
                       monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
                       (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x) geq_n <
                   m)
                  ⨿ (pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ 
                       n0 : nat,
                       monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
                       (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x) geq_n
                     ≥ m), 
            (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n : pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ 
                       n0 : nat,
                       monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
                       (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x) geq_n <
                       m,
            ordconstr
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_l
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ 
                       n0 : nat,
                       monfunstn n0 (n + (...)))
                       (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x) geq_n)
                    less_n))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (m' + k') m'
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (...))
                       (monfunstnid (n + ...))
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x) geq_n)
                       less_n)) 
                 (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (... + k) 
                       (n + ...) 
                       (λ ..., ...) 
                       (monfunstnid ...)
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x) geq_n)
                       less_n)))))

n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with

                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 =>
                       natgtb
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (...))
                       (monfunstnid (n + ...))
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (... + k) 
                       (n + ...) 
                       (λ ..., ...) 
                       (monfunstnid ...)
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x) geq_n)
                       geq_n0) + m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat ...
                       ... ... ... ... x) geq_n)
                       geq_n0) + m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat ...
                       ... ... ... ... x) geq_n)
                       geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       k' m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       m')))
                 (natlthorgeh
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ 
                       n0 : nat,
                       monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
                       (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x - n) m))
              (m' + k') n'
              (stnlt
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : 
                       (natgtb m
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (... + k) 
                       (n + ...) 
                       (λ ..., ...) 
                       (monfunstnid ...)
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x - n) =

                       ⨿

                       | 0 => true

                       natgtb
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat ...
                       ... ... ... ... x - n) m0
                       end = true),

                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (...))
                       (monfunstnid (n + ...))
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x - n) =
                       true,
                     ordconstr
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) x) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n)))))
                    (λ geq_n0 : 
                       match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 =>
                       natgtb
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (... + k) 
                       (n + ...) 
                       (λ ..., ...) 
                       (monfunstnid ...)
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x - n) m0
                       end = true,
                     ordconstr
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat ...
                       ... ... ... ... x) geq_n)
                       geq_n0) + m')
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r ... geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r ... geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) k'
                       m' (stnlt (h (...))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) m')))
                    (natlthorgeh
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ 
                       n0 : nat,
                       monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
                       (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x - n) m))))
           (natpluscomm
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb m
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (...))
                       (monfunstnid (n + ...))
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x - n) =
                      true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 =>
                       natgtb
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (... + k) 
                       (n + ...) 
                       (λ ..., ...) 
                       (monfunstnid ...)
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : 
                     natgtb m
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ 
                       n0 : nat,
                       monfunstn n0 (n + (...)))
                       (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x - n) =
                     true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (...))
                       (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 ...)
                       (monfunstnid (...))
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x) geq_n)
                       less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) 
                       (...) x) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true

                       natgtb
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (...))
                       (monfunstnid (n + ...))
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (... + k) 
                       (n + ...) 
                       (λ ..., ...)

                       (natplusassoc n m k) x) geq_n)
                       geq_n0) + m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat

                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat ...
                       ... ... ... ... x) geq_n)
                       geq_n0) + m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat ...
                       ... ... ... ... x) geq_n)
                       geq_n0))
                       (λ

                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h

                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       k' m'
                       (stnlt

                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       m')))
                 (natlthorgeh
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (n + m + k) 
                       (n + (m + k))
                       (λ 
                       n0 : nat,
                       monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
                       (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
                       (natplusassoc n m k) x - n) m))
              n')))
     (natlthorgeh
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
           (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
           (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))
           (natplusassoc n m k) x) n))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (n + m + k)
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                      end = true,
            ordconstr

               n')

                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl

                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                    n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
           (natlthorgeh x n))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,

              (λ geq_n :

                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
              (natlthorgeh x n))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true),

                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,

                       n'

                       (natpluscomm

                 (natlthorgeh x n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))

              (n' + m')

              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh x (n + m))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb n (QQ x) = true)
            ⨿ (match n with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x) m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb n (QQ x) = true,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ x) less_n))

           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ x) less_n)))))

                | 0 => true

                end = true,

                 (natpluscomm

                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                    m'))) 
           (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m) + n')
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat

              (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)

           (n' +
            coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)

              (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m))
           (λ n : nat,
            natgtb (n' + (m' + k')) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl

                    (g

                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       k' m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m)) 
              (m' + k') n'
              (stnlt
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : 
                       (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)
                       ⨿ 
                       (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                     (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                    (λ less_n : 
                       natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true,
                     ordconstr
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n)))))
                    (λ geq_n0 : 
                       match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                       end = true,
                     ordconstr
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r ... geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r ... geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) k'
                       m' (stnlt (h (...))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) m')))
                    (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m))))
           (natpluscomm
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : 
                     natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       k' m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m)) n')))
     (natlthorgeh (QQ x) n))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                      end = true,
            ordconstr
              (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) +
               n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                    n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
           (natlthorgeh x n))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
              (natlthorgeh x n))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                       g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
                 (natlthorgeh x n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) k' 
              (n' + m') 
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh x (n + m))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb n (QQ x) = true)
            ⨿ (match n with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x) m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb n (QQ x) = true,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ x) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + (m' + k')) n'
           (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ x) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n' (m' + k'))
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ x) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x) m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)

                 (natpluscomm

                    m')))

                 (λ less_n :

                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       k' m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m)) n')))
     (natlthorgeh (QQ x) n))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
x < n + (m + k)
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                      end = true,
            ordconstr
              (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) +
               n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                    n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
           (natlthorgeh x n))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
              (natlthorgeh x n))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                       g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
                 (natlthorgeh x n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) k' 
              (n' + m') 
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh x (n + m))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb n (QQ x) = true)
            ⨿ (match n with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x) m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb n (QQ x) = true,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ x) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + (m' + k')) n'
           (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ x) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n' (m' + k'))
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ x) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x) m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)
                  ⨿ (match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)

            ordconstr
              (g

           (λ geq_n0 : match m with

                       end = true,
            ordconstr

                 (m' +

                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)

                    (h

                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                    k' m'
                    (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                    m'))) 
           (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m) + n')
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n : natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (m' + k') m'
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                    (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                    (stnlt

                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n)))))
              (λ geq_n0 : 
                  match m with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                  m')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (m' +
                     h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       k' m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r ... geq_n) geq_n0))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       m')))
              (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m) + n')
           (n' +
            coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n : natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true,
               ordconstr

                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                 (natgehgthtrans

              (λ geq_n0 :

                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r

                     m')
                    (m' +

                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                    (λ n : nat,

                    (natlthandplusl

                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       k' m'
                       (stnlt

                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r ... geq_n) geq_n0))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       m')))
              (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m))
           (λ n : nat,
            natgtb (n' + (m' + k')) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : 
                     natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true,
                  ordconstr

                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'

                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt

                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h

                       m')
                       (m' +

                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl

                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       k' m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m)) 
              (m' + k') n'
              (stnlt
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : 
                       (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)
                       ⨿ 
                       (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                     (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                    (λ less_n : 
                       natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true,
                     ordconstr
                       (g

                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natgehgthtrans

                    (λ geq_n0 :
