                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       k' m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m)) n')))
     (natlthorgeh (QQ x) n))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
QQ x = x'
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
pr1 (QQ x) = pr1 x'
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + m + k)
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + m + k))
  (monfunstnid (n + m + k)) 
  (idpath (n + m + k)): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + m + k)
xbd': x < n + m + k
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
pr1 (QQ x) = pr1 x'
 reflexivity. 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                      end = true,
            ordconstr
              (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) +
               n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                    n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
           (natlthorgeh x n))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
              (natlthorgeh x n))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                       g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
                 (natlthorgeh x n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) k' 
              (n' + m') 
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh x (n + m))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb n (QQ x) = true)
            ⨿ (match n with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x) m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb n (QQ x) = true,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ x) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + (m' + k')) n'
           (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ x) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n' (m' + k'))
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l (QQ x) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x) m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)
                  ⨿ (match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n : natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true,
            ordconstr
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_l 
                    (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (m' + k') m'
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                 (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n)))))
           (λ geq_n0 : match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                       end = true,
            ordconstr
              (h
                 (pr_n_m_r 
                    (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
               m')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                  m')
                 (m' +
                  h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                    k' m'
                    (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                    m'))) 
           (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m) + n')
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n : natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (m' + k') m'
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                    (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n)))))
              (λ geq_n0 : 
                  match m with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                  m')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (m' +
                     h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       k' m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r ... geq_n) geq_n0))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       m')))
              (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m) + n')
           (n' +
            coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n : natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (m' + k') m'
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                    (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n)))))
              (λ geq_n0 : 
                  match m with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                  m')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (m' +
                     h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       k' m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r ... geq_n) geq_n0))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       m')))
              (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m))
           (λ n : nat,
            natgtb (n' + (m' + k')) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : 
                     natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       k' m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m)) 
              (m' + k') n'
              (stnlt
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : 
                       (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)
                       ⨿ 
                       (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                     (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                    (λ less_n : 
                       natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true,
                     ordconstr
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n)))))
                    (λ geq_n0 : 
                       match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                       end = true,
                     ordconstr
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r ... geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r ... geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) k'
                       m' (stnlt (h (...))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) m')))
                    (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m))))
           (natpluscomm
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : 
                     natgtb m (QQ x - n) = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (QQ x - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (QQ x) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       k' m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n) geq_n0))
                       m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (QQ x - n) m)) n')))
     (natlthorgeh (QQ x) n))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                      end = true,
            ordconstr
              (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) +
               n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                    n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
           (natlthorgeh x n))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
              (natlthorgeh x n))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                       g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
                 (natlthorgeh x n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) k' 
              (n' + m') 
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh x (n + m))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb n x' = true)
            ⨿ (match n with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x' m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb n x' = true,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x' less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + (m' + k')) n'
           (f (pr_n_m_l x' less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n' (m' + k'))
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x' less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x' m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb m (x' - n) = true)
                  ⨿ (match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (x' - n) m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n : natgtb m (x' - n) = true,
            ordconstr
              (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (m' + k') m'
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                 (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
           (λ geq_n0 : match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x' - n) m0
                       end = true,
            ordconstr
              (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
               m')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                  m')
                 (m' +
                  h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                    m'
                    (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
           (natlthorgeh (x' - n) m) + n')
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (x' - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x' - n) m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n : natgtb m (x' - n) = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (m' + k') m'
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                    (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
              (λ geq_n0 : 
                  match m with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb (x' - n) m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                  m')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (m' +
                     h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (h

              (natlthorgeh (x' - n) m) + n')

                     ⨿ (match m with

              (natlthorgeh (x' - n) m))
           (λ n : nat,
            natgtb (n' + (m' + k')) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ :

                       m')

                       h

                       (λ

                       (natlthandplusl

                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (x' - n) m)) 
              (m' + k') n'
              (stnlt
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : 
                       (natgtb m (x' - n) = true)
                       ⨿ 
                       (match m with
                       | 0 => true

                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) m')))
                    (natlthorgeh (x' - n) m))))
           (natpluscomm
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb m (x' - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true

     (natlthorgeh x' n))
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                      end = true,
            ordconstr
              (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) +
               n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                    n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
           (natlthorgeh x n))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
              (natlthorgeh x n))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                       g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
                 (natlthorgeh x n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) k' 
              (n' + m') 
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh x (n + m))) =

                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (x - n) m)) 
              (m' + k') n'
              (stnlt
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : 
                       (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                       ⨿ 
                       (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                     (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                    (λ less_n : 
                       natgtb m (x - n) = true,
                     ordconstr
                       (g

                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                       (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g

                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n)))))
                    (λ geq_n0 :

                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0

                       m')

                       (h

                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +

                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))

                       (natlthandplusl

                       m' (stnlt (h (...))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) m')))
                    (natlthorgeh (x - n) m))))
           (natpluscomm
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true

                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (x - n) m)) n')))
     (natlthorgeh x n))


  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
a: x < n
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                      end = true,
            ordconstr
              (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) +
               n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                    n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
           (inl a))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with

                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')

                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  match n with

                  end = true,
               ordconstr

                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g

                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
              (inl a)) (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
                  ordconstr

                    (natgehgthtrans

     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))

                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (x - n) m)) n')))
     (inl a))
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
b: x ≥ n
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                      end = true,
            ordconstr
              (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) +
               n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                    n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
           (inr b))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
              (inr b)) (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                       g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
                 (inr b)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) k' 
              (n' + m') 
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh x (n + m))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
            ⨿ (match n with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb n x = true,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x' less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + (m' + k')) n'
           (f (pr_n_m_l x' less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n' (m' + k'))
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x' less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                  ⨿ (match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
            ordconstr
              (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (m' + k') m'
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                 (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
           (λ geq_n0 : match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true,
            ordconstr
              (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
               m')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                  m')
                 (m' +
                  h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)

                    (h

                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                    m'
                    (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
           (natlthorgeh (x - n) m) + n')
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (m' + k') m'
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                    (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
              (λ geq_n0 : 
                  match m with

                  | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                  m')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (m' +
                     h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                    (λ n : nat,

                    (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
              (natlthorgeh (x - n) m) + n')
           (n' +
            coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (m' + k') m'
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                    (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
              (λ geq_n0 : 
                  match m with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                  m')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (m' +
                     h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
              (natlthorgeh (x - n) m))
           (λ n : nat,
            natgtb (n' + (m' + k')) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (x - n) m)) 
              (m' + k') n'
              (stnlt
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : 
                       (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                       ⨿ 
                       (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                     (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                    (λ less_n : 
                       natgtb m (x - n) = true,
                     ordconstr
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                       (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
