                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n)))))
                    (λ geq_n0 : 
                       match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true,
                     ordconstr
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) k'
                       m' (stnlt (h (...))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) m')))
                    (natlthorgeh (x - n) m))))
           (natpluscomm
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (x - n) m)) n')))
     (inr b))

  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
a: x < n
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                      end = true,
            ordconstr
              (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) +
               n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                    n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
           (inl a))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
              (inl a)) (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                       g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
                 (inl a)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) k' 
              (n' + m') 
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh x (n + m))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
            ⨿ (match n with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb n x = true,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x' less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + (m' + k')) n'
           (f (pr_n_m_l x' less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n' (m' + k'))
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x' less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                  ⨿ (match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
            ordconstr
              (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (m' + k') m'
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                 (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
           (λ geq_n0 : match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true,
            ordconstr
              (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
               m')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                  m')
                 (m' +
                  h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                    m'
                    (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
           (natlthorgeh (x - n) m) + n')
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (m' + k') m'
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                    (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
              (λ geq_n0 : 
                  match m with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                  m')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (m' +
                     h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
              (natlthorgeh (x - n) m) + n')
           (n' +
            coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (m' + k') m'
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                    (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
              (λ geq_n0 : 
                  match m with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                  m')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (m' +
                     h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
              (natlthorgeh (x - n) m))
           (λ n : nat,
            natgtb (n' + (m' + k')) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (x - n) m)) 
              (m' + k') n'
              (stnlt
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : 
                       (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                       ⨿ 
                       (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                     (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                    (λ less_n : 
                       natgtb m (x - n) = true,
                     ordconstr
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                       (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n)))))
                    (λ geq_n0 : 
                       match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true,
                     ordconstr
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) k'
                       m' (stnlt (h (...))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) m')))
                    (natlthorgeh (x - n) m))))
           (natpluscomm
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (x - n) m)) n')))
     (inl a))
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
a: x < n
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (natgehgthtrans 
              (n' + m') n'
              (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))
              (natlehnplusnm n' m')
              (stnlt
                 (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) k' 
              (n' + m') 
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh x (n + m))) = 
f (pr_n_m_l x' a)
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
a: x < n
x < n + m
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
a: x < n
l: x < n + m
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (natgehgthtrans 
              (n' + m') n'
              (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))
              (natlehnplusnm n' m')
              (stnlt
                 (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) k' 
              (n' + m') 
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh x (n + m))) = 
f (pr_n_m_l x' a)

    
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn

  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
a: x < n
x < n + m
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn

  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))

n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))

n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
a: x < n
n + m ≥ n
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
a: x < n
m + n ≥ n
 exact (natlehmplusnm m n).
      
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
a: x < n
n > x
 exact a.
    
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
a: x < n
l: x < n + m
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (natgehgthtrans 
              (n' + m') n'
              (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))
              (natlehnplusnm n' m')
              (stnlt
                 (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) k' 
              (n' + m') 
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh x (n + m))) = 
f (pr_n_m_l x' a)

    
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
a: x < n
l: x < n + m
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (natgehgthtrans 
              (n' + m') n'
              (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))
              (natlehnplusnm n' m')
              (stnlt
                 (f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) a))))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) k' 
              (n' + m') 
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 
              (n' + m')))) 
     (inl l)) = f (pr_n_m_l x' a)
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
a: x < n
l: x < n + m
f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x l) a) = f (pr_n_m_l x' a)

    
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
a: x < n
l: x < n + m
f (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x l) a) = f (pr_n_m_l x' a)
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
a: x < n
l: x < n + m
pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x l) a = pr_n_m_l x' a
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
a: x < n
l: x < n + m
pr1 (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x l) a) = pr1 (pr_n_m_l x' a)
 reflexivity.
  
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
b: x ≥ n
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
            ordconstr
              (f
                 (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (n' + m') n'
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                 (stnlt
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
           (λ geq_n : match n with
                      | 0 => true
                      | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                      end = true,
            ordconstr
              (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) +
               n')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (n' +
                  g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                    n'
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
           (inr b))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
               ordconstr
                 (f
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (n' + m') n'
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                    (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
              (λ geq_n : 
                  match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (n' +
                     g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
              (inr b)) (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (stnlt
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb n x = true)
                     ⨿ (match n with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ n' + m' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n0 : natgtb n x = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (n' + m') n'
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0))
                       (natlehnplusnm n' m')
                       (stnlt
                       (f
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) less_n0)))))
                 (λ geq_n : 
                     match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n) + n')
                       (n' +
                       g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) m'
                       n'
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_l x less_n) geq_n)) n')))
                 (inr b)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) k' 
              (n' + m') 
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh x (n + m))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb n x = true)
            ⨿ (match n with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + (m' + k') ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb n x = true,
      ordconstr (f (pr_n_m_l x' less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + (m' + k')) n'
           (f (pr_n_m_l x' less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm n' (m' + k'))
           (stnlt (f (pr_n_m_l x' less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match n with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                  ⨿ (match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                     end = true), 
            (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
           (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
            ordconstr
              (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
              (natgehgthtrans 
                 (m' + k') m'
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                 (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
           (λ geq_n0 : match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true,
            ordconstr
              (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
               m')
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                  m')
                 (m' +
                  h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                 (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                 (natlthandplusl
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                    m'
                    (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))))
                 (natpluscomm
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
           (natlthorgeh (x - n) m) + n')
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (m' + k') m'
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                    (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
              (λ geq_n0 : 
                  match m with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                  m')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (m' +
                     h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
              (natlthorgeh (x - n) m) + n')
           (n' +
            coprod_rect
              (λ _ : (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
               (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
              (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
               ordconstr
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                 (natgehgthtrans 
                    (m' + k') m'
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                    (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                    (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
              (λ geq_n0 : 
                  match m with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                  end = true,
               ordconstr
                 (h
                    (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                  m')
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (m' +
                     h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                    (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))))
                    (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
              (natlthorgeh (x - n) m))
           (λ n : nat,
            natgtb (n' + (m' + k')) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (x - n) m)) 
              (m' + k') n'
              (stnlt
                 (coprod_rect
                    (λ _ : 
                       (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                       ⨿ 
                       (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                     (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                    (λ less_n : 
                       natgtb m (x - n) = true,
                     ordconstr
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                       (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g (pr_n_m_l (...) less_n)))))
                    (λ geq_n0 : 
                       match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true,
                     ordconstr
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) k'
                       m' (stnlt (h (...))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0)) m')))
                    (natlthorgeh (x - n) m))))
           (natpluscomm
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : 
                     (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
                     ⨿ (match m with
                       | 0 => true
                       | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                       end = true), 
                  (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
                 (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                    (natgehgthtrans 
                       (m' + k') m'
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n))
                       (natlehnplusnm m' k')
                       (stnlt
                       (g
                       (pr_n_m_l 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) less_n)))))
                 (λ geq_n0 : 
                     match m with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
                     end = true,
                  ordconstr
                    (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                     m')
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0) +
                       m')
                       (m' +
                       h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0))
                       (λ 
                       n : nat,
                       natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
                       (natlthandplusl
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) k'
                       m'
                       (stnlt
                       (h (pr_n_m_r (...) geq_n0))))
                       (natpluscomm
                       (h
                       (pr_n_m_r 
                       (pr_n_m_r x' geq_n) geq_n0)) m')))
                 (natlthorgeh (x - n) m)) n')))
     (inr b))
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
x: (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': x < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr x xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ x = x'
b: x ≥ n
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) x = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb x m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) x = true,
      ordconstr
        (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) b) + n')
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) b) + n')
           (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) b) + n')
              (n' + g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) b))
              (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
              (natlthandplusl
                 (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) b))
                 m' n'
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) b))))
              (natpluscomm
                 (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l x less_n) b))
                 n'))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb x m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) k' 
              (n' + m') 
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm 
              (h (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) 
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh x (n + m))) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb m (x - n) = true)
         ⨿ (match m with
            | 0 => true
            | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
            end = true), 
   (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb m (x - n) = true,
   ordconstr (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m' + k') m'
        (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm m' k')
        (stnlt (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : match m with
             | 0 => true
             | S m0 => natgtb (x - n) m0
             end = true,
   ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n) + m')
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n) + m')
        (m' + h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
        (natlthandplusl
           (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n)) k' m'
           (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm
           (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n)) m')))
  (natlthorgeh (x - n) m) + n'
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': xval,, xbd < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) (xval,, xbd) = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m0 => natgtb (xval,, xbd) m0
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) (xval,, xbd) = true,
      ordconstr
        (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
         n')
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (g
              (pr_n_m_r 
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
            n') (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
               n')
              (n' +
               g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b))
              (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
              (natlthandplusl
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) m' n'
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b))))
              (natpluscomm
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) n'))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m0 => natgtb (xval,, xbd) m0
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m'))))
     (natlthorgeh (xval,, xbd) (n + m))) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb m ((xval,, xbd) - n) = true)
         ⨿ (match m with
            | 0 => true
            | S m0 => natgtb ((xval,, xbd) - n) m0
            end = true), 
   (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb m ((xval,, xbd) - n) = true,
   ordconstr (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m' + k') m'
        (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm m' k')
        (stnlt (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : match m with
             | 0 => true
             | S m0 => natgtb ((xval,, xbd) - n) m0
             end = true,
   ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n) + m')
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n) + m')
        (m' + h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
        (natlthandplusl
           (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n)) k' m'
           (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm
           (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n)) m')))
  (natlthorgeh ((xval,, xbd) - n) m) + n'
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': xval,, xbd < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
         n')
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (g
              (pr_n_m_r 
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
            n') (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
               n')
              (n' +
               g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b))
              (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
              (natlthandplusl
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) m' n'
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b))))
              (natpluscomm
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) n'))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb m (xval - n) = true)
         ⨿ (match m with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (xval - n) m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb m (xval - n) = true,
   ordconstr (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m' + k') m'
        (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm m' k')
        (stnlt (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : match m with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb (xval - n) m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n) + m')
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n) + m')
        (m' + h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
        (natlthandplusl
           (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n)) k' m'
           (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm
           (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n)) m')))
  (natlthorgeh (xval - n) m) + n'

    
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': xval,, xbd < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
a: xval - n < m
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
         n')
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (g
              (pr_n_m_r 
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
            n') (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
               n')
              (n' +
               g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b))
              (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
              (natlthandplusl
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) m' n'
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b))))
              (natpluscomm
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) n'))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb m (xval - n) = true)
         ⨿ (match m with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (xval - n) m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb m (xval - n) = true,
   ordconstr (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m' + k') m'
        (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm m' k')
        (stnlt (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : match m with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb (xval - n) m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n) + m')
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n) + m')
        (m' + h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
        (natlthandplusl
           (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n)) k' m'
           (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm
           (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n)) m')))
  (inl a) + n'
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': xval,, xbd < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
b0: xval - n ≥ m
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
         n')
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (g
              (pr_n_m_r 
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
            n') (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
               n')
              (n' +
               g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b))
              (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
              (natlthandplusl
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) m' n'
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b))))
              (natpluscomm
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) n'))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb m (xval - n) = true)
         ⨿ (match m with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (xval - n) m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb m (xval - n) = true,
   ordconstr (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m' + k') m'
        (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm m' k')
        (stnlt (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : match m with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb (xval - n) m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n) + m')
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n) + m')
        (m' + h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
        (natlthandplusl
           (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n)) k' m'
           (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm
           (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n)) m')))
  (inr b0) + n'

    
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))

x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
a: xval - n < m
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
         n')
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (g
              (pr_n_m_r 
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
            n') (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
               n')
              (n' +
               g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b))
              (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
              (natlthandplusl
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) m' n'
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b))))
              (natpluscomm
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) n'))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb m (xval - n) = true)
         ⨿ (match m with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (xval - n) m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb m (xval - n) = true,
   ordconstr (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m' + k') m'
        (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm m' k')
        (stnlt (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : match m with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb (xval - n) m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n) + m')
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n) + m')
        (m' + h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n))

        (natpluscomm
           (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n)) m')))
  (inl a) + n'

         n')
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k')

              (pr_n_m_r 
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
            n') (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              (g

                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
               n')
              (n' +
               g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b))
              (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)

              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
