        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =
g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) a) + n'
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': xval,, xbd < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
a: xval - n < m
l: xval < n + m
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
         n')
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (g
              (pr_n_m_r 
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
            n') (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
               n')
              (n' +
               g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b))
              (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
              (natlthandplusl
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) m' n'
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b))))
              (natpluscomm
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) n'))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =
g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) a) + n'

       
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': xval,, xbd < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
a: xval - n < m
l: xval < n + m
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
         n')
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (g
              (pr_n_m_r 
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
            n') (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
               n')
              (n' +
               g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b))
              (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
              (natlthandplusl
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) m' n'
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b))))
              (natpluscomm
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) n'))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (inl l)) = g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) a) + n'
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': xval,, xbd < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
a: xval - n < m
l: xval < n + m
g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) l) b) + n' =
g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) a) + n'

f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'

  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))

RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
a: xval - n < m
l: xval < n + m
g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) l) b) =
g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) a)

RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'

a: xval - n < m

  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))

xbd': xval,, xbd < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
a: xval - n < m
l: xval < n + m
pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) l) b =

n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': xval,, xbd < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
a: xval - n < m
l: xval < n + m
pr1 (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) l) b) =
pr1 (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) a)
 reflexivity.
    
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': xval,, xbd < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
b0: xval - n ≥ m
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
         n')
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (g
              (pr_n_m_r 
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
            n') (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
               n')
              (n' +
               g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b))
              (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
              (natlthandplusl
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) m' n'
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b))))
              (natpluscomm
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) n'))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb m (xval - n) = true)
         ⨿ (match m with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (xval - n) m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb m (xval - n) = true,
   ordconstr (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (m' + k') m'
        (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm m' k')
        (stnlt (g (pr_n_m_l (pr_n_m_r x' b) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : match m with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb (xval - n) m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n) + m')
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n) + m')
        (m' + h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (m' + k') n = true)
        (natlthandplusl
           (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n)) k' m'
           (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm
           (h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) geq_n)) m')))
  (inr b0) + n'
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': xval,, xbd < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
b0: xval - n ≥ m
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
         n')
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (g
              (pr_n_m_r 
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
            n') (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
               n')
              (n' +
               g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b))
              (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
              (natlthandplusl
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) m' n'
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b))))
              (natpluscomm
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) n'))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =
h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) b0) + m' + n'
 
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': xval,, xbd < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
b0: xval - n ≥ m
xval ≥ n + m
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': xval,, xbd < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
b0: xval - n ≥ m
geq: xval ≥ n + m
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
         n')
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (g
              (pr_n_m_r 
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
            n') (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
               n')
              (n' +
               g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b))
              (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
              (natlthandplusl
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) m' n'
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b))))
              (natpluscomm
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) n'))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =
h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) b0) + m' + n'

g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k

  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': xval,, xbd < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'

b0: xval - n ≥ m
xval ≥ n + m

        exact (natlehandplusr _ _ _ b0).
      
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k
QQ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
  (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
  (natplusassoc n m k): monfunstn (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
xbd': xval,, xbd < n + (m + k)
x':= ordconstr (xval,, xbd) xbd': (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n
b0: xval - n ≥ m
geq: xval ≥ n + m
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
         n')
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (g
              (pr_n_m_r 
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
            n') (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
               n')
              (n' +
               g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b))
              (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
              (natlthandplusl
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) m' n'
                 (stnlt
                    (g
                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b))))
              (natpluscomm
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) n'))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (natlthorgeh xval (n + m))) =
h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) b0) + m' + n'

      
n, m, k, n', m', k': nat
f: monfunstn n n'
g: monfunstn m m'
h: monfunstn k k'
xval: nat
xbd: xval < n + m + k

  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))

RW: QQ (xval,, xbd) = x'
b: xval,, xbd ≥ n

geq: xval ≥ n + m
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (n + m) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match n + m with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ n' + m' + k' ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (n + m) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (g (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
         n')
        (natgehgthtrans 
           (n' + m' + k') 
           (n' + m')
           (g
              (pr_n_m_r 
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
            n') (natlehnplusnm (n' + m') k')
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat
              (g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b) +
               n')
              (n' +
               g
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n) b))
              (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m') n = true)
              (natlthandplusl
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) m' n'

                       (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b))))
              (natpluscomm
                 (g
                    (pr_n_m_r
                       (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)
                       b)) n'))))
     (λ geq_n : match n + m with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr
        (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + (n' + m'))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
            (n' + m'))
           (n' + m' + h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (n' + m' + k') n = true)
           (natlthandplusl
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) k'
              (n' + m')
              (stnlt (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              (h (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
              (n' + m')))) 
     (inr geq)) =
h (pr_n_m_r (pr_n_m_r x' b) b0) + m' + n'

Definition tensor_associator_ord_nat_trans :
  nat_trans (assoc_left tensor_functor_ord) (assoc_right tensor_functor_ord):=
  (tensor_associator_ord_nat_trans_data,, tensor_associator_ord_is_nat_trans).


associator tensor_functor_card


associator tensor_functor_card

  
∑
μ : assoc_left tensor_functor_card
    ⟹ assoc_right tensor_functor_card,
∏
c : category_binproduct
      (category_binproduct Δ_sdg Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg,
is_z_isomorphism (μ c)

  
∏
c : category_binproduct
      (category_binproduct Δ_sdg Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg,
is_z_isomorphism (tensor_associator_card_nat_trans c)

  
n, m, k: Δ_sdg
is_z_isomorphism
  (tensor_associator_card_nat_trans ((n,, m),, k))

  
n, m, k: Δ_sdg
∑
g : Δ_sdg
    ⟦ assoc_right tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k),
    assoc_left tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k) ⟧,
is_inverse_in_precat
  (tensor_associator_card_nat_trans ((n,, m),, k)) g

Δ_sdg ⟦ assoc_right tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k),
assoc_left tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k) ⟧
n, m, k: Δ_sdg
(λ g : Δ_sdg
       ⟦ assoc_right tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k),
       assoc_left tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k) ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (tensor_associator_card_nat_trans ((n,, m),, k)) g)
  ?pr1

Δ_sdg ⟦ assoc_right tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k),
assoc_left tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k) ⟧
 
n, m, k: Δ_sdg
(⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn

    
n, m, k: Δ_sdg
(⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn
 exact (monfunstnid _).
  
n, m, k: Δ_sdg
(λ g : Δ_sdg
       ⟦ assoc_right tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k),
       assoc_left tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k) ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (tensor_associator_card_nat_trans ((n,, m),, k)) g)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn)
     (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) (natplusassoc n m k)
   :
   Δ_sdg
   ⟦ assoc_right tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k),
   assoc_left tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k) ⟧)
 abstract(cbv beta;
    unfold is_inverse_in_precat;
    split;
      simpl; unfold tensor_associator_card_nat_trans_data; simpl;
        induction (natplusassoc n m k); simpl;
        apply fincard_hom_extensionality; reflexivity;
     simpl; unfold tensor_associator_card_nat_trans_data;
      induction (pathsinv0 (natplusassoc n m k));
      simpl; induction (natplusassoc n m k); simpl; apply fincard_hom_extensionality;
      reflexivity).
Defined.

(λ g : Δ_sd
       ⟦ assoc_right tensor_functor_ord ((n,, m),, k),
       assoc_left tensor_functor_ord ((n,, m),, k) ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (tensor_associator_ord_nat_trans ((n,, m),, k)) g)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn (n + (m + k)) n0)
     (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) (natplusassoc n m k)
   :
   Δ_sd
   ⟦ assoc_right tensor_functor_ord ((n,, m),, k),
   assoc_left tensor_functor_ord ((n,, m),, k) ⟧)
 abstract(cbv beta;
    unfold is_inverse_in_precat, tensor_associator_ord_nat_trans,
      tensor_associator_ord_nat_trans_data;
     split;
      simpl; induction (natplusassoc n m k); simpl;
        apply morphism_extensionality; reflexivity;
      simpl; induction (pathsinv0 (natplusassoc n m k));
        simpl; induction (natplusassoc n m k); simpl; apply morphism_extensionality;
        reflexivity).
    }
Defined.


triangle_eq tensor_functor_card tensor_unit
  tensor_left_unitor_card tensor_right_unitor_card
  tensor_associator_card


triangle_eq tensor_functor_card tensor_unit
  tensor_left_unitor_card tensor_right_unitor_card
  tensor_associator_card

  
∏ a b : Δ_sdg,
# tensor_functor_card
  (pr1 tensor_right_unitor_card a #, id b) =
pr1 tensor_associator_card ((a, tensor_unit), b)
· # tensor_functor_card
    (id a #, pr1 tensor_left_unitor_card b)
 
∏ a b : nat,
sumfn (tensor_right_unitor_card_nt_data a) (id b) =
internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) (natplusassoc a 0 b)
· sumfn (id a) (id b)
 
a, b: nat
sumfn (tensor_right_unitor_card_nt_data a) (id b) =
internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) (natplusassoc a 0 b)
· sumfn (id a) (id b)
 
a, b: nat
∏
x : (⟦ functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_fincard
         precat_fincard precat_fincard
         tensor_functor_card 0 a + b ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  (sumfn (tensor_right_unitor_card_nt_data a) (id b) x) =
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
      (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) (natplusassoc a 0 b)
    · sumfn (id a) (id b)) x)

  
a, b: nat
∏
x : (⟦ make_functor tensor_data_card
         tensor_card_is_functor (a,, 0) + b ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  (sumfn
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a)) (id b) x) =
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
      (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) (natplusassoc a 0 b)
    · sumfn (id a) (id b)) x)

  
a, b: nat
∏ x : (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  (sumfn
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a)) (id b) x) =
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
      (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) (natplusassoc a 0 b)
    · sumfn (id a) (id b)) x)

  
a, b: nat
x: (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (sumfn
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a)) (id b) x) =
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
      (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) (natplusassoc a 0 b)
    · sumfn (id a) (id b)) x)
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: xval < a + 0 + b
pr1
  (sumfn
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a)) (id b)
     (xval,, xbd)) =
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
      (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) (natplusassoc a 0 b)
    · sumfn (id a) (id b)) (xval,, xbd))

  
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: xval < a + 0 + b
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (xval,, xbd < a + 0)
            ⨿ (xval,, xbd ≥ a + 0), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : xval,, xbd < a + 0,
      ordconstr
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
                 (natplusr0 a)
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : xval,, xbd ≥ a + 0,
      ordconstr
        ((id b) (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           ((id b) (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + a)
           (a + (id b) (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
           (λ n : nat, n < a + b)
           (natlthandplusl
              ((id b) (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) b
              a
              (stnlt
                 ((id b) (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
           (natpluscomm
              ((id b) (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) a)))
     (natlthorgeh (xval,, xbd) (a + 0))) =
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat 
      (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
      (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
      (natplusassoc a 0 b)
    · (λ x : (⟦ a +
                functor_fix_fst_arg_ob precat_fincard
                  precat_fincard precat_fincard
                  (make_functor tensor_data_card
                     tensor_card_is_functor) 0 b ⟧)%stn,
       coprod_rect
         (λ _ : (x < a) ⨿ (x ≥ a), (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
         (λ less_n : x < a,
          ordconstr ((id a) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
            (natgehgthtrans 
               (a + b) a 
               ((id a) (pr_n_m_l x less_n))
               (natlehnplusnm a b)
               (stnlt ((id a) (pr_n_m_l x less_n)))))
         (λ geq_n : x ≥ a,
          ordconstr ((id b) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + a)
            (internal_paths_rew_r nat
               ((id b) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n) + a)
               (a + (id b) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))
               (λ n : nat, n < a + b)
               (natlthandplusl
                  ((id b) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) b a
                  (stnlt ((id b) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n))))
               (natpluscomm
                  ((id b) (pr_n_m_r x geq_n)) a)))
         (natlthorgeh x a))) 
     (xval,, xbd))
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: xval < a + 0 + b
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a + 0 with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
                 (natplusr0 a)
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
           (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - (a + 0)) b a
              (nat_split xbd geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
     (natlthorgeh xval (a + 0))) =
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat 
      (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
      (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
      (natplusassoc a 0 b)
    · (λ x : (⟦ a +
                functor_fix_fst_arg_ob precat_fincard
                  precat_fincard precat_fincard
                  (make_functor tensor_data_card
                     tensor_card_is_functor) 0 b ⟧)%stn,
       coprod_rect
         (λ _ : (natgtb a x = true)
                ⨿ (match a with
                   | 0 => true
                   | S m => natgtb x m
                   end = true), 
          (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
         (λ less_n : natgtb a x = true,
          ordconstr x
            (natgehgthtrans 
               (a + b) a x 
               (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
         (λ geq_n : match a with
                    | 0 => true
                    | S m => natgtb x m
                    end = true,
          ordconstr (x - a + a)
            (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
               (x - a + a) 
               (a + (x - a))
               (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
               (natlthandplusl 
                  (x - a) b a
                  (nat_split (stnlt x) geq_n))
               (natpluscomm (x - a) a)))
         (natlthorgeh x a))) 
     (xval,, xbd))


  
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: xval < a + 0 + b
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (a + 0 + b)
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a + 0 with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
                 (natplusr0 a)
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
           (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - (a + 0)) b a
              (nat_split xbd geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
     (natlthorgeh xval (a + 0))) =
pr1
  ((QJ
    · (λ x : (⟦ a +
                functor_fix_fst_arg_ob precat_fincard
                  precat_fincard precat_fincard
                  (make_functor tensor_data_card
                     tensor_card_is_functor) 0 b ⟧)%stn,
       coprod_rect
         (λ _ : (natgtb a x = true)
                ⨿ (match a with
                   | 0 => true
                   | S m => natgtb x m
                   end = true), 
          (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
         (λ less_n : natgtb a x = true,
          ordconstr x
            (natgehgthtrans 
               (a + b) a x 
               (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
         (λ geq_n : match a with
                    | 0 => true
                    | S m => natgtb x m
                    end = true,
          ordconstr (x - a + a)
            (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
               (x - a + a) 
               (a + (x - a))
               (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
               (natlthandplusl 
                  (x - a) b a
                  (nat_split (stnlt x) geq_n))
               (natpluscomm (x - a) a)))
         (natlthorgeh x a))) 
     (xval,, xbd))
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: xval < a + 0 + b
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn

  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a + 0 with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)

           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)

           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
                 (natplusr0 a)
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - (a + 0) + a)

           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - (a + 0)) b a
              (nat_split xbd geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
     (natlthorgeh xval (a + 0))) =
pr1
  ((QJ
    · (λ x : (⟦ a +
                functor_fix_fst_arg_ob precat_fincard
                  precat_fincard precat_fincard
                  (make_functor tensor_data_card
                     tensor_card_is_functor) 0 b ⟧)%stn,
       coprod_rect
         (λ _ : (natgtb a x = true)
                ⨿ (match a with
                   | 0 => true
                   | S m => natgtb x m
                   end = true), 
          (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
         (λ less_n : natgtb a x = true,
          ordconstr x
            (natgehgthtrans 
               (a + b) a x 
               (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
         (λ geq_n : match a with
                    | 0 => true
                    | S m => natgtb x m
                    end = true,
          ordconstr (x - a + a)
            (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
               (x - a + a) 
               (a + (x - a))
               (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
               (natlthandplusl 
                  (x - a) b a
                  (nat_split (stnlt x) geq_n))
               (natpluscomm (x - a) a)))
         (natlthorgeh x a))) 
     (xval,, xbd))

  
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: xval < a + 0 + b
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
xval < a + b

xbd: xval < a + 0 + b
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': xval < a + b
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a + 0 with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
                 (natplusr0 a)
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
           (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - (a + 0)) b a
              (nat_split xbd geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
     (natlthorgeh xval (a + 0))) =
pr1
  ((QJ
    · (λ x : (⟦ a +
                functor_fix_fst_arg_ob precat_fincard
                  precat_fincard precat_fincard
                  (make_functor tensor_data_card
                     tensor_card_is_functor) 0 b ⟧)%stn,
       coprod_rect
         (λ _ : (natgtb a x = true)
                ⨿ (match a with
                   | 0 => true
                   | S m => natgtb x m
                   end = true), 
          (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
         (λ less_n : natgtb a x = true,
          ordconstr x
            (natgehgthtrans 
               (a + b) a x 
               (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
         (λ geq_n : match a with
                    | 0 => true
                    | S m => natgtb x m
                    end = true,
          ordconstr (x - a + a)
            (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
               (x - a + a) 
               (a + (x - a))
               (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
               (natlthandplusl 
                  (x - a) b a
                  (nat_split (stnlt x) geq_n))
               (natpluscomm (x - a) a)))
         (natlthorgeh x a))) 
     (xval,, xbd))

xbd: xval < a + 0 + b

  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)

  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': xval < a + b
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a + 0 with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
                 (natplusr0 a)
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
           (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - (a + 0)) b a
              (nat_split xbd geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
     (natlthorgeh xval (a + 0))) =
pr1
  ((QJ
    · (λ x : (⟦ a +
                functor_fix_fst_arg_ob precat_fincard
                  precat_fincard precat_fincard
                  (make_functor tensor_data_card
                     tensor_card_is_functor) 0 b ⟧)%stn,
       coprod_rect
         (λ _ : (natgtb a x = true)
                ⨿ (match a with
                   | 0 => true
                   | S m => natgtb x m
                   end = true), 
          (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
         (λ less_n : natgtb a x = true,
          ordconstr x
            (natgehgthtrans 
               (a + b) a x 
               (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
         (λ geq_n : match a with
                    | 0 => true
                    | S m => natgtb x m
                    end = true,
          ordconstr (x - a + a)
            (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
               (x - a + a) 
               (a + (x - a))
               (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
               (natlthandplusl 
                  (x - a) b a
                  (nat_split (stnlt x) geq_n))
               (natpluscomm (x - a) a)))
         (natlthorgeh x a))) 
     (xval,, xbd))

QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
∏ p : a + 0 + b = a + (0 + b),
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) p 
     (xval,, xbd)) = xval

    
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
∏ p : a + 0 + b = a + b,
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) p 
     (xval,, xbd)) = xval
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
∏ (n : nat) (p : a + 0 + b = n),
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (a + 0 + b) n
     (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n ⟧)%stn) p 
     (xval,, xbd)) = xval
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (a + 0 + b) (a + 0 + b)
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn) 
     (idpath (a + 0 + b)) 
     (xval,, xbd)) = xval
  reflexivity.
  
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: xval < a + 0 + b
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': xval < a + b
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a + 0 with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
                 (natplusr0 a)
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
           (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - (a + 0)) b a
              (nat_split xbd geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
     (natlthorgeh xval (a + 0))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb a (QJ (xval,, xbd)) = true)
            ⨿ (match a with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb (QJ (xval,, xbd)) m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb a (QJ (xval,, xbd)) = true,
      ordconstr (QJ (xval,, xbd))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a 
           (QJ (xval,, xbd)) 
           (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
     (λ geq_n : match a with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb (QJ (xval,, xbd)) m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a + a)
           (a + (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a) b a
              (nat_split 
                 (stnlt (QJ (xval,, xbd))) geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a) a)))
     (natlthorgeh (QJ (xval,, xbd)) a))
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a + 0 with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
                 (natplusr0 a)
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
           (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - (a + 0)) b a
              (nat_split xbd geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
     (natlthorgeh xval (a + 0))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb a (QJ (xval,, xbd)) = true)
            ⨿ (match a with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb (QJ (xval,, xbd)) m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb a (QJ (xval,, xbd)) = true,
      ordconstr (QJ (xval,, xbd))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a 
           (QJ (xval,, xbd)) 
           (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
     (λ geq_n : match a with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb (QJ (xval,, xbd)) m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat
           (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a + a)
           (a + (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a) b a
              (nat_split 
                 (stnlt (QJ (xval,, xbd))) geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a) a)))
     (natlthorgeh (QJ (xval,, xbd)) a))
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a + 0 with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
                 (natplusr0 a)
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
           (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - (a + 0)) b a
              (nat_split xbd geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
     (natlthorgeh xval (a + 0))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb a x' = true)
            ⨿ (match a with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb x' m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb a x' = true,
      ordconstr x'
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a x'
           (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
     (λ geq_n : match a with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb x' m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (x' - a + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (x' - a + a) (a + (x' - a))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (x' - a) b a
              (nat_split (stnlt x') geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (x' - a) a)))
     (natlthorgeh x' a))

  
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
XLA: xval < a + 0
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a + 0 with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
                 (natplusr0 a)
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
           (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - (a + 0)) b a
              (nat_split xbd geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
     (inl XLA)) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb a x' = true)
            ⨿ (match a with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb x' m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb a x' = true,
      ordconstr x'
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a x'
           (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
     (λ geq_n : match a with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb x' m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (x' - a + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (x' - a + a) (a + (x' - a))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (x' - a) b a
              (nat_split (stnlt x') geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (x' - a) a)))
     (natlthorgeh x' a))
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
XGA: xval ≥ a + 0
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a + 0 with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
                 (natplusr0 a)
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
           (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - (a + 0)) b a
              (nat_split xbd geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
     (inr XGA)) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb a x' = true)
            ⨿ (match a with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb x' m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb a x' = true,
      ordconstr x'
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a x'
           (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
     (λ geq_n : match a with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb x' m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (x' - a + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (x' - a + a) (a + (x' - a))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (x' - a) b a
              (nat_split (stnlt x') geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (x' - a) a)))
     (natlthorgeh x' a))

  
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
XLA: xval < a + 0
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a + 0 with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
                 (natplusr0 a)
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
           (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - (a + 0)) b a
              (nat_split xbd geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
     (inl XLA)) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb a x' = true)
            ⨿ (match a with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb x' m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb a x' = true,
      ordconstr x'
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a x'
           (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
     (λ geq_n : match a with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb x' m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (x' - a + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (x' - a + a) (a + (x' - a))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (x' - a) b a
              (nat_split (stnlt x') geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (x' - a) a)))
     (natlthorgeh x' a))
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
XLA: xval < a + 0
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0) a (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a)
  (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) XLA) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb a xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb a xval = true,
      ordconstr xval
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a xval
           (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
     (λ geq_n : match a with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - a + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - a + a) 
           (a + (xval - a))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - a) b a 
              (nat_split XLAB' geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - a) a)))
     (natlthorgeh xval a))

RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'

  (a + 0) a (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)

  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)

RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
XLA: natgtb (a + 0) xval = true
XLA': natgtb a xval = true
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0) (a + 0)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + 0 ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + 0 ⟧)%stn) 
  (idpath (a + 0)) (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) XLA) = xval
 reflexivity.
  
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
XGA: xval ≥ a + 0
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a + 0 with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
                 (natplusr0 a)
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
           (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - (a + 0)) b a
              (nat_split xbd geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
     (inr XGA)) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb a x' = true)
            ⨿ (match a with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb x' m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb a x' = true,
      ordconstr x'
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a x'
           (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
     (λ geq_n : match a with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb x' m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (x' - a + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (x' - a + a) (a + (x' - a))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (x' - a) b a
              (nat_split (stnlt x') geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (x' - a) a)))
     (natlthorgeh x' a))
