           (natpluscomm (xval - a) a)))
     (natlthorgeh xval a))

    
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
XGA: xval ≥ a + 0
XGA': xval ≥ a
xval - (a + 0) + a =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb a xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb a xval = true,
      ordconstr xval
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a xval
           (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
     (λ geq_n : match a with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - a + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - a + a) 
           (a + (xval - a))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - a) b a 
              (nat_split XLAB' geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - a) a))) 
     (inr XGA'))
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
XGA: match a + 0 with
| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb xval m
end = true
XGA': match a with
| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb xval m
end = true
xval - (a + 0) + a = xval - a + a
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn) 
  (natplusassoc a 0 b): (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
XGA: match a + 0 with
| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb xval m
end = true
XGA': match a with
| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb xval m
end = true
xval - a + a = xval - a + a
 reflexivity.
Qed.


triangle_eq tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit
  tensor_left_unitor_ord tensor_right_unitor_ord
  tensor_associator_ord


triangle_eq tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit
  tensor_left_unitor_ord tensor_right_unitor_ord
  tensor_associator_ord

  
∏ a b : Δ_sd,
# tensor_functor_ord
  (pr1 tensor_right_unitor_ord a #, id b) =
pr1 tensor_associator_ord ((a, tensor_unit), b)
· # tensor_functor_ord
    (id a #, pr1 tensor_left_unitor_ord b)
 
∏ a b : nat,
ordinal_hom
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta precat_Delta
     precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord 0 a, b) (a, b)
  (make_monfunstn
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a))
     (λ (x
         y : (⟦ functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta
                  precat_Delta precat_Delta
                  tensor_functor_ord 0 a ⟧)%stn)
      (leq : match
               stntonat
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta
                    precat_Delta precat_Delta
                    tensor_functor_ord 0 a) x
             with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb y m
             end = true),
      paths_rect nat (a + 0)
        (λ (a0 : nat) (p0 : a + 0 = a0),
         match
           stntonat a0
             (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a0
                (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn)
                (idfun (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn) p0 x)
         with
         | 0 => true
         | S m =>
             natgtb
               (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a0
                  (λ n : nat,
                   (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn)
                  (idfun (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn) p0 y) m
         end = true) leq a (natplusr0 a)) #, id b) =
internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b)
· ordinal_hom
    (a,
    functor_fix_fst_arg_ob precat_Delta precat_Delta
      precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord 0 b) (a, b)
    (id a #, id b)
 
a, b: nat
ordinal_hom
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta precat_Delta
     precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord 0 a, b) (a, b)
  (make_monfunstn
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a))
     (λ (x
         y : (⟦ functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta
                  precat_Delta precat_Delta
                  tensor_functor_ord 0 a ⟧)%stn)
      (leq : match
               stntonat
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta
                    precat_Delta precat_Delta
                    tensor_functor_ord 0 a) x
             with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb y m
             end = true),
      paths_rect nat (a + 0)
        (λ (a0 : nat) (p0 : a + 0 = a0),
         match
           stntonat a0
             (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a0
                (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn)
                (idfun (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn) p0 x)
         with
         | 0 => true
         | S m =>
             natgtb
               (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a0
                  (λ n : nat,
                   (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn)
                  (idfun (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn) p0 y) m
         end = true) leq a (natplusr0 a)) #, id b) =
internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b)
· ordinal_hom
    (a,
    functor_fix_fst_arg_ob precat_Delta precat_Delta
      precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord 0 b) (a, b)
    (id a #, id b)
 
a, b: nat
∏
x : (⟦ U
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta
            precat_Delta precat_Delta
            tensor_functor_ord 0 a + b) ⟧)%stn,
# U
  (ordinal_hom
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta precat_Delta
        precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord 0 a, b) (a, b)
     (make_monfunstn
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a))
        (λ (x0
            y : (⟦ functor_fix_snd_arg_ob precat_Delta
                     precat_Delta precat_Delta
                     tensor_functor_ord 0 a ⟧)%stn)
         (leq : match
                  stntonat
                    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob
                       precat_Delta precat_Delta
                       precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord
                       0 a) x0
                with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb y m
                end = true),
         paths_rect nat (a + 0)
           (λ (a0 : nat) (p0 : a + 0 = a0),
            match
              stntonat a0
                (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a0
                   (λ n : nat,
                    (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn)
                   (idfun (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn) p0 x0)
            with
            | 0 => true
            | S m =>
                natgtb
                  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a0
                     (λ n : nat,
                      (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn)
                     (idfun (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn) p0 y) m
            end = true) leq a (natplusr0 a)) #, id b))
  x =
# U
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
     (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
     (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b)
   · ordinal_hom
       (a,
       functor_fix_fst_arg_ob precat_Delta
         precat_Delta precat_Delta tensor_functor_ord
         0 b) (a, b) (id a #, id b)) x

  
a, b: nat
∏
x : (⟦ U
         (make_functor tensor_data_ord
            tensor_ord_is_functor (a,, 0) + b) ⟧)%stn,
# U
  (ordinal_hom
     (make_functor tensor_data_ord
        tensor_ord_is_functor (a,, 0), b) (a, b)
     (make_monfunstn
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a))
        (λ (x0
            y : (⟦ make_functor tensor_data_ord
                     tensor_ord_is_functor (a,, 0) ⟧)%stn)
         (leq : match
                  stntonat
                    (make_functor tensor_data_ord
                       tensor_ord_is_functor (a,, 0))
                    x0
                with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb y m
                end = true),
         paths_rect nat (a + 0)
           (λ (a0 : nat) (p0 : a + 0 = a0),
            match
              stntonat a0
                (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a0
                   (λ n : nat,
                    (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn)
                   (idfun (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn) p0 x0)
            with
            | 0 => true
            | S m =>
                natgtb
                  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a0
                     (λ n : nat,
                      (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn)
                     (idfun (⟦ a0 ⟧)%stn) p0 y) m
            end = true) leq a (natplusr0 a)) #, id b))
  x =
# U
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
     (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
     (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b)
   · ordinal_hom
       (a,
       functor_fix_fst_arg_ob precat_Delta
         precat_Delta precat_Delta
         (make_functor tensor_data_ord
            tensor_ord_is_functor) 0 b) (a, b)
       (id a #, id b)) x
 
a, b: nat
∏ x : (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn,
sumfn
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a))
  (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn) x =
sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
     (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
     (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b) x)

  
a, b: nat
∏ x : (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn,
sumfn
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a))
  (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn) x =
sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
     (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
     (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b) x)
 
a, b: nat
∏ x : (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn,
sumfn
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a))
  (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn) x =
sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
     (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
     (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b) x)

  
a, b: nat
x: (⟦ a + 0 + b ⟧)%stn
sumfn
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a))
  (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn) x =
sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
     (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
     (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b) x)
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: xval < a + 0 + b
sumfn
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0) a
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a))
  (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn) (xval,, xbd) =
sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
     (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
     (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b)
     (xval,, xbd))

  
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: xval < a + 0 + b
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (xval,, xbd < a + 0) ⨿ (xval,, xbd ≥ a + 0),
   (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : xval,, xbd < a + 0,
   ordconstr
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (a + 0) a
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
        (natplusr0 a) (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm a b)
        (stnlt
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : xval,, xbd ≥ a + 0,
   ordconstr
     (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) +
      a)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
           (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n) + a)
        (a +
         idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
           (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < a + b)
        (natlthandplusl
           (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
              (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) b a
           (stnlt
              (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
                 (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm
           (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
              (pr_n_m_r (xval,, xbd) geq_n)) a)))
  (natlthorgeh (xval,, xbd) (a + 0)) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
            (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
            (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
            (monfunstnid (a + b)) 
            (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
            (xval,, xbd) < a)
         ⨿ (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0 + b) 
              (a + b) (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
              (monfunstnid (a + b))
              (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
              (xval,, xbd) ≥ a), 
   (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                (a + 0 + b) 
                (a + b)
                (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
                (monfunstnid (a + b))
                (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
                (xval,, xbd) < a,
   ordconstr
     (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn
        (pr_n_m_l
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0 + b) 
              (a + b) (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
              (monfunstnid (a + b))
              (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
              (xval,, xbd)) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
        (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn
           (pr_n_m_l
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0 + b) 
                 (a + b)
                 (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
                 (monfunstnid (a + b))
                 (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
                 (xval,, xbd)) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm a b)
        (stnlt
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn
              (pr_n_m_l
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                    (a + 0 + b) 
                    (a + b)
                    (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
                    (monfunstnid (a + b))
                    (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
                    (xval,, xbd)) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : internal_paths_rew_r nat 
               (a + 0 + b) 
               (a + b)
               (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
               (monfunstnid (a + b))
               (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
               (xval,, xbd) ≥ a,
   ordconstr
     (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
        (pr_n_m_r
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0 + b) 
              (a + b) (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
              (monfunstnid (a + b))
              (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
              (xval,, xbd)) geq_n) + a)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
           (pr_n_m_r
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0 + b) 
                 (a + b)
                 (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
                 (monfunstnid (a + b))
                 (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
                 (xval,, xbd)) geq_n) + a)
        (a +
         idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
           (pr_n_m_r
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0 + b) 
                 (a + b)
                 (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
                 (monfunstnid (a + b))
                 (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
                 (xval,, xbd)) geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < a + b)
        (natlthandplusl
           (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
              (pr_n_m_r
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                    (a + 0 + b) 
                    (a + b)
                    (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
                    (monfunstnid (a + b))
                    (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
                    (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)) b a
           (stnlt
              (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
                 (pr_n_m_r
                    (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                       (a + 0 + b) 
                       (a + b)
                       (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
                       (monfunstnid (a + b))
                       (natplusassoc a 0 b)
                       (xval,, xbd)) geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm
           (idfun (⟦ b ⟧)%stn
              (pr_n_m_r
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                    (a + 0 + b) 
                    (a + b)
                    (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
                    (monfunstnid (a + b))
                    (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
                    (xval,, xbd)) geq_n)) a)))
  (natlthorgeh
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
        (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
        (monfunstnid (a + b)) 
        (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
        (xval,, xbd)) a)
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: xval < a + 0 + b
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
         ⨿ (match a + 0 with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb xval m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
   ordconstr
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (a + 0) a
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
        (natplusr0 a) (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm a b)
        (stnlt
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb xval m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
        (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (xval - (a + 0)) b a
           (nat_split xbd geq_n))
        (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
  (natlthorgeh xval (a + 0)) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb a
            (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
               (a + 0 + b) 
               (a + b)
               (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
               (monfunstnid (a + b))
               (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
               (xval,, xbd)) = true)
         ⨿ (match a with
            | 0 => true
            | S m =>
                natgtb
                  (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                     (a + 0 + b) 
                     (a + b)
                     (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
                     (monfunstnid (a + b))
                     (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
                     (xval,, xbd)) m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb a
                (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                   (a + 0 + b) 
                   (a + b)
                   (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
                   (monfunstnid (a + b))
                   (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
                   (xval,, xbd)) = true,
   ordconstr
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
        (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
        (monfunstnid (a + b)) 
        (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
        (xval,, xbd))
     (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
           (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
           (monfunstnid (a + b)) 
           (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
           (xval,, xbd)) 
        (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
  (λ geq_n : match a with
             | 0 => true
             | S m =>
                 natgtb
                   (internal_paths_rew_r nat
                      (a + 0 + b) 
                      (a + b)
                      (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
                      (monfunstnid (a + b))
                      (natplusassoc a 0 b)
                      (xval,, xbd)) m
             end = true,
   ordconstr
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
        (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
        (monfunstnid (a + b)) 
        (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
        (xval,, xbd) - a + a)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
           (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
           (monfunstnid (a + b)) 
           (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
           (xval,, xbd) - a + a)
        (a +
         (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
            (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
            (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
            (monfunstnid (a + b)) 
            (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
            (xval,, xbd) - a))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0 + b) 
              (a + b) (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
              (monfunstnid (a + b))
              (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
              (xval,, xbd) - a) b a
           (nat_split
              (stnlt
                 (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                    (a + 0 + b) 
                    (a + b)
                    (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
                    (monfunstnid (a + b))
                    (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
                    (xval,, xbd))) geq_n))
        (natpluscomm
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0 + b) 
              (a + b) (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
              (monfunstnid (a + b))
              (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
              (xval,, xbd) - a) a)))
  (natlthorgeh
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
        (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
        (monfunstnid (a + b)) 
        (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
        (xval,, xbd)) a)

  
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: xval < a + 0 + b
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b)) (a + 0 + b)
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
         ⨿ (match a + 0 with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb xval m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
   ordconstr
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (a + 0) a
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
        (natplusr0 a) (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm a b)
        (stnlt
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb xval m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
        (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (xval - (a + 0)) b a
           (nat_split xbd geq_n))
        (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
  (natlthorgeh xval (a + 0)) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb a (QJ (xval,, xbd)) = true)
         ⨿ (match a with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (QJ (xval,, xbd)) m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb a (QJ (xval,, xbd)) = true,
   ordconstr (QJ (xval,, xbd))
     (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a 
        (QJ (xval,, xbd)) 
        (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
  (λ geq_n : match a with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb (QJ (xval,, xbd)) m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a + a)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a + a)
        (a + (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a) b a
           (nat_split (stnlt (QJ (xval,, xbd))) geq_n))
        (natpluscomm (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a) a)))
  (natlthorgeh (QJ (xval,, xbd)) a)

  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
XLAB': xval < a + b
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
         ⨿ (match a + 0 with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb xval m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
   ordconstr
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (a + 0) a
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
        (natplusr0 a) (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm a b)
        (stnlt
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb xval m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
        (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (xval - (a + 0)) b a
           (nat_split xbd geq_n))
        (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
  (natlthorgeh xval (a + 0)) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb a (QJ (xval,, xbd)) = true)
         ⨿ (match a with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (QJ (xval,, xbd)) m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb a (QJ (xval,, xbd)) = true,
   ordconstr (QJ (xval,, xbd))
     (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a 
        (QJ (xval,, xbd)) 
        (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
  (λ geq_n : match a with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb (QJ (xval,, xbd)) m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a + a)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a + a)
        (a + (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a) b a
           (nat_split (stnlt (QJ (xval,, xbd))) geq_n))
        (natpluscomm (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a) a)))
  (natlthorgeh (QJ (xval,, xbd)) a)
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: xval < a + 0 + b
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
XLAB': xval < a + b
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
         ⨿ (match a + 0 with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb xval m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
   ordconstr
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (a + 0) a
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
        (natplusr0 a) (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm a b)
        (stnlt
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb xval m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
        (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (xval - (a + 0)) b a
           (nat_split xbd geq_n))
        (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
  (natlthorgeh xval (a + 0)) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb a (QJ (xval,, xbd)) = true)
         ⨿ (match a with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (QJ (xval,, xbd)) m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb a (QJ (xval,, xbd)) = true,
   ordconstr (QJ (xval,, xbd))
     (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a 
        (QJ (xval,, xbd)) 
        (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
  (λ geq_n : match a with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb (QJ (xval,, xbd)) m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a + a)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a + a)
        (a + (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a) b a
           (nat_split (stnlt (QJ (xval,, xbd))) geq_n))
        (natpluscomm (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a) a)))
  (natlthorgeh (QJ (xval,, xbd)) a)

x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
         ⨿ (match a + 0 with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb xval m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
   ordconstr
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (a + 0) a
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
        (natplusr0 a) (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm a b)
        (stnlt
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb xval m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
        (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (xval - (a + 0)) b a
           (nat_split xbd geq_n))
        (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
  (natlthorgeh xval (a + 0)) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb a (QJ (xval,, xbd)) = true)
         ⨿ (match a with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (QJ (xval,, xbd)) m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb a (QJ (xval,, xbd)) = true,
   ordconstr (QJ (xval,, xbd))
     (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a 
        (QJ (xval,, xbd)) 
        (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
  (λ geq_n : match a with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb (QJ (xval,, xbd)) m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a + a)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a + a)
        (a + (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (QJ (xval,, xbd) - a) b a

xbd: xval < a + 0 + b
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)

QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: xval < a + 0 + b
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
XLAB': xval < a + b
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
pr1 (QJ (xval,, xbd)) = pr1 x'
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
pr1 (QJ (xval,, xbd)) = xval
  
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
     (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
     (monfunstnid (a + b)) 
     (natplusassoc a 0 b) 
     (xval,, xbd)) = xval
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
∏ p : a + 0 + b = a + (0 + b),
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
     (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
     (monfunstnid (a + b)) p 
     (xval,, xbd)) = xval

    
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
∏ p : a + 0 + b = a + b,
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
     (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
     (monfunstnid (a + b)) p 
     (xval,, xbd)) = xval
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
∏ (n : nat) (p : a + 0 + b = n),
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (a + 0 + b) n (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 n)
     (monfunstnid n) p (xval,, xbd)) = xval
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (a + 0 + b) (a + 0 + b)
     (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + 0 + b))
     (monfunstnid (a + 0 + b)) 
     (idpath (a + 0 + b)) 
     (xval,, xbd)) = xval
  reflexivity.

xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
         ⨿ (match a + 0 with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb xval m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
   ordconstr
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (a + 0) a
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
        (natplusr0 a) (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm a b)
        (stnlt
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb xval m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
        (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (xval - (a + 0)) b a
           (nat_split xbd geq_n))
        (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
  (natlthorgeh xval (a + 0)) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb a x' = true)
         ⨿ (match a with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb x' m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb a x' = true,
   ordconstr x'
     (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a x' 
        (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
  (λ geq_n : match a with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb x' m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (x' - a + a)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (x' - a + a) (a + (x' - a))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (x' - a) b a
           (nat_split (stnlt x') geq_n))
        (natpluscomm (x' - a) a))) 
  (natlthorgeh x' a)

  
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a + 0 with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
                 (natplusr0 a)
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
           (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - (a + 0)) b a
              (nat_split xbd geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
     (natlthorgeh xval (a + 0))) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb a x' = true)
            ⨿ (match a with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb x' m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb a x' = true,
      ordconstr x'
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a x'
           (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
     (λ geq_n : match a with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb x' m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (x' - a + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (x' - a + a) (a + (x' - a))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (x' - a) b a
              (nat_split (stnlt x') geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (x' - a) a)))
     (natlthorgeh x' a))

        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a

              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)

              (xval - (a + 0)) b a

     (λ _ : (natgtb a x' = true)
            ⨿ (match a with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb x' m
               end = true),

     (λ less_n : natgtb a x' = true,

     (λ geq_n : match a with

  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
XLA: xval < a + 0
XLA': xval < a
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0) a (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a)
  (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) XLA) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb a xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb a xval = true,
      ordconstr xval
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a xval
           (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
     (λ geq_n : match a with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - a + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - a + a) 
           (a + (xval - a))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - a) b a 
              (nat_split XLAB' geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - a) a))) 
     (inl XLA'))
 
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
XLA: natgtb (a + 0) xval = true
XLA': natgtb a xval = true
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0) a (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 a)
  (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) XLA) = xval

    
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
XLA: natgtb (a + 0) xval = true
XLA': natgtb a xval = true
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0) (a + 0)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + 0 ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ a + 0 ⟧)%stn) 
  (idpath (a + 0)) (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) XLA) = xval
 reflexivity.
  
a, b, xval: nat
xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))
  (monfunstnid (a + b)) (natplusassoc a 0 b): monfunstn (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
XLAB': natgtb (a + b) xval = true
x':= ordconstr xval XLAB': (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn
RW: QJ (xval,, xbd) = x'
XGA: xval ≥ a + 0
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb (a + 0) xval = true)
            ⨿ (match a + 0 with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb xval m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb (a + 0) xval = true,
      ordconstr
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (a + 0) a
           (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
           (natplusr0 a)
           (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
              (a + 0) a
              (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
              (natplusr0 a)
              (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n))
           (natlehnplusnm a b)
           (stnlt
              (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                 (a + 0) a
                 (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                 (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) 
                 (natplusr0 a)
                 (pr_n_m_l (xval,, xbd) less_n)))))
     (λ geq_n : match a + 0 with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb xval m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (xval - (a + 0) + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (xval - (a + 0) + a) 
           (a + (xval - (a + 0)))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (xval - (a + 0)) b a
              (nat_split xbd geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (xval - (a + 0)) a)))
     (inr XGA)) =
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb a x' = true)
            ⨿ (match a with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb x' m
               end = true), 
      (⟦ a + b ⟧)%stn)
     (λ less_n : natgtb a x' = true,
      ordconstr x'
        (natgehgthtrans (a + b) a x'
           (natlehnplusnm a b) less_n))
     (λ geq_n : match a with
                | 0 => true
                | S m => natgtb x' m
                end = true,
      ordconstr (x' - a + a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
           (x' - a + a) (a + (x' - a))
           (λ n : nat, natgtb (a + b) n = true)
           (natlthandplusl 
              (x' - a) b a
              (nat_split (stnlt x') geq_n))
           (natpluscomm (x' - a) a)))
     (natlthorgeh x' a))

xbd: natgtb (a + 0 + b) xval = true
QJ:= internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (a + 0 + b) (a + b)
  (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b))

     (natlthorgeh xval a))

pentagon_eq tensor_functor_card tensor_associator_card


pentagon_eq tensor_functor_card tensor_associator_card

  
∏ a b c d : Δ_sdg,
pr1 tensor_associator_card
  ((tensor_functor_card (a, b), c), d)
· pr1 tensor_associator_card
    ((a, b), tensor_functor_card (c, d)) =
# tensor_functor_card
  (pr1 tensor_associator_card ((a, b), c) #, id d)
· pr1 tensor_associator_card
    ((a, tensor_functor_card (b, c)), d)
· # tensor_functor_card
    (id a #, pr1 tensor_associator_card ((b, c), d))
 
a, b, c, d: Δ_sdg
pr1 tensor_associator_card
  ((tensor_functor_card (a, b), c), d)
· pr1 tensor_associator_card
    ((a, b), tensor_functor_card (c, d)) =
# tensor_functor_card
  (pr1 tensor_associator_card ((a, b), c) #, id d)
· pr1 tensor_associator_card
    ((a, tensor_functor_card (b, c)), d)
· # tensor_functor_card
    (id a #, pr1 tensor_associator_card ((b, c), d))
 
a, b, c, d: Δ_sdg
∏
x : (⟦ assoc_left tensor_functor_card
         ((tensor_functor_card (a, b), c), d) ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  ((pr1 tensor_associator_card
      ((tensor_functor_card (a, b), c), d)
    · pr1 tensor_associator_card
        ((a, b), tensor_functor_card (c, d))) x) =
pr1
  ((# tensor_functor_card
      (pr1 tensor_associator_card ((a, b), c) #, id d)
    · pr1 tensor_associator_card
        ((a, tensor_functor_card (b, c)), d)
    · # tensor_functor_card
        (id a
        #, pr1 tensor_associator_card ((b, c), d))) x)
 
a, b, c, d: Δ_sdg
∏ x : (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c + d)
      (a + b + (c + d))
      (λ n : nat,
       (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ a + b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
      (natplusassoc (a + b) c d)
    · internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + (c + d))
        (a + (b + (c + d)))
        (λ n : nat,
         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + (c + d)) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + (c + d)) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a b (c + d))) x) =
pr1
  ((sumfn
      (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c)
         (a + (b + c))
         (λ n : nat,
          (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
         (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
         (natplusassoc a b c)) (id d)
    · internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + (b + c) + d)
        (a + (b + c + d))
        (λ n : nat,
         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a (b + c) d)
    · sumfn (id a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat (b + c + d)
           (b + (c + d))
           (λ n : nat,
            (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
           (natplusassoc b c d))) x)

  
a, b, c, d: Δ_sdg
∏ x : (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c + d)
      (a + b + (c + d))
      (λ n : nat,
       (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ a + b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
      (natplusassoc (a + b) c d)
    · internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + (c + d))
        (a + (b + (c + d)))
        (λ n : nat,
         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + (c + d)) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + (c + d)) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a b (c + d))) x) =
pr1
  ((sumfn
      (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c)
         (a + (b + c))
         (λ n : nat,
          (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
         (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
         (natplusassoc a b c)) (id d)
    · internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + (b + c) + d)
        (a + (b + c + d))
        (λ n : nat,
         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a (b + c) d)
    · sumfn (id a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat (b + c + d)
           (b + (c + d))
           (λ n : nat,
            (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
           (natplusassoc b c d))) x)
 
a, b, c, d: Δ_sdg
∏ x : (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c + d)
      (a + b + (c + d))
      (λ n : nat,
       (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ a + b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
      (natplusassoc (a + b) c d)
    · internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + (c + d))
        (a + (b + (c + d)))
        (λ n : nat,
         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + (c + d)) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + (c + d)) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a b (c + d))) x) =
pr1
  ((sumfn
      (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c)
         (a + (b + c))
         (λ n : nat,
          (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
         (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
         (natplusassoc a b c)) (id d)
    · internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + (b + c) + d)
        (a + (b + c + d))
        (λ n : nat,
         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a (b + c) d)
    · sumfn (id a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat (b + c + d)
           (b + (c + d))
           (λ n : nat,
            (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
           (natplusassoc b c d))) x)

  
a, b, c, d: Δ_sdg
x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
pr1
  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c + d)
      (a + b + (c + d))
      (λ n : nat,
       (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ a + b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
      (natplusassoc (a + b) c d)
    · internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + (c + d))
        (a + (b + (c + d)))
        (λ n : nat,
         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + (c + d)) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + (c + d)) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a b (c + d))) x) =
pr1
  ((sumfn
      (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c)
         (a + (b + c))
         (λ n : nat,
          (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
         (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
         (natplusassoc a b c)) (id d)
    · internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + (b + c) + d)
        (a + (b + c + d))
        (λ n : nat,
         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a (b + c) d)
    · sumfn (id a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat (b + c + d)
           (b + (c + d))
           (λ n : nat,
            (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
           (natplusassoc b c d))) x)

      (idfun (⟦ a + b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
      (natplusassoc (a + b) c d)
    · internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + (c + d))
        (a + (b + (c + d)))
        (λ n : nat,
         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + (c + d)) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + (c + d)) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a b (c + d))) x) =
pr1
  ((sumfn
      (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c)
         (a + (b + c))
         (λ n : nat,
          (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
         (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
         (natplusassoc a b c)) (id d)
    · internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + (b + c) + d)
        (a + (b + c + d))
        (λ n : nat,
         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a (b + c) d)
    · sumfn (id a)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat (b + c + d)
           (b + c + d)
           (λ n : nat,
            (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn)
           (idpath (b + c + d)))) x)

      (a + b + (c + d))

        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a (b + c) d)
    · sumfn (id a) (idfun (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn)) x)

x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn

  ((internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c + d)

        (idfun (⟦ a + b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)

x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn

a, b, c, d: Δ_sdg
x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (pr2 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) (a + b + c + d)
     (a + b + (c + d)) (a + b + (c + d))
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c + d)
        (a + b + (c + d))
        (λ n : nat,
         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc (a + b) c d))
     (idfun (⟦ a + b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn) x) =
pr1
  (pr2 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) (a + b + c + d)
     (a + (b + c + d)) (a + (b + c + d))
     (pr2 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) (a + b + c + d)
        (a + (b + c) + d) (a + (b + c + d))
        (sumfn
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c)
              (a + (b + c))
              (λ n : nat,
               (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
              (natplusassoc a b c)) (id d))
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + (b + c) + d)
           (a + (b + c + d))
           (λ n : nat,
            (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
           (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
           (natplusassoc a (b + c) d)))
     (sumfn (id a) (idfun (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn)) x)

x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c + d)
     (a + b + (c + d))
     (λ n : nat,
      (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ a + b + (c + d) ⟧)%stn)
     (natplusassoc (a + b) c d) x) =
pr1
  (sumfn (id a) (idfun (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + (b + c) + d)
        (a + (b + c + d))
        (λ n : nat,
         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a (b + c) d)
        (sumfn
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c)
              (a + (b + c))
              (λ n : nat,
               (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
              (natplusassoc a b c)) (id d) x)))

  
a, b, c, d: Δ_sdg
x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c + d)
     (a + b + c + d)
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn)
     (idpath (a + b + c + d)) x) =
pr1
  (sumfn (id a) (idfun (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + (b + c) + d)
        (a + (b + c + d))

              (natplusassoc a b c)) (id d) x)))

x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
pr1 x =
pr1
  (sumfn (id a) (idfun (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + (b + c) + d)
        (a + (b + c + d))
        (λ n : nat,

              (a + (b + c))

               (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
              (natplusassoc a b c)) (id d) x)))

  
a, b, c, d: Δ_sdg
x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
pr1 x =
pr1
  (sumfn (pr1 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) a)
     (idfun (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + (b + c) + d)
        (a + (b + c + d))
        (λ n : nat,
         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a (b + c) d)
        (sumfn
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c)
              (a + (b + c))
              (λ n : nat,
               (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
              (natplusassoc a b c))
           (pr1 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) d) x)))

x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
pr1 x =
pr1
  (sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + (b + c) + d)
        (a + (b + c + d))

         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a (b + c) d)
        (sumfn
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c)
              (a + (b + c))
              (λ n : nat,
               (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
              (natplusassoc a b c))
           (idfun (⟦ d ⟧)%stn) x)))

x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
k:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod a (b + c + d)): # tensor_data_card (id make_dirprod a (b + c + d)) =
id tensor_data_card (make_dirprod a (b + c + d))
pr1 x =
pr1
  (sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + (b + c) + d)
        (a + (b + c + d))
        (λ n : nat,
         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a (b + c) d)
        (sumfn
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c)
              (a + (b + c))
              (λ n : nat,
               (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
              (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
              (natplusassoc a b c))
           (idfun (⟦ d ⟧)%stn) x)))

k:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod a (b + c + d)): # tensor_data_card
  (pr1 (pr2 (Δ_sdg ⊠ Δ_sdg))
     (make_dirprod a (b + c + d))) =
pr1 (pr2 Δ_sdg)
  (tensor_data_card (make_dirprod a (b + c + d)))
pr1 x =
pr1
  (sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn)

              (a + (b + c))

              (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
              (natplusassoc a b c))
           (idfun (⟦ d ⟧)%stn) x)))

x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
k:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod a (b + c + d)): sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn) =
idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn
pr1 x =
pr1
  (sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + (b + c) + d)
        (a + (b + c + d))
        (λ n : nat,
         (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn)
        (natplusassoc a (b + c) d)
        (sumfn
           (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c)

              (idfun (⟦ a + (b + c) ⟧)%stn)
              (natplusassoc a b c))
           (idfun (⟦ d ⟧)%stn) x)))

  (sumfn (idfun (⟦ a + b + c ⟧)%stn)

     (make_dirprod (a + b + c) d)) =

  (tensor_data_card (make_dirprod (a + b + c) d))

  (idfun (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn) =
idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn
k':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (a + b + c) d): sumfn (id (a + b + c)) (id d) =
idfun (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn

pr1
  (sumfn (idfun (⟦ a + b + c ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ d ⟧)%stn) x)

k':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (a + b + c) d): sumfn (pr1 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) (a + b + c))
  (pr1 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) d) =
idfun (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn

pr1
  (sumfn (idfun (⟦ a + b + c ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ d ⟧)%stn) x)

k:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod a (b + c + d)): sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn) =
idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn
k':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (a + b + c) d): sumfn (idfun (⟦ a + b + c ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ d ⟧)%stn) =

pr1 x =

  (sumfn (idfun (⟦ a + b + c ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ d ⟧)%stn) x)
 
a, b, c, d: Δ_sdg
x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
k:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod a (b + c + d)): sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn) =
idfun (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn
k':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (a + b + c) d): sumfn (idfun (⟦ a + b + c ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ d ⟧)%stn) =
idfun (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
pr1 x = pr1 (idfun (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn x)
 reflexivity.
Qed.


pentagon_eq tensor_functor_ord tensor_associator_ord


pentagon_eq tensor_functor_ord tensor_associator_ord

  
∏ a b c d : Δ_sd,
pr1 tensor_associator_ord
  ((tensor_functor_ord (a, b), c), d)
· pr1 tensor_associator_ord
    ((a, b), tensor_functor_ord (c, d)) =
# tensor_functor_ord
  (pr1 tensor_associator_ord ((a, b), c) #, id d)
· pr1 tensor_associator_ord
    ((a, tensor_functor_ord (b, c)), d)
· # tensor_functor_ord
    (id a #, pr1 tensor_associator_ord ((b, c), d))

  
a, b, c, d: Δ_sd
pr1 tensor_associator_ord
  ((tensor_functor_ord (a, b), c), d)
· pr1 tensor_associator_ord
    ((a, b), tensor_functor_ord (c, d)) =
# tensor_functor_ord
  (pr1 tensor_associator_ord ((a, b), c) #, id d)
· pr1 tensor_associator_ord
    ((a, tensor_functor_ord (b, c)), d)
· # tensor_functor_ord
    (id a #, pr1 tensor_associator_ord ((b, c), d))
 
a, b, c, d: Δ_sd
# U
  (pr1 tensor_associator_ord
     ((tensor_functor_ord (a, b), c), d)
   · pr1 tensor_associator_ord
       ((a, b), tensor_functor_ord (c, d))) =
# U
  (# tensor_functor_ord
     (pr1 tensor_associator_ord ((a, b), c) #, id d)
   · pr1 tensor_associator_ord
       ((a, tensor_functor_ord (b, c)), d)
   · # tensor_functor_ord
       (id a #, pr1 tensor_associator_ord ((b, c), d)))
 
a, b, c, d: Δ_sd
# U
  (pr1 tensor_associator_ord
     ((tensor_functor_ord (a, b), c), d))
· # U
    (pr1 tensor_associator_ord
       ((a, b), tensor_functor_ord (c, d))) =
# U
  (# tensor_functor_ord
     (pr1 tensor_associator_ord ((a, b), c) #, id d))
· # U
    (pr1 tensor_associator_ord
       ((a, tensor_functor_ord (b, c)), d))
· # U
    (# tensor_functor_ord
       (id a #, pr1 tensor_associator_ord ((b, c), d)))

  
a, b, c, d: Δ_sd
∏
x : (⟦ U
         (assoc_left tensor_functor_ord
            ((tensor_functor_ord (a, b), c), d)) ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  ((# U
      (pr1 tensor_associator_ord
         ((tensor_functor_ord (a, b), c), d))
    · # U
        (pr1 tensor_associator_ord
           ((a, b), tensor_functor_ord (c, d)))) x) =
pr1
  ((# U
      (# tensor_functor_ord
         (pr1 tensor_associator_ord ((a, b), c)
         #, id d))
    · # U
        (pr1 tensor_associator_ord
           ((a, tensor_functor_ord (b, c)), d))
    · # U
        (# tensor_functor_ord
           (id a
           #, pr1 tensor_associator_ord ((b, c), d))))
     x)

  
a, b, c, d: Δ_sd
∏
x : (⟦ U
         (assoc_left tensor_functor_ord
            ((tensor_functor_ord (a, b), c), d)) ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  ((# U
      (pr1
         (tensor_associator_ord_nat_trans,,
          (λ c : category_binproduct
                   (category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd)
                   Δ_sd,
           internal_paths_rew_r nat
             (pr1 (pr1 c) + pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c)
             (pr1 (pr1 c) + (pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c))
             (λ n : nat,
              monfunstn
                (pr1 (pr1 c) + (pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c))
                n)
             (monfunstnid
                (pr1 (pr1 c) + (pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c)))
             (natplusassoc (pr1 (pr1 c)) (pr2 (pr1 c))
                (pr2 c)),,
           tensor_associator_ord_subproof
             (pr1 (pr1 c)) (pr2 (pr1 c)) (pr2 c)))
         ((tensor_functor_ord (a, b), c), d))
    · # U
        (pr1
           (tensor_associator_ord_nat_trans,,
            (λ c : category_binproduct
                     (category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd)
                     Δ_sd,
             internal_paths_rew_r nat
               (pr1 (pr1 c) + pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c)
               (pr1 (pr1 c) + (pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c))
               (λ n : nat,
                monfunstn
                  (pr1 (pr1 c) + (pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c))
                  n)
               (monfunstnid
                  (pr1 (pr1 c) + (pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c)))
               (natplusassoc (pr1 (pr1 c))
                  (pr2 (pr1 c)) (pr2 c)),,
             tensor_associator_ord_subproof
               (pr1 (pr1 c)) (pr2 (pr1 c)) (pr2 c)))
           ((a, b), tensor_functor_ord (c, d)))) x) =
pr1
  ((# U
      (# tensor_functor_ord
         (pr1
            (tensor_associator_ord_nat_trans,,
             (λ c : category_binproduct
                      (category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd)
                      Δ_sd,
              internal_paths_rew_r nat
                (pr1 (pr1 c) + pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c)
                (pr1 (pr1 c) + (pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c))
                (λ n : nat,
                 monfunstn
                   (pr1 (pr1 c) + (pr2 ... + pr2 c)) n)
                (monfunstnid
                   (pr1 (pr1 c) + (pr2 (...) + pr2 c)))
                (natplusassoc (pr1 (pr1 c))
                   (pr2 (pr1 c)) (pr2 c)),,
              tensor_associator_ord_subproof
                (pr1 (pr1 c)) (pr2 (pr1 c)) (pr2 c)))
            ((a, b), c) #, id d))
    · # U
        (pr1
           (tensor_associator_ord_nat_trans,,
            (λ c : category_binproduct
                     (category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd)
                     Δ_sd,
             internal_paths_rew_r nat
               (pr1 (pr1 c) + pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c)
               (pr1 (pr1 c) + (pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c))
               (λ n : nat,
                monfunstn
                  (pr1 (pr1 c) + (pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c))
                  n)
               (monfunstnid
                  (pr1 (pr1 c) + (pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c)))
               (natplusassoc (pr1 (pr1 c))
                  (pr2 (pr1 c)) (pr2 c)),,
             tensor_associator_ord_subproof
               (pr1 (pr1 c)) (pr2 (pr1 c)) (pr2 c)))
           ((a, tensor_functor_ord (b, c)), d))
    · # U
        (# tensor_functor_ord
           (id a
           #, pr1
                (tensor_associator_ord_nat_trans,,
                 (λ c : category_binproduct
                          (category_binproduct Δ_sd
                             Δ_sd) Δ_sd,
                  internal_paths_rew_r nat
                    (pr1 (pr1 c) + pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c)
                    (pr1 (pr1 c) +
                     (pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c))
                    (λ n : nat,
                     monfunstn
                       (pr1 (pr1 c) +
                        (pr2 (...) + pr2 c)) n)
                    (monfunstnid
                       (pr1 (pr1 c) +
                        (pr2 (pr1 c) + pr2 c)))
                    (natplusassoc (pr1 (pr1 c))
                       (pr2 (pr1 c)) (pr2 c)),,
                  tensor_associator_ord_subproof
                    (pr1 (pr1 c)) (pr2 (pr1 c))
                    (pr2 c))) ((b, c), d)))) x)
 
a, b, c, d: Δ_sd
∏ x : (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  ((pr1
      (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c + d)
         (a + b + (c + d))
         (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b + (c + d)))
         (monfunstnid (a + b + (c + d)))
         (natplusassoc (a + b) c d))
    · pr1
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + (c + d))
           (a + (b + (c + d)))
           (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + (b + (c + d))))
           (monfunstnid (a + (b + (c + d))))
           (natplusassoc a b (c + d)))) x) =
pr1
  ((sumfn
      (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c)
         (a + (b + c))
         (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + (b + c)))
         (monfunstnid (a + (b + c)))
         (natplusassoc a b c)) (idfun (⟦ d ⟧)%stn)
    · pr1
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + (b + c) + d)
           (a + (b + c + d))
           (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + (b + c + d)))
           (monfunstnid (a + (b + c + d)))
           (natplusassoc a (b + c) d))
    · sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat (b + c + d)
           (b + (c + d))
           (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (b + (c + d)))
           (monfunstnid (b + (c + d)))
           (natplusassoc b c d))) x)

  
a, b, c, d: Δ_sd
∏ x : (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  ((pr1
      (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c + d)
         (a + b + (c + d))
         (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b + (c + d)))

    · pr1

           (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + (b + (c + d))))
           (monfunstnid (a + (b + (c + d))))
           (natplusassoc a b (c + d)))) x) =
pr1

         (a + (b + c))
         (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + (b + c)))

    · pr1

           (a + (b + c + d))
           (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + (b + c + d)))
           (monfunstnid (a + (b + c + d)))
           (natplusassoc a (b + c) d))
    · sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat (b + c + d)
           (b + (c + d))
           (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (b + (c + d)))
           (monfunstnid (b + (c + d)))
           (natplusassoc b c d))) x)
 
a, b, c, d: Δ_sd
∏ x : (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  ((pr1
      (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c + d)
         (a + b + (c + d))
         (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b + (c + d)))

    · pr1

           (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + (b + (c + d))))

           (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + (b + c + d)))
           (monfunstnid (a + (b + c + d)))

    · sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)

           (b + (c + d))
           (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (b + (c + d)))
           (monfunstnid (b + (c + d)))
           (natplusassoc b c d))) x)

  
a, b, c, d: Δ_sd
x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
pr1
  ((pr1
      (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c + d)
         (a + b + (c + d))
         (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b + (c + d)))

           (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + (b + c + d)))
           (monfunstnid (a + (b + c + d)))

    · sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)

           (b + (c + d))
           (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (b + (c + d)))
           (monfunstnid (b + (c + d)))
           (natplusassoc b c d))) x)
 
a, b, c, d: Δ_sd
x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
pr1
  ((pr1
      (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c + d)
         (a + b + (c + d))
         (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + b + (c + d)))
         (monfunstnid (a + b + (c + d)))

           (monfunstnid (a + b + (c + d)))
           (idpath (a + b + (c + d))))) x) =
pr1
  ((sumfn
      (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + b + c)
         (a + (b + c))

         (monfunstnid (a + (b + c)))
         (natplusassoc a b c)) (idfun (⟦ d ⟧)%stn)
    · pr1
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat (a + (b + c) + d)
           (a + (b + c + d))
           (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (a + (b + c + d)))
           (monfunstnid (a + (b + c + d)))
           (natplusassoc a (b + c) d))
    · sumfn (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
        (internal_paths_rew_r nat (b + c + d)
           (b + c + d)
           (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (b + c + d))
           (monfunstnid (b + c + d))
           (idpath (b + c + d)))) x)

x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
j:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod a (b + c + d)): sumfn (λ t : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, t)
  (λ t : (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn, t) =
(λ t : (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn, t)
j':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (a + b + c) d): sumfn (pr1 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) (a + b + c))
  (pr1 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) d) =
pr1 (pr2 precat_fincard_data) (a + b + c + d)
pr1 x =
pr1
  (sumfn (idfun (⟦ a + b + c ⟧)%stn)
     (λ t : (⟦ d ⟧)%stn, t) x)
 
a, b, c, d: Δ_sd
x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
j:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod a (b + c + d)): sumfn (λ t : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, t)
  (λ t : (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn, t) =
(λ t : (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn, t)
j':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (a + b + c) d): sumfn (idfun (⟦ a + b + c ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ d ⟧)%stn) =
idfun (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
pr1 x =
pr1
  (sumfn (idfun (⟦ a + b + c ⟧)%stn)
     (λ t : (⟦ d ⟧)%stn, t) x)
 
a, b, c, d: Δ_sd
x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
j:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod a (b + c + d)): sumfn (λ t : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, t)
  (λ t : (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn, t) =
(λ t : (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn, t)
j':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (a + b + c) d): sumfn (λ t : (⟦ a + b + c ⟧)%stn, t)
  (λ t : (⟦ d ⟧)%stn, t) =
(λ t : (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn, t)
pr1 x =
pr1
  (sumfn (λ t : (⟦ a + b + c ⟧)%stn, t)
     (λ t : (⟦ d ⟧)%stn, t) x)
 
a, b, c, d: Δ_sd
x: (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn
j:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod a (b + c + d)): sumfn (λ t : (⟦ a ⟧)%stn, t)
  (λ t : (⟦ b + c + d ⟧)%stn, t) =
(λ t : (⟦ a + (b + c + d) ⟧)%stn, t)
j':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (a + b + c) d): sumfn (λ t : (⟦ a + b + c ⟧)%stn, t)
  (λ t : (⟦ d ⟧)%stn, t) =
(λ t : (⟦ a + b + c + d ⟧)%stn, t)
pr1 x = pr1 x

  reflexivity.
Qed.


monoidal_cat


monoidal_cat

  
category
category_binproduct ?C ?C ⟶ ?C
?C
left_unitor ?tensor ?I
right_unitor ?tensor ?I
associator ?tensor
triangle_eq ?tensor ?I ?λ' ?ρ' ?α'
pentagon_eq ?tensor ?α'

  
category
 exact Δ.
  
category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd ⟶ Δ_sd
 exact tensor_functor_ord.
  
Δ_sd
 exact tensor_unit.
  
left_unitor tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit
 exact tensor_left_unitor_ord.
  
right_unitor tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit
 exact tensor_right_unitor_ord.
  
associator tensor_functor_ord
 exact tensor_associator_ord.
  
triangle_eq tensor_functor_ord tensor_unit
  tensor_left_unitor_ord tensor_right_unitor_ord
  tensor_associator_ord
 exact triangle_eq_holds_ord.
  
pentagon_eq tensor_functor_ord tensor_associator_ord
 exact pentagon_eq_holds_ord.
Defined.

∏
x : precategory_binproduct_data
      precat_Delta_precategory_data
      precat_Delta_precategory_data,
precat_fincard_data

functor_composite_data tensor_data_ord

∏
x : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
      precat_Delta_precategory_data
      precat_Delta_precategory_data,,
    (λ cd : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
              precat_Delta_precategory_data
              precat_Delta_precategory_data,
     make_dirprod (id pr1 cd) (id pr2 cd)),,
    (λ (cd cd'
        cd'' : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
                 precat_Delta_precategory_data
                 precat_Delta_precategory_data)
     (fg : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
             precat_Delta_precategory_data
             precat_Delta_precategory_data ⟦ cd, cd' ⟧)
     (fg' : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
              precat_Delta_precategory_data
              precat_Delta_precategory_data ⟦ cd',
            cd'' ⟧),
     make_dirprod (pr1 fg · pr1 fg')
       (pr2 fg · pr2 fg')),
precat_fincard_data
⟦ functor_composite_data (pair_functor_data U U)
    tensor_data_card x,
functor_composite_data tensor_data_ord
  fget_monoton_functor_data x ⟧

    
∏ x : nat × nat,
(⟦ pr1 x + pr2 x ⟧)%stn → (⟦ pr1 x + pr2 x ⟧)%stn
 
∏ x : nat × nat,
(⟦ pr1 x + pr2 x ⟧)%stn → (⟦ pr1 x + pr2 x ⟧)%stn
 
x: nat × nat
(⟦ pr1 x + pr2 x ⟧)%stn → (⟦ pr1 x + pr2 x ⟧)%stn
 
n, m: nat
(⟦ pr1 (n,, m) + pr2 (n,, m) ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn

    
n, m: nat
(⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
 exact (idfun (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn).
  
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (functor_composite_data
            (pair_functor_data U U) tensor_data_card)
         (functor_composite_data tensor_data_ord
            fget_monoton_functor_data),
 is_nat_trans
   (functor_composite_data (pair_functor_data U U)
      tensor_data_card)
   (functor_composite_data tensor_data_ord
      fget_monoton_functor_data) t)
  (((((λ x : nat × nat,
       (λ n m : nat,
        idfun (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn
        :
        (⟦ pr1 (n,, m) + pr2 (n,, m) ⟧)%stn
        → (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
      :
      ∏ x : nat × nat,
      (⟦ pr1 x + pr2 x ⟧)%stn
      → (⟦ pr1 x + pr2 x ⟧)%stn)
     :
     ∏
     x : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
           precat_Delta_precategory_data
           precat_Delta_precategory_data,,
         (λ cd : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
                   precat_Delta_precategory_data
                   precat_Delta_precategory_data,
          make_dirprod (id pr1 cd) (id pr2 cd)),,
         (λ (cd cd'
             cd'' : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
                      precat_Delta_precategory_data
                      precat_Delta_precategory_data)
          (fg : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
                  precat_Delta_precategory_data
                  precat_Delta_precategory_data ⟦ cd,
                cd' ⟧)
          (fg' : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
                   precat_Delta_precategory_data
                   precat_Delta_precategory_data
                 ⟦ cd', cd'' ⟧),
          make_dirprod (pr1 fg · pr1 fg')
            (pr2 fg · pr2 fg')),
     precat_fincard_data
     ⟦ functor_composite_data (pair_functor_data U U)
         tensor_data_card x,
     functor_composite_data tensor_data_ord
       fget_monoton_functor_data x ⟧)
    :
    ∏
    x : precategory_binproduct_data
          precat_Delta_precategory_data
          precat_Delta_precategory_data,
    precat_fincard_data
    ⟦ functor_composite_data (pair_functor_data U U)
        tensor_data_card x,
    functor_composite_data tensor_data_ord
      fget_monoton_functor_data x ⟧)
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (functor_composite_data (pair_functor_data U U)
        tensor_data_card)
     (functor_composite_data tensor_data_ord
        fget_monoton_functor_data))
 abstract(cbv beta;
      unfold is_nat_trans; simpl; intros x x'; induction x as [n m], x' as [n' m'];
      unfold precategory_binproduct_mor; intro fg; simpl in fg; induction fg as [f g];
      simpl;
    set (s:= id_left (Δ_sdg_mor_constr (AugmentedSimplexCategory.sumfn (pr1 f) (pr1 g))));
    unfold "id" in s; simpl in s; unfold Δ_sdg_mor_constr in s;
    unfold Δ_sdg_ob_constr in s; unfold idfun;
    simpl in s; simpl; induction f as [ffun fguarantee], g as [gfun gguarantee];
    simpl in s; simpl; unfold "·"; unfold "·" in s; simpl in s; simpl;
    unfold idfun in s; rewrite s; reflexivity).
Defined.

    (x,
    MonoidalFunctorsTensored.tensor_C
      AugmentedSimplexCategory (y, z))

    (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.tensor_C

x, y, z: AugmentedSimplexCategory
sumfn (idfun (⟦ x + y ⟧)%stn) (id z)
· idfun (⟦ x + y + z ⟧)%stn
· pr1
    (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.α_C

· sumfn (id x) (idfun (⟦ y + z ⟧)%stn)
· idfun (⟦ x + (y + z) ⟧)%stn

· idfun (⟦ x + y + z ⟧)%stn
· pr1
    (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory
       ((x, y), z)) =
monoidal_cat_associator FinCard ((x, y), z)
· sumfn (id x) (idfun (⟦ y + z ⟧)%stn)

x, y, z: AugmentedSimplexCategory
sumfn (idfun (⟦ x + y ⟧)%stn) (id z)

· pr1
    (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory
       ((x, y), z)) =

· sumfn (id x) (idfun (⟦ y + z ⟧)%stn)
· idfun (⟦ x + (y + z) ⟧)%stn

  
x, y, z: AugmentedSimplexCategory
sumfn (idfun (⟦ x + y ⟧)%stn) (id z)
· idfun (⟦ x + y + z ⟧)%stn
· pr1
    (pr1
       (pr2
          (pr2
             (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 AugmentedSimplexCategory)))))
       ((x, y), z)) =
pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 FinCard))))) ((x, y), z)
· sumfn (id x) (idfun (⟦ y + z ⟧)%stn)
· idfun (⟦ x + (y + z) ⟧)%stn
 
x, y, z: AugmentedSimplexCategory
sumfn (idfun (⟦ x + y ⟧)%stn) (id z)
· idfun (⟦ x + y + z ⟧)%stn
· pr1 (tensor_associator_ord ((x, y), z)) =
tensor_associator_card ((x, y), z)
· sumfn (id x) (idfun (⟦ y + z ⟧)%stn)
· idfun (⟦ x + (y + z) ⟧)%stn

  (* We get rid of all the identity morphisms. *)
  
x, y, z: AugmentedSimplexCategory
sumfn (idfun (⟦ x + y ⟧)%stn) (id z) · id (x + y + z)
· pr1 (tensor_associator_ord ((x, y), z)) =
tensor_associator_card ((x, y), z)
· sumfn (id x) (idfun (⟦ y + z ⟧)%stn)
· idfun (⟦ x + (y + z) ⟧)%stn

· pr1 (tensor_associator_ord ((x, y), z)) =
tensor_associator_card ((x, y), z)
· sumfn (id x) (idfun (⟦ y + z ⟧)%stn)
· idfun (⟦ x + (y + z) ⟧)%stn

  
x, y, z: AugmentedSimplexCategory

· pr1 (tensor_associator_ord ((x, y), z)) =
tensor_associator_card ((x, y), z)
· sumfn (id x) (idfun (⟦ y + z ⟧)%stn)
· id (x + (y + z))

sumfn (id (x + y)) (id z) · id (x + y + z)
· pr1 (tensor_associator_ord ((x, y), z)) =
tensor_associator_card ((x, y), z)
· sumfn (id x) (id (y + z)) · id (x + (y + z))

  
x, y, z: AugmentedSimplexCategory
j':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (x + y) z): # tensor_data_card (id make_dirprod (x + y) z) =
id tensor_data_card (make_dirprod (x + y) z)

j:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod x (y + z)): sumfn (id x) (id (y + z)) = id (x + (y + z))
