j':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (x + y) z): sumfn (id (x + y)) (id z) = id (x + y + z)
j:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod x (y + z)): sumfn (id x) (id (y + z)) = id (x + (y + z))
pr1 (tensor_associator_ord ((x, y), z)) =
tensor_associator_card ((x, y), z)

  (* Done. *)
  
x, y, z: nat
j':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (x + y) z): sumfn (id (x + y)) (id z) = id (x + y + z)
j:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod x (y + z)): sumfn (id x) (id (y + z)) = id (x + (y + z))
∏ x0 : (⟦ x + y + z ⟧)%stn,
pr1 (pr1 (tensor_associator_ord ((x, y), z)) x0) =
pr1 (tensor_associator_card ((x, y), z) x0)

j':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (x + y) z): sumfn (id (x + y)) (id z) = id (x + y + z)
j:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod x (y + z)): sumfn (id x) (id (y + z)) = id (x + (y + z))
t: (⟦ x + y + z ⟧)%stn
pr1 (pr1 (tensor_associator_ord ((x, y), z)) t) =
pr1 (tensor_associator_card ((x, y), z) t)

  
x, y, z: nat
j':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (x + y) z): sumfn (id (x + y)) (id z) = id (x + y + z)
j:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod x (y + z)): sumfn (id x) (id (y + z)) = id (x + (y + z))
t: (⟦ x + y + z ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (pr1
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + y + z)
        (x + (y + z))
        (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (x + (y + z)))
        (monfunstnid (x + (y + z)))
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : nat,
            ∏ m k : nat, n + m + k = n + (m + k))
           (λ m k : nat, idpath (m + k))
           (λ (n : nat)
            (IHn : ∏ m k : nat,
                   n + m + k = n + (m + k))
            (m k : nat), maponpaths S (IHn m k)) x y z))
     t) =
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + y + z) (x + (y + z))
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x + (y + z) ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ x + (y + z) ⟧)%stn)
     (nat_rect
        (λ n : nat,
         ∏ m k : nat, n + m + k = n + (m + k))
        (λ m k : nat, idpath (m + k))
        (λ (n : nat)
         (IHn : ∏ m k : nat, n + m + k = n + (m + k))
         (m k : nat), maponpaths S (IHn m k)) x y z) t)
 
x, y, z: nat
j':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (x + y) z): sumfn (id (x + y)) (id z) = id (x + y + z)
j:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod x (y + z)): sumfn (id x) (id (y + z)) = id (x + (y + z))
t: (⟦ x + y + z ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (pr1
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + y + z)
        (x + (y + z))
        (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (x + (y + z)))
        (monfunstnid (x + (y + z)))
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : nat,
            ∏ m k : nat, n + m + k = n + (m + k))
           (λ m k : nat, idpath (m + k))
           (λ (n : nat)
            (IHn : ∏ m k : nat,
                   n + m + k = n + (m + k))
            (m k : nat), maponpaths S (IHn m k)) x y z))
     t) =
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + y + z) (x + (y + z))
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x + (y + z) ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ x + (y + z) ⟧)%stn)
     (nat_rect
        (λ n : nat,
         ∏ m k : nat, n + m + k = n + (m + k))
        (λ m k : nat, idpath (m + k))
        (λ (n : nat)
         (IHn : ∏ m k : nat, n + m + k = n + (m + k))
         (m k : nat), maponpaths S (IHn m k)) x y z) t)

  
x, y, z: nat
j':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (x + y) z): sumfn (id (x + y)) (id z) = id (x + y + z)
j:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod x (y + z)): sumfn (id x) (id (y + z)) = id (x + (y + z))
t: (⟦ x + y + z ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (pr1
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + y + z)
        (x + (y + z))
        (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (x + (y + z)))
        (monfunstnid (x + (y + z)))
        (nat_rect
           (λ n : nat,
            ∏ m k : nat, n + m + k = n + (m + k))
           (λ m k : nat, idpath (m + k))
           (λ (n : nat)
            (IHn : ∏ m k : nat,
                   n + m + k = n + (m + k))
            (m k : nat), maponpaths S (IHn m k)) x y z))
     t) =
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + y + z) (x + (y + z))
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x + (y + z) ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ x + (y + z) ⟧)%stn)
     (nat_rect
        (λ n : nat,
         ∏ m k : nat, n + m + k = n + (m + k))
        (λ m k : nat, idpath (m + k))
        (λ (n : nat)
         (IHn : ∏ m k : nat, n + m + k = n + (m + k))
         (m k : nat), maponpaths S (IHn m k)) x y z) t)

  
x, y, z: nat
j':= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod (x + y) z): sumfn (id (x + y)) (id z) = id (x + y + z)
j:= tensor_id_card (make_dirprod x (y + z)): sumfn (id x) (id (y + z)) = id (x + (y + z))
t: (⟦ x + y + z ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (pr1
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + y + z) (x + y + z)
        (λ n : nat, monfunstn n (x + y + z))
        (monfunstnid (x + y + z)) (idpath (x + y + z)))
     t) =
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + y + z) (x + y + z)
     (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x + y + z ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ x + y + z ⟧)%stn) (idpath (x + y + z))
     t)
 reflexivity.
Qed.


monoidal_functor_unitality AugmentedSimplexCategory
  FinCard U U_ε U_μ


monoidal_functor_unitality AugmentedSimplexCategory
  FinCard U U_ε U_μ

  
∏ x : AugmentedSimplexCategory,
MonoidalFunctorsTensored.λ_D FinCard (U x) =
# (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.tensor_D FinCard)
  (U_ε #, id U x)
· U_μ
    (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C
       AugmentedSimplexCategory, x)
· # U
    (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.λ_C
       AugmentedSimplexCategory x)
× MonoidalFunctorsTensored.ρ_D FinCard (U x) =
  # (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.tensor_D FinCard)
    (id U x #, U_ε)
  · U_μ
      (x,
      MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C
        AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  · # U
      (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.ρ_C
         AugmentedSimplexCategory x)

  
∏ x : nat,
MonoidalFunctorsTensored.λ_D FinCard x =
sumfn U_ε (id x) · idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
· idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
× MonoidalFunctorsTensored.ρ_D FinCard x =
  sumfn (id x) U_ε
  · idfun
      (⟦ x +
         MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C
           AugmentedSimplexCategory ⟧)%stn
  · internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) x
      (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 x)
 
x: nat
MonoidalFunctorsTensored.λ_D FinCard x =
sumfn U_ε (id x) · idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
· idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
× MonoidalFunctorsTensored.ρ_D FinCard x =
  sumfn (id x) U_ε
  · idfun
      (⟦ x +
         MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C
           AugmentedSimplexCategory ⟧)%stn
  · internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) x
      (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 x)
 
x: nat
pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 FinCard))) x =
sumfn U_ε (id x) · idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
· idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
× MonoidalFunctorsTensored.ρ_D FinCard x =
  sumfn (id x) U_ε
  · idfun
      (⟦ x +
         MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C
           AugmentedSimplexCategory ⟧)%stn
  · internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) x
      (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 x)
 
x: nat
tensor_left_unitor_card x =
sumfn U_ε (id x) · idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
· idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
× MonoidalFunctorsTensored.ρ_D FinCard x =
  sumfn (id x) U_ε
  · idfun
      (⟦ x +
         MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C
           AugmentedSimplexCategory ⟧)%stn
  · internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) x
      (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x ⟧)%stn)
      (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 x)

  
x: nat
tensor_left_unitor_card x =
sumfn U_ε (id x) · idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
· idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
x: nat
MonoidalFunctorsTensored.ρ_D FinCard x =
sumfn (id x) U_ε
· idfun
    (⟦ x +
       MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C
         AugmentedSimplexCategory ⟧)%stn
· internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) x
    (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x ⟧)%stn)
    (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 x)

  
x: nat
tensor_left_unitor_card x =
sumfn U_ε (id x) · idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
· idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
 
x: nat
tensor_left_unitor_card x =
sumfn U_ε (id x) · id x · id x

    
x: nat
tensor_left_unitor_card x = sumfn U_ε (id x)

    
x: nat
idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn = sumfn U_ε (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn)
 
x: nat
idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn =
(λ x0 : (⟦ 0 + x ⟧)%stn,
 coprod_rect
   (λ _ : (x0 < 0) ⨿ (x0 ≥ 0), (⟦ 0 + x ⟧)%stn)
   (λ less_n : x0 < 0,
    ordconstr
      (idfun (⟦ tensor_unit ⟧)%stn
         (pr_n_m_l x0 less_n))
      (natgehgthtrans (0 + x) 0
         (idfun (⟦ tensor_unit ⟧)%stn
            (pr_n_m_l x0 less_n)) (natlehnplusnm 0 x)
         (stnlt
            (idfun (⟦ tensor_unit ⟧)%stn
               (pr_n_m_l x0 less_n)))))
   (λ geq_n : x0 ≥ 0,
    ordconstr
      (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x0 geq_n) + 0)
      (internal_paths_rew_r nat
         (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x0 geq_n) + 0)
         (0 + idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x0 geq_n))
         (λ n : nat, n < 0 + x)
         (natlthandplusl
            (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x0 geq_n)) x
            0
            (stnlt
               (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x0 geq_n))))
         (natpluscomm
            (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_r x0 geq_n)) 0)))
   (natlthorgeh x0 0))
 
x: nat
idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn =
(λ x0 : (⟦ x ⟧)%stn,
 ordconstr (x0 - 0 + 0)
   (internal_paths_rew_r nat (x0 - 0 + 0) (x0 - 0)
      (λ n : nat, natgtb x n = true)
      (nat_split (stnlt x0) (natgthsn0 x0))
      (natpluscomm (x0 - 0) 0)))
 
x: nat
idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn ~
(λ x0 : (⟦ x ⟧)%stn,
 ordconstr (x0 - 0 + 0)
   (internal_paths_rew_r nat (x0 - 0 + 0) (x0 - 0)
      (λ n : nat, natgtb x n = true)
      (nat_split (stnlt x0) (natgthsn0 x0))
      (natpluscomm (x0 - 0) 0)))
 
x: nat
A: (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn A =
ordconstr (A - 0 + 0)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (A - 0 + 0) (A - 0)
     (λ n : nat, natgtb x n = true)
     (nat_split (stnlt A) (natgthsn0 A))
     (natpluscomm (A - 0) 0))
 
x: nat
A: (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
A =
ordconstr (A - 0 + 0)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat (A - 0 + 0) (A - 0)
     (λ n : nat, natgtb x n = true)
     (nat_split (stnlt A) (natgthsn0 A))
     (natpluscomm (A - 0) 0))

    
x: nat
A: (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
pr1 A =
pr1
  (ordconstr (A - 0 + 0)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat (A - 0 + 0) (A - 0)
        (λ n : nat, natgtb x n = true)
        (nat_split (stnlt A) (natgthsn0 A))
        (natpluscomm (A - 0) 0)))
 
x: nat
A: (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
pr1 A = A - 0 + 0
 
x: nat
A: (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
pr1 A = A + 0
 
x: nat
A: (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
pr1 A = A
 reflexivity.
  
x: nat
MonoidalFunctorsTensored.ρ_D FinCard x =
sumfn (id x) U_ε
· idfun
    (⟦ x +
       MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C
         AugmentedSimplexCategory ⟧)%stn
· internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) x
    (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x ⟧)%stn)
    (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 x)
 
x: nat
MonoidalFunctorsTensored.ρ_D FinCard x =
sumfn (id x) U_ε
· idfun
    (⟦ x +
       MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C
         AugmentedSimplexCategory ⟧)%stn
· internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) x
    (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) (id x)
    (natplusr0 x)

    
x: nat
MonoidalFunctorsTensored.ρ_D FinCard x =
sumfn (id x) U_ε
· idfun
    (⟦ x + pr1 (pr2 (pr2 AugmentedSimplexCategory)) ⟧)%stn
· internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) x
    (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) (id x)
    (natplusr0 x)
 
x: nat
MonoidalFunctorsTensored.ρ_D FinCard x =
sumfn (id x) U_ε · idfun (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn
· internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) x
    (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) (id x)
    (natplusr0 x)

    
x: nat
MonoidalFunctorsTensored.ρ_D FinCard x =
sumfn (id x) U_ε
· internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) x
    (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) (id x)
    (natplusr0 x)
 
x: nat
tensor_right_unitor_card_nt_data x =
(internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) x
   (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x ⟧)%stn)
   (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 x)
 ∘ sumfn (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) U_ε)%functions

    
x: nat
internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) x
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 x) =
(internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) x
   (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x ⟧)%stn)
   (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) (natplusr0 x)
 ∘ sumfn (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) U_ε)%functions

    
x: nat
internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) (x + 0)
  (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn) (idpath (x + 0)) =
(internal_paths_rew_r nat (x + 0) (x + 0)
   (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn)
   (idfun (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn) (idpath (x + 0))
 ∘ sumfn (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) U_ε)%functions
 
x: nat
idfun (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn =
(idfun (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn ∘ sumfn (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) U_ε)%functions

    
x: nat
idfun (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn ~
(idfun (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn ∘ sumfn (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) U_ε)%functions
 
x: nat
y: (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn
idfun (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn y =
(idfun (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn ∘ sumfn (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) U_ε)%functions
  y
 
x: nat
y: (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn
y = sumfn (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn) U_ε y
 
x: nat
y: (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn
y =
coprod_rect (λ _ : (y < x) ⨿ (y ≥ x), (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : y < x,
   ordconstr (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (x + 0) x
        (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_l y less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm x 0)
        (stnlt (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_l y less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : y ≥ x,
   ordconstr (U_ε (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + x)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (U_ε (pr_n_m_r y geq_n) + x)
        (x + U_ε (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < x + 0)
        (natlthandplusl (U_ε (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) 0 x
           (stnlt (U_ε (pr_n_m_r y geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm (U_ε (pr_n_m_r y geq_n)) x)))
  (natlthorgeh y x)

    
x, yval: nat
ybd: yval < x + 0
yval,, ybd =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (yval,, ybd < x) ⨿ (yval,, ybd ≥ x),
   (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : yval,, ybd < x,
   ordconstr
     (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn (pr_n_m_l (yval,, ybd) less_n))
     (natgehgthtrans (x + 0) x
        (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
           (pr_n_m_l (yval,, ybd) less_n))
        (natlehnplusnm x 0)
        (stnlt
           (idfun (⟦ x ⟧)%stn
              (pr_n_m_l (yval,, ybd) less_n)))))
  (λ geq_n : yval,, ybd ≥ x,
   ordconstr (U_ε (pr_n_m_r (yval,, ybd) geq_n) + x)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat
        (U_ε (pr_n_m_r (yval,, ybd) geq_n) + x)
        (x + U_ε (pr_n_m_r (yval,, ybd) geq_n))
        (λ n : nat, n < x + 0)
        (natlthandplusl
           (U_ε (pr_n_m_r (yval,, ybd) geq_n)) 0 x
           (stnlt (U_ε (pr_n_m_r (yval,, ybd) geq_n))))
        (natpluscomm
           (U_ε (pr_n_m_r (yval,, ybd) geq_n)) x)))
  (natlthorgeh (yval,, ybd) x)
 
x, yval: nat
ybd: yval < x + 0
yval,, ybd =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb x yval = true)
         ⨿ (match x with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb yval m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb x yval = true,
   ordconstr yval
     (natgehgthtrans (x + 0) x yval
        (paths_rect nat x
           (λ (n0 : nat) 
            (_ : x = n0),
            match x with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb n0 m
            end = true) (isreflnatleh x) 
           (x + 0) (! natplusr0 x)) less_n))
  (λ geq_n : match x with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb yval m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (yval - x + x)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (yval - x + x) (x + (yval - x))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (x + 0) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (yval - x) 0 x
           (nat_split ybd geq_n))
        (natpluscomm (yval - x) x)))
  (natlthorgeh yval x)

    
x, yval: nat
ybd: yval < x + 0
yval < x
x, yval: nat
ybd: yval < x + 0
j: yval < x
yval,, ybd =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb x yval = true)
         ⨿ (match x with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb yval m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb x yval = true,
   ordconstr yval
     (natgehgthtrans (x + 0) x yval
        (paths_rect nat x
           (λ (n0 : nat) 
            (_ : x = n0),
            match x with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb n0 m
            end = true) (isreflnatleh x) 
           (x + 0) (! natplusr0 x)) less_n))
  (λ geq_n : match x with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb yval m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (yval - x + x)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (yval - x + x) (x + (yval - x))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (x + 0) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (yval - x) 0 x
           (nat_split ybd geq_n))
        (natpluscomm (yval - x) x)))
  (natlthorgeh yval x)
 
x, yval: nat
ybd: yval < x + 0
yval < x
 
x, yval: nat
ybd: yval < x
yval < x
 exact ybd. 
x, yval: nat
ybd: yval < x + 0
j: yval < x
yval,, ybd =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb x yval = true)
         ⨿ (match x with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb yval m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb x yval = true,
   ordconstr yval
     (natgehgthtrans (x + 0) x yval
        (paths_rect nat x
           (λ (n0 : nat) 
            (_ : x = n0),
            match x with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb n0 m
            end = true) (isreflnatleh x) 
           (x + 0) (! natplusr0 x)) less_n))
  (λ geq_n : match x with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb yval m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (yval - x + x)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (yval - x + x) (x + (yval - x))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (x + 0) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (yval - x) 0 x
           (nat_split ybd geq_n))
        (natpluscomm (yval - x) x)))
  (natlthorgeh yval x)

    
x, yval: nat
ybd: yval < x + 0
j: yval < x
yval,, ybd =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb x yval = true)
         ⨿ (match x with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb yval m
            end = true), 
   (⟦ x + 0 ⟧)%stn)
  (λ less_n : natgtb x yval = true,
   ordconstr yval
     (natgehgthtrans (x + 0) x yval
        (paths_rect nat x
           (λ (n0 : nat) 
            (_ : x = n0),
            match x with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb n0 m
            end = true) (isreflnatleh x) 
           (x + 0) (! natplusr0 x)) less_n))
  (λ geq_n : match x with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb yval m
             end = true,
   ordconstr (yval - x + x)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (yval - x + x) (x + (yval - x))
        (λ n : nat, natgtb (x + 0) n = true)
        (natlthandplusl (yval - x) 0 x
           (nat_split ybd geq_n))
        (natpluscomm (yval - x) x))) 
  (inl j)
 
x, yval: nat
ybd: yval < x + 0
j: yval < x
yval,, ybd =
ordconstr yval
  (natgehgthtrans (x + 0) x yval
     (paths_rect nat x
        (λ (n0 : nat) (_ : x = n0),
         match x with
         | 0 => true
         | S m => natgtb n0 m
         end = true) (isreflnatleh x) 
        (x + 0) (! natplusr0 x)) j)

    
x, yval: nat
ybd, j: yval < x
yval,, ybd =
ordconstr yval
  (natgehgthtrans x x yval
     (paths_rect nat x
        (λ (n0 : nat) (_ : x = n0),
         match x with
         | 0 => true
         | S m => natgtb n0 m
         end = true) (isreflnatleh x) x 
        (idpath x)) j)
 
x, yval: nat
ybd, j: yval < x
yval,, ybd =
ordconstr yval
  (natgehgthtrans x x yval (isreflnatleh x) j)
 
x, yval: nat
ybd, j: yval < x
pr1 (yval,, ybd) =
pr1
  (ordconstr yval
     (natgehgthtrans x x yval (isreflnatleh x) j))
 reflexivity.
Qed.


lax_monoidal_functor AugmentedSimplexCategory FinCard


lax_monoidal_functor AugmentedSimplexCategory FinCard

  
AugmentedSimplexCategory ⟶ FinCard
pr1 FinCard ⟦ MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_D FinCard,
?F
  (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C
     AugmentedSimplexCategory) ⟧
monoidal_functor_map AugmentedSimplexCategory FinCard
  ?F
monoidal_functor_associativity
  AugmentedSimplexCategory FinCard ?F ?μ
monoidal_functor_unitality AugmentedSimplexCategory
  FinCard ?F ?ϵ ?μ

  
AugmentedSimplexCategory ⟶ FinCard
 exact U.
  
pr1 FinCard ⟦ MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_D FinCard,
U
  (MonoidalFunctorsTensored.I_C
     AugmentedSimplexCategory) ⟧
 exact U_ε.
  
monoidal_functor_map AugmentedSimplexCategory FinCard
  U
 exact U_μ.
  
monoidal_functor_associativity
  AugmentedSimplexCategory FinCard U U_μ
 exact U_α.
  
monoidal_functor_unitality AugmentedSimplexCategory
  FinCard U U_ε U_μ
 exact U_unitality.
Defined.


strong_monoidal_functor AugmentedSimplexCategory
  FinCard


strong_monoidal_functor AugmentedSimplexCategory
  FinCard

  
is_z_isomorphism (lax_monoidal_functor_ϵ U_Mon_Lax)
× is_nat_z_iso (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U_Mon_Lax)
 
is_z_isomorphism (lax_monoidal_functor_ϵ U_Mon_Lax)
is_nat_z_iso (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U_Mon_Lax)

  
is_z_isomorphism (lax_monoidal_functor_ϵ U_Mon_Lax)
 
is_z_isomorphism U_ε
 
∑ g : precat_fincard_data ⟦ 0, 0 ⟧,
is_inverse_in_precat U_ε g
 
precat_fincard_data ⟦ 0, 0 ⟧
(λ g : precat_fincard_data ⟦ 0, 0 ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat U_ε g) ?pr1

    
precat_fincard_data ⟦ 0, 0 ⟧
 
(⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn
 exact (idfun (⟦ tensor_unit ⟧)%stn).
    
(λ g : precat_fincard_data ⟦ 0, 0 ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat U_ε g)
  (idfun (⟦ tensor_unit ⟧)%stn
   :
   precat_fincard_data ⟦ 0, 0 ⟧)
 abstract(simpl; unfold is_inverse_in_precat; split;
        unfold U_ε; exact (id_right (C:=Δ_sdg) (idfun _));
        unfold U_ε; exact (id_right (C:=Δ_sdg) (idfun _))).
  
is_nat_z_iso (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U_Mon_Lax)
 
∏
c : category_binproduct AugmentedSimplexCategory
      AugmentedSimplexCategory,
is_z_isomorphism (lax_monoidal_functor_μ U_Mon_Lax c)
 
∏ c : nat × nat,
is_z_isomorphism (idfun (⟦ pr1 c + pr2 c ⟧)%stn)
 
c: nat × nat
is_z_isomorphism (idfun (⟦ pr1 c + pr2 c ⟧)%stn)
 
n, m: nat
is_z_isomorphism (idfun (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn)

    
n, m: nat
∑
g : precat_fincard_data ⟦ n + m,
    pr1 (n,, m) + pr2 (n,, m) ⟧,
is_inverse_in_precat (idfun (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn) g
 
n, m: nat
∑ g : (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn,
is_inverse_in_precat (idfun (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn) g
 
n, m: nat
is_inverse_in_precat (idfun (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn)
  (idfun (⟦ n + m ⟧)%stn)

    abstract(unfold is_inverse_in_precat; split;
      exact (id_right (C:=Δ_sdg) (idfun _));
      exact (id_right (C:=Δ_sdg) (idfun _))).
Defined.


C, D: precategory
F, G: C ⟶ D
p: F = G
c: C
d: D
f: D ⟦ d, G c ⟧
internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟶ D) F G
  (λ H : C ⟶ D, D ⟦ d, H c ⟧) f p =
internal_paths_rew_r D (F c) (G c)
  (λ d' : D, D ⟦ d, d' ⟧) f
  (maponpaths (λ H : C ⟶ D, H c) p)


C, D: precategory
F, G: C ⟶ D
p: F = G
c: C
d: D
f: D ⟦ d, G c ⟧
internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟶ D) F G
  (λ H : C ⟶ D, D ⟦ d, H c ⟧) f p =
internal_paths_rew_r D (F c) (G c)
  (λ d' : D, D ⟦ d, d' ⟧) f
  (maponpaths (λ H : C ⟶ D, H c) p)

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
c: C
d: D
f: D ⟦ d, F c ⟧
internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟶ D) F F
  (λ H : C ⟶ D, D ⟦ d, H c ⟧) f (idpath F) =
internal_paths_rew_r D (F c) (F c)
  (λ d' : D, D ⟦ d, d' ⟧) f
  (maponpaths (λ H : C ⟶ D, H c) (idpath F))
 reflexivity.
Defined.

  (I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
     (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard))
  (functor_identity (pr1 FinCard))

  (functor_identity (pr1 FinCard) c)

  (monoidal_cat_left_unitor FinCard c)

     eq_λ) =

c: pr1 FinCard
j:= maponpaths (λ H : pr1 FinCard ⟶ pr1 FinCard, H c)

  (I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)

       (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c, d' ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_left_unitor FinCard c) j =
id I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
     (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c
 
eq_λ: I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
   H c) eq_λ: functor_fix_fst_arg_ob precat_fincard
  precat_fincard precat_fincard
  (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c = c
internal_paths_rew_r (pr1 FinCard)
  (I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
     (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c)
  (functor_identity (pr1 FinCard) c)
  (λ d' : pr1 FinCard,
   pr1 FinCard
   ⟦ I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
       (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c, d' ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_left_unitor FinCard c) j =
id I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
     (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c
 
eq_λ: I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: nat
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
   H c) eq_λ: functor_fix_fst_arg_ob precat_fincard
  precat_fincard precat_fincard
  (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c = c
internal_paths_rew_r (pr1 FinCard)
  (I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
     (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c)
  (functor_identity (pr1 FinCard) c)
  (λ d' : pr1 FinCard,
   pr1 FinCard
   ⟦ I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
       (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c, d' ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_left_unitor FinCard c) j =
id I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
     (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c

  
eq_λ: I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: nat
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
   H c) eq_λ: functor_fix_fst_arg_ob precat_fincard
  precat_fincard precat_fincard
  (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c = c
RW: j = idpath c
internal_paths_rew_r (pr1 FinCard)
  (I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
     (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c)
  (functor_identity (pr1 FinCard) c)
  (λ d' : pr1 FinCard,
   pr1 FinCard
   ⟦ I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
       (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c, d' ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_left_unitor FinCard c) 
  (idpath c) =
id I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
     (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c

  reflexivity.
Qed.

c + 0 = c
 exact (natplusr0 c).
Defined.

  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =

c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
internal_paths_rew_r (Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg)
  (I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
     (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard))
  (functor_identity Δ_sdg)
  (λ G : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg,
   Δ_sdg
   ⟦ I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
       (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c, 
   G c ⟧) (monoidal_cat_right_unitor FinCard c) eq_ρ =
id I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
     (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c

  
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
internal_paths_rew_r (Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg) Rtensor0
  (functor_identity Δ_sdg)
  (λ G : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, Δ_sdg ⟦ Rtensor0 c, G c ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_right_unitor FinCard c) eq_ρ =
id Rtensor0 c

  
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
idfunctor:= functor_identity Δ_sdg: Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
internal_paths_rew_r (Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg) Rtensor0
  idfunctor
  (λ G : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, Δ_sdg ⟦ Rtensor0 c, G c ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_right_unitor FinCard c) eq_ρ =
id Rtensor0 c

  
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
idfunctor:= functor_identity Δ_sdg: Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
internal_paths_rew_r Δ_sdg 
  (Rtensor0 c) (idfunctor c)
  (λ d' : Δ_sdg, Δ_sdg ⟦ Rtensor0 c, d' ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_right_unitor FinCard c)
  (maponpaths (λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) eq_ρ) =
id Rtensor0 c
 
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
idfunctor:= functor_identity Δ_sdg: Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
j:= maponpaths (λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) eq_ρ: (λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) Rtensor0 =
(λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) idfunctor
internal_paths_rew_r Δ_sdg 
  (Rtensor0 c) (idfunctor c)
  (λ d' : Δ_sdg, Δ_sdg ⟦ Rtensor0 c, d' ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_right_unitor FinCard c) j =
id Rtensor0 c

  
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
idfunctor:= functor_identity Δ_sdg: Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
j:= maponpaths (λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
internal_paths_rew_r Δ_sdg 
  (Rtensor0 c) (idfunctor c)
  (λ d' : Δ_sdg, Δ_sdg ⟦ Rtensor0 c, d' ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_right_unitor FinCard c) j =
id Rtensor0 c

  
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
idfunctor:= functor_identity Δ_sdg: Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
j:= maponpaths (λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
internal_paths_rew_r Δ_sdg 
  (Rtensor0 c) (idfunctor c)
  (λ d' : Δ_sdg, Δ_sdg ⟦ Rtensor0 c, d' ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_right_unitor FinCard c)
  (right_unitor_id c) = id 
Rtensor0 c

  
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
idfunctor:= functor_identity Δ_sdg: Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
j:= maponpaths (λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
internal_paths_rew_r Δ_sdg 
  (Rtensor0 c) (idfunctor c)
  (λ d' : Δ_sdg, Δ_sdg ⟦ Rtensor0 c, d' ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_right_unitor FinCard c) 
  (natplusr0 c) = id Rtensor0 c
 
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
idfunctor:= functor_identity Δ_sdg: Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
j:= maponpaths (λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
∏ x : (⟦ Rtensor0 c ⟧)%stn,
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r Δ_sdg 
     (Rtensor0 c) (idfunctor c)
     (λ d' : Δ_sdg, Δ_sdg ⟦ Rtensor0 c, d' ⟧)
     (monoidal_cat_right_unitor FinCard c)
     (natplusr0 c) x) = pr1 ((id Rtensor0 c) x)

  
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
idfunctor:= functor_identity Δ_sdg: Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
j:= maponpaths (λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
x: (⟦ Rtensor0 c ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r Δ_sdg 
     (Rtensor0 c) (idfunctor c)
     (λ d' : Δ_sdg, Δ_sdg ⟦ Rtensor0 c, d' ⟧)
     (monoidal_cat_right_unitor FinCard c)
     (natplusr0 c) x) = pr1 ((id Rtensor0 c) x)
 
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
idfunctor:= functor_identity Δ_sdg: Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
j:= maponpaths (λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
x: (⟦ I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
     (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) c ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r Δ_sdg 
     (Rtensor0 c) (idfunctor c)
     (λ d' : Δ_sdg, Δ_sdg ⟦ Rtensor0 c, d' ⟧)
     (monoidal_cat_right_unitor FinCard c)
     (natplusr0 c) x) = pr1 ((id Rtensor0 c) x)
 
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
idfunctor:= functor_identity Δ_sdg: Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
j:= maponpaths (λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
x: (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r Δ_sdg 
     (Rtensor0 c) (idfunctor c)
     (λ d' : Δ_sdg, Δ_sdg ⟦ Rtensor0 c, d' ⟧)
     (monoidal_cat_right_unitor FinCard c)
     (natplusr0 c) x) = pr1 ((id Rtensor0 c) x)

  
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
idfunctor:= functor_identity Δ_sdg: Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
j:= maponpaths (λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
x: (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (c + 0) c
     (λ d' : nat, (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ d' ⟧)%stn)
     (tensor_right_unitor_card_nt_data c)
     (natplusr0 c) x) = pr1 ((id (c + 0)) x)
 
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
idfunctor:= functor_identity Δ_sdg: Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
j:= maponpaths (λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
x: (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (c + 0) c
     (λ d' : nat, (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ d' ⟧)%stn)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (c + 0) c
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ c ⟧)%stn) 
        (natplusr0 c)) (natplusr0 c) x) =
pr1 ((id (c + 0)) x)
 
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
idfunctor:= functor_identity Δ_sdg: Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
j:= maponpaths (λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
x: (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (c + 0) c
     (λ d' : nat, (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ d' ⟧)%stn)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (c + 0) c
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ c ⟧)%stn) 
        (natplusr0 c)) (natplusr0 c) x) =
pr1 ((id (c + 0)) x)

  
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
idfunctor:= functor_identity Δ_sdg: Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
j:= maponpaths (λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
x: (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn
pr1
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (c + 0) (c + 0)
     (λ d' : nat, (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ d' ⟧)%stn)
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (c + 0) (c + 0)
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn) 
        (idpath (c + 0))) 
     (idpath (c + 0)) x) = 
pr1 ((id (c + 0)) x)
 
eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =
functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
c: pr1 FinCard
Δ_sdg:= pr1 FinCard: category
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard): Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
idfunctor:= functor_identity Δ_sdg: Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg
j:= maponpaths (λ H : Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg, H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
x: (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn
pr1 x = pr1 ((id (c + 0)) x)
 reflexivity.
Qed.


∏
eq_α : assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
       assoc_right tensor_functor_card,
is_nat_z_iso_id eq_α (monoidal_cat_associator FinCard)


∏
eq_α : assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
       assoc_right tensor_functor_card,
is_nat_z_iso_id eq_α (monoidal_cat_associator FinCard)

  
∏
(eq_α : assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
        assoc_right tensor_functor_card)
(c : category_binproduct
       (category_binproduct Δ_sdg Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg),
nat_comp_to_endo eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator FinCard c) =
id assoc_left tensor_functor_card c
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
∏
c : category_binproduct
      (category_binproduct Δ_sdg Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg,
nat_comp_to_endo eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator FinCard c) =
id assoc_left tensor_functor_card c

  
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
c: category_binproduct
  (category_binproduct Δ_sdg Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg
nat_comp_to_endo eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator FinCard c) =
id assoc_left tensor_functor_card c
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
c: (nat × nat) × nat
nat_comp_to_endo eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator FinCard c) =
id assoc_left tensor_functor_card c
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
nm: nat × nat
k: nat
nat_comp_to_endo eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator FinCard (nm,, k)) =
id assoc_left tensor_functor_card (nm,, k)
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
n, m, k: nat
nat_comp_to_endo eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator FinCard ((n,, m),, k)) =
id assoc_left tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k)

  
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
n, m, k: nat
internal_paths_rew_r
  (category_binproduct
     (category_binproduct Δ_sdg Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg ⟶ Δ_sdg)
  (assoc_left tensor_functor_card)
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_card)
  (λ G : category_binproduct
           (category_binproduct Δ_sdg Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg
         ⟶ Δ_sdg,
   Δ_sdg
   ⟦ assoc_left tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k),
   G ((n,, m),, k) ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_associator FinCard ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α =
id assoc_left tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k)
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
n, m, k: nat
internal_paths_rew_r Δ_sdg
  (assoc_left tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k))
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k))
  (λ d' : Δ_sdg,
   Δ_sdg
   ⟦ assoc_left tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k), d'
   ⟧) (monoidal_cat_associator FinCard ((n,, m),, k))
  (maponpaths
     (λ H : category_binproduct
              (category_binproduct Δ_sdg Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg
            ⟶ Δ_sdg, H ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α) =
id assoc_left tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k)

  
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
n, m, k: nat
internal_paths_rew_r Δ_sdg
  ((pair_functor tensor_functor_card
      (functor_identity Δ_sdg) ∙ tensor_functor_card)
     ((n,, m),, k))
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_card ((n,, m),, k))
  (λ d' : Δ_sdg,
   Δ_sdg
   ⟦ (pair_functor tensor_functor_card
        (functor_identity Δ_sdg) ∙ tensor_functor_card)
       ((n,, m),, k), d' ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_associator FinCard ((n,, m),, k))
  (maponpaths
     (λ H : category_binproduct
              (category_binproduct Δ_sdg Δ_sdg) Δ_sdg
            ⟶ Δ_sdg, H ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α) =
id (pair_functor tensor_functor_card
      (functor_identity Δ_sdg) ∙ tensor_functor_card)
     ((n,, m),, k)
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
n, m, k: nat
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ d' : nat, (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ d' ⟧)%stn)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
     (natplusassoc n m k))
  (maponpaths
     (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
              (precategory_binproduct_data
                 precat_fincard_data
                 precat_fincard_data)
              precat_fincard_data
            ⟶ precat_fincard_data, 
      H ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α) = id 
(n + m + k)

  
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
n, m, k: nat
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data
              precat_fincard_data
              precat_fincard_data)
           precat_fincard_data
         ⟶ precat_fincard_data, 
   H ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α: (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_fincard_data
            precat_fincard_data)
         precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (pair_functor tensor_functor_card
     (functor_identity precat_fincard_data)
   ∙ tensor_functor_card) =
(λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_fincard_data
            precat_fincard_data)
         precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_card)
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ d' : nat, (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ d' ⟧)%stn)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
     (natplusassoc n m k)) j = id 
(n + m + k)

  
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
n, m, k: nat
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data
              precat_fincard_data
              precat_fincard_data)
           precat_fincard_data
         ⟶ precat_fincard_data, 
   H ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α: (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_fincard_data
            precat_fincard_data)
         precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (pair_functor tensor_functor_card
     (functor_identity precat_fincard_data)
   ∙ tensor_functor_card) =
(λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_fincard_data
            precat_fincard_data)
         precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_card)
RW: j = natplusassoc n m k
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ d' : nat, (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ d' ⟧)%stn)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
     (natplusassoc n m k)) j = id 
(n + m + k)
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
n, m, k: nat
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data
              precat_fincard_data
              precat_fincard_data)
           precat_fincard_data
         ⟶ precat_fincard_data, 
   H ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α: (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_fincard_data
            precat_fincard_data)
         precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (pair_functor tensor_functor_card
     (functor_identity precat_fincard_data)
   ∙ tensor_functor_card) =
(λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_fincard_data
            precat_fincard_data)
         precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_card)
RW: j = natplusassoc n m k
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ d' : nat, (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ d' ⟧)%stn)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
     (natplusassoc n m k)) 
  (natplusassoc n m k) = id 
(n + m + k)

  
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
n, m, k: nat
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data
              precat_fincard_data
              precat_fincard_data)
           precat_fincard_data
         ⟶ precat_fincard_data, 
   H ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α: (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_fincard_data
            precat_fincard_data)
         precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (pair_functor tensor_functor_card
     (functor_identity precat_fincard_data)
   ∙ tensor_functor_card) =
(λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_fincard_data
            precat_fincard_data)
         precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_card)
RW: j = natplusassoc n m k
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ d' : nat, (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ d' ⟧)%stn)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
     (natplusassoc n m k)) 
  (natplusassoc n m k) = id 
(n + m + k)
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
n, m, k: nat
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data
              precat_fincard_data
              precat_fincard_data)
           precat_fincard_data
         ⟶ precat_fincard_data, 
   H ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α: (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_fincard_data
            precat_fincard_data)
         precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (pair_functor tensor_functor_card
     (functor_identity precat_fincard_data)
   ∙ tensor_functor_card) =
(λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_fincard_data
            precat_fincard_data)
         precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_card)
RW: j = natplusassoc n m k
∏ p : n + m + k = n + (m + k),
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ d' : nat, (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ d' ⟧)%stn)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n + (m + k) ⟧)%stn) p) p =
id (n + m + k)
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
n, m, k: nat
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data
              precat_fincard_data
              precat_fincard_data)
           precat_fincard_data
         ⟶ precat_fincard_data, 
   H ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α: (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_fincard_data
            precat_fincard_data)
         precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (pair_functor tensor_functor_card
     (functor_identity precat_fincard_data)
   ∙ tensor_functor_card) =
(λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_fincard_data
            precat_fincard_data)
         precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_card)
RW: j = natplusassoc n m k
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + m + k)
  (λ d' : nat, (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn → (⟦ d' ⟧)%stn)
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n + m + k) (n + m + k)
     (λ n0 : nat, (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn → (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn)
     (idfun (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn) 
     (idpath (n + m + k))) 
  (idpath (n + m + k)) = id 
(n + m + k)
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_card =
assoc_right tensor_functor_card
n, m, k: nat
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data
              precat_fincard_data
              precat_fincard_data)
           precat_fincard_data
         ⟶ precat_fincard_data, 
   H ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α: (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_fincard_data
            precat_fincard_data)
         precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (pair_functor tensor_functor_card
     (functor_identity precat_fincard_data)
   ∙ tensor_functor_card) =
(λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_fincard_data
            precat_fincard_data)
         precat_fincard_data ⟶ precat_fincard_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_card)
RW: j = natplusassoc n m k
idfun (⟦ n + m + k ⟧)%stn = id (n + m + k)
 reflexivity.
Qed.


strict_monoidal_cat


strict_monoidal_cat

  
monoidal_cat
(λ M : monoidal_cat,
 ∏
 (eq_λ : I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor M)
           (monoidal_cat_unit M) =
         functor_identity (pr1 M))
 (eq_ρ : I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor M)
           (monoidal_cat_unit M) =
         functor_identity (pr1 M))
 (eq_α : assoc_left (monoidal_cat_tensor M) =
         assoc_right (monoidal_cat_tensor M)),
 is_strict (monoidal_cat_tensor M)
   (monoidal_cat_unit M) eq_λ
   (monoidal_cat_left_unitor M) eq_ρ
   (monoidal_cat_right_unitor M) eq_α
   (monoidal_cat_associator M)) ?pr1
  
monoidal_cat
 exact FinCard. 
(λ M : monoidal_cat,
 ∏
 (eq_λ : I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor M)
           (monoidal_cat_unit M) =
         functor_identity (pr1 M))

           (monoidal_cat_unit M) =
         functor_identity (pr1 M))
 (eq_α : assoc_left (monoidal_cat_tensor M) =
         assoc_right (monoidal_cat_tensor M)),
 is_strict (monoidal_cat_tensor M)
   (monoidal_cat_unit M) eq_λ
   (monoidal_cat_left_unitor M) eq_ρ
   (monoidal_cat_right_unitor M) eq_α
   (monoidal_cat_associator M)) FinCard

is_nat_z_iso_id eq_λ
  (monoidal_cat_left_unitor FinCard)

(λ _ : is_nat_z_iso_id eq_λ
         (monoidal_cat_left_unitor FinCard),
 is_nat_z_iso_id eq_ρ
   (monoidal_cat_right_unitor FinCard)
 × is_nat_z_iso_id eq_α
     (monoidal_cat_associator FinCard)) 
  ?pr1

  (monoidal_cat_unit FinCard) =

  (monoidal_cat_left_unitor FinCard)
 exact (tensor_card_is_strict_left_iso_id eq_λ).

 × is_nat_z_iso_id eq_α
     (monoidal_cat_associator FinCard))
  (tensor_card_is_strict_left_iso_id eq_λ)

is_nat_z_iso_id eq_ρ

eq_λ: I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)

eq_ρ: I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)

functor_identity (pr1 FinCard)
eq_α: assoc_left (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard) =
assoc_right (monoidal_cat_tensor FinCard)
is_nat_z_iso_id eq_α (monoidal_cat_associator FinCard)

  exact (tensor_card_is_strict_associator_id eq_α).
Defined.

j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : precat_Delta_precategory_data
         ⟶ precat_Delta_precategory_data, 
   H c) eq_λ: c = c
RW: j = idpath c
internal_paths_rew_r nat c c
  (λ d' : nat, monfunstn c d') 
  (id c) (idpath c) = id c

  reflexivity.
Qed.


∏
eq_ρ : I_posttensor
         (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
         (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
       functor_identity (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory),
is_nat_z_iso_id eq_ρ
  (monoidal_cat_right_unitor AugmentedSimplexCategory)

  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =

c: pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory

  (monoidal_cat_tensor
     AugmentedSimplexCategory)

     AugmentedSimplexCategory): pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory

  (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory): pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory

         ⟶ pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory, 
   H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
internal_paths_rew_r (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (Rtensor0 c) (idfunctor c)
  (λ d' : pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory,
   pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory ⟦ Rtensor0 c, d' ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_right_unitor AugmentedSimplexCategory
     c) (right_unitor_id c) = id 
Rtensor0 c

  
eq_ρ: I_posttensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
functor_identity (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory)
c: pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor
     AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit
     AugmentedSimplexCategory): pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
⟶ pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
idfunctor:= functor_identity
  (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory): pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
⟶ pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
         ⟶ pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory, 
   H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (c + 0) c (λ d' : nat, monfunstn (c + 0) d')
  (make_monfunstn
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (c + 0) c
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ c ⟧)%stn) 
        (natplusr0 c))
     (λ (x y : (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn)
      (leq : match stntonat (c + 0) x with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb y m
             end = true),
      paths_rect nat (c + 0)
        (λ (a : nat) (p0 : c + 0 = a),
         match
           stntonat a
             (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                (c + 0) a
                (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) p0 x)
         with
         | 0 => true
         | S m =>
             natgtb
               (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                  (c + 0) a
                  (λ n : nat,
                   (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                  (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) p0 y) m
         end = true) leq c 
        (natplusr0 c))) (right_unitor_id c) =
id (c + 0)
 
eq_ρ: I_posttensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
functor_identity (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory)
c: pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor
     AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit
     AugmentedSimplexCategory): pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
⟶ pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
idfunctor:= functor_identity
  (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory): pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
⟶ pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
         ⟶ pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory, 
   H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (c + 0) c (λ d' : nat, monfunstn (c + 0) d')
  (make_monfunstn
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (c + 0) c
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ c ⟧)%stn) 
        (natplusr0 c))
     (λ (x y : (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn)
      (leq : match stntonat (c + 0) x with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb y m
             end = true),
      paths_rect nat (c + 0)
        (λ (a : nat) (p0 : c + 0 = a),
         match
           stntonat a
             (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                (c + 0) a
                (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) p0 x)
         with
         | 0 => true
         | S m =>
             natgtb
               (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                  (c + 0) a
                  (λ n : nat,
                   (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                  (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) p0 y) m
         end = true) leq c 
        (natplusr0 c))) (natplusr0 c) = id 
(c + 0)
 
eq_ρ: I_posttensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
functor_identity (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory)
c: pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor
     AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit
     AugmentedSimplexCategory): pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
⟶ pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
idfunctor:= functor_identity
  (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory): pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
⟶ pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
         ⟶ pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory, 
   H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (c + 0) (c + 0) (λ d' : nat, monfunstn (c + 0) d')
  (make_monfunstn
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (c + 0) (c + 0)
        (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn)
        (idfun (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn) 
        (idpath (c + 0)))
     (λ (x y : (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn)
      (leq : match stntonat (c + 0) x with
             | 0 => true
             | S m => natgtb y m
             end = true),
      paths_rect nat (c + 0)
        (λ (a : nat) (p0 : c + 0 = a),
         match
           stntonat a
             (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                (c + 0) a
                (λ n : nat, (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) p0 x)
         with
         | 0 => true
         | S m =>
             natgtb
               (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
                  (c + 0) a
                  (λ n : nat,
                   (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → (⟦ a ⟧)%stn)
                  (idfun (⟦ a ⟧)%stn) p0 y) m
         end = true) leq 
        (c + 0) (idpath (c + 0)))) 
  (idpath (c + 0)) = id (c + 0)
 
eq_ρ: I_posttensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
functor_identity (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory)
c: pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
Rtensor0:= I_posttensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor
     AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit
     AugmentedSimplexCategory): pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
⟶ pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
idfunctor:= functor_identity
  (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory): pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
⟶ pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory
         ⟶ pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory, 
   H c) eq_ρ: Rtensor0 c = idfunctor c
RW: j = right_unitor_id c
make_monfunstn (idfun (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn)
  (λ (x y : (⟦ c + 0 ⟧)%stn)
   (leq : match stntonat (c + 0) x with
          | 0 => true
          | S m => natgtb y m
          end = true), leq) = id 
(c + 0)
 reflexivity.
Qed.


∏
eq_α : assoc_left tensor_functor_ord =
       assoc_right tensor_functor_ord,
is_nat_z_iso_id eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory)


∏
eq_α : assoc_left tensor_functor_ord =
       assoc_right tensor_functor_ord,
is_nat_z_iso_id eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory)

  
∏
(eq_α : assoc_left tensor_functor_ord =
        assoc_right tensor_functor_ord)
(c : category_binproduct
       (category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd) Δ_sd),
nat_comp_to_endo eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory c) =
id assoc_left tensor_functor_ord c
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_ord =
assoc_right tensor_functor_ord
∏
c : category_binproduct
      (category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd) Δ_sd,
nat_comp_to_endo eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory c) =
id assoc_left tensor_functor_ord c

  
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_ord =
assoc_right tensor_functor_ord
c: category_binproduct
  (category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd) Δ_sd
nat_comp_to_endo eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory c) =
id assoc_left tensor_functor_ord c
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_ord =
assoc_right tensor_functor_ord
c: (nat × nat) × nat
nat_comp_to_endo eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory c) =
id assoc_left tensor_functor_ord c
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_ord =
assoc_right tensor_functor_ord
n, m, k: nat
nat_comp_to_endo eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory
     ((n,, m),, k)) =
id assoc_left tensor_functor_ord ((n,, m),, k)

  
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_ord =
assoc_right tensor_functor_ord
n, m, k: nat
internal_paths_rew_r
  (category_binproduct (category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd)
     Δ_sd ⟶ Δ_sd) (assoc_left tensor_functor_ord)
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_ord)
  (λ G : category_binproduct
           (category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd) Δ_sd ⟶ Δ_sd,
   Δ_sd ⟦ assoc_left tensor_functor_ord ((n,, m),, k),
   G ((n,, m),, k) ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory
     ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α =
id assoc_left tensor_functor_ord ((n,, m),, k)
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_ord =
assoc_right tensor_functor_ord
n, m, k: nat
internal_paths_rew_r Δ_sd
  (assoc_left tensor_functor_ord ((n,, m),, k))
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_ord ((n,, m),, k))
  (λ d' : Δ_sd,
   Δ_sd ⟦ assoc_left tensor_functor_ord ((n,, m),, k),
   d' ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory
     ((n,, m),, k))
  (maponpaths
     (λ H : category_binproduct
              (category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd) Δ_sd
            ⟶ Δ_sd, H ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α) =
id assoc_left tensor_functor_ord ((n,, m),, k)

  
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_ord =
assoc_right tensor_functor_ord
n, m, k: nat
internal_paths_rew_r Δ_sd
  ((pair_functor tensor_functor_ord
      (functor_identity Δ_sd) ∙ tensor_functor_ord)
     ((n,, m),, k))
  (assoc_right tensor_functor_ord ((n,, m),, k))
  (λ d' : Δ_sd,
   Δ_sd
   ⟦ (pair_functor tensor_functor_ord
        (functor_identity Δ_sd) ∙ tensor_functor_ord)
       ((n,, m),, k), d' ⟧)
  (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory
     ((n,, m),, k))
  (maponpaths
     (λ H : category_binproduct
              (category_binproduct Δ_sd Δ_sd) Δ_sd
            ⟶ Δ_sd, H ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α) =
id (pair_functor tensor_functor_ord
      (functor_identity Δ_sd) ∙ tensor_functor_ord)
     ((n,, m),, k)
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_ord =
assoc_right tensor_functor_ord
n, m, k: nat
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ d' : nat, monfunstn (n + m + k) d')
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
     (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
     (natplusassoc n m k))
  (maponpaths
     (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
              (precategory_binproduct_data
                 precat_Delta_precategory_data
                 precat_Delta_precategory_data)
              precat_Delta_precategory_data
            ⟶ precat_Delta_precategory_data,
      H ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α) = id 
(n + m + k)

j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data

              precat_Delta_precategory_data)
           precat_Delta_precategory_data
         ⟶ precat_Delta_precategory_data,
   H ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α: (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_Delta_precategory_data
            precat_Delta_precategory_data)
         precat_Delta_precategory_data
       ⟶ precat_Delta_precategory_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (pair_functor tensor_functor_ord
     (functor_identity
        precat_Delta_precategory_data)
   ∙ tensor_functor_ord) =
(λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data

       ⟶ precat_Delta_precategory_data,

  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ d' : nat, monfunstn (n + m + k) d')
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
     (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) 
     (natplusassoc n m k)) j = id 
(n + m + k)

n, m, k: nat

     (monfunstnid (n + (m + k)))

  (natplusassoc n m k) = id 
(n + m + k)

assoc_right tensor_functor_ord
n, m, k: nat
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data
              precat_Delta_precategory_data

           precat_Delta_precategory_data
         ⟶ precat_Delta_precategory_data,

         precat_Delta_precategory_data
       ⟶ precat_Delta_precategory_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k)) (assoc_right tensor_functor_ord)
RW: j = natplusassoc n m k
∏ p : n + m + k = n + (m + k),
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
  (λ d' : nat, monfunstn (n + m + k) d')
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n + m + k) (n + (m + k))
     (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + (m + k)))
     (monfunstnid (n + (m + k))) p) p = id 
(n + m + k)
 
eq_α: assoc_left tensor_functor_ord =
assoc_right tensor_functor_ord
n, m, k: nat
j:= maponpaths
  (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data
              precat_Delta_precategory_data
              precat_Delta_precategory_data)
           precat_Delta_precategory_data
         ⟶ precat_Delta_precategory_data,
   H ((n,, m),, k)) eq_α: (λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_Delta_precategory_data
            precat_Delta_precategory_data)
         precat_Delta_precategory_data
       ⟶ precat_Delta_precategory_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k))
  (pair_functor tensor_functor_ord
     (functor_identity
        precat_Delta_precategory_data)
   ∙ tensor_functor_ord) =
(λ H : precategory_binproduct_data
         (precategory_binproduct_data
            precat_Delta_precategory_data
            precat_Delta_precategory_data)
         precat_Delta_precategory_data
       ⟶ precat_Delta_precategory_data,
 H ((n,, m),, k)) (assoc_right tensor_functor_ord)
RW: j = natplusassoc n m k
internal_paths_rew_r nat 
  (n + m + k) (n + m + k)
  (λ d' : nat, monfunstn (n + m + k) d')
  (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
     (n + m + k) (n + m + k)
     (λ n0 : nat, monfunstn n0 (n + m + k))
     (monfunstnid (n + m + k)) 
     (idpath (n + m + k))) 
  (idpath (n + m + k)) = id 
(n + m + k)
 reflexivity.
Qed.


strict_monoidal_cat


strict_monoidal_cat

  
monoidal_cat
(λ M : monoidal_cat,
 ∏
 (eq_λ : I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor M)
           (monoidal_cat_unit M) =
         functor_identity (pr1 M))
 (eq_ρ : I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor M)
           (monoidal_cat_unit M) =
         functor_identity (pr1 M))
 (eq_α : assoc_left (monoidal_cat_tensor M) =
         assoc_right (monoidal_cat_tensor M)),
 is_strict (monoidal_cat_tensor M)
   (monoidal_cat_unit M) eq_λ
   (monoidal_cat_left_unitor M) eq_ρ
   (monoidal_cat_right_unitor M) eq_α
   (monoidal_cat_associator M)) ?pr1
  
monoidal_cat
 exact AugmentedSimplexCategory. 
(λ M : monoidal_cat,
 ∏
 (eq_λ : I_pretensor (monoidal_cat_tensor M)
           (monoidal_cat_unit M) =
         functor_identity (pr1 M))
 (eq_ρ : I_posttensor (monoidal_cat_tensor M)
           (monoidal_cat_unit M) =
         functor_identity (pr1 M))
 (eq_α : assoc_left (monoidal_cat_tensor M) =
         assoc_right (monoidal_cat_tensor M)),
 is_strict (monoidal_cat_tensor M)
   (monoidal_cat_unit M) eq_λ
   (monoidal_cat_left_unitor M) eq_ρ
   (monoidal_cat_right_unitor M) eq_α
   (monoidal_cat_associator M))
  AugmentedSimplexCategory

  
∏
(eq_λ : I_pretensor
          (monoidal_cat_tensor
             AugmentedSimplexCategory)
          (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
        functor_identity
          (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory))
(eq_ρ : I_posttensor
          (monoidal_cat_tensor
             AugmentedSimplexCategory)
          (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
        functor_identity
          (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory))
(eq_α : assoc_left
          (monoidal_cat_tensor
             AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
        assoc_right
          (monoidal_cat_tensor
             AugmentedSimplexCategory)),
is_strict
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) eq_λ
  (monoidal_cat_left_unitor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  eq_ρ
  (monoidal_cat_right_unitor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory)
 
eq_λ: I_pretensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
functor_identity (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory)
eq_ρ: I_posttensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
functor_identity (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory)
eq_α: assoc_left
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
assoc_right
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
is_strict
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) eq_λ
  (monoidal_cat_left_unitor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  eq_ρ
  (monoidal_cat_right_unitor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory)

  
eq_λ: I_pretensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
functor_identity (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory)
eq_ρ: I_posttensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
functor_identity (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory)
eq_α: assoc_left
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
assoc_right
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
is_nat_z_iso_id eq_λ
  (monoidal_cat_left_unitor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
eq_λ: I_pretensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
functor_identity (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory)
eq_ρ: I_posttensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
functor_identity (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory)
eq_α: assoc_left
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
assoc_right
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
(λ _ : is_nat_z_iso_id eq_λ
         (monoidal_cat_left_unitor
            AugmentedSimplexCategory),
 is_nat_z_iso_id eq_ρ
   (monoidal_cat_right_unitor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
 × is_nat_z_iso_id eq_α
     (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory))
  ?pr1
 
eq_λ: I_pretensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
functor_identity (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory)
eq_ρ: I_posttensor

is_nat_z_iso_id eq_λ
  (monoidal_cat_left_unitor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
 exact (tensor_Δ_left_unitor_is_id eq_λ).

  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =

         (monoidal_cat_left_unitor
            AugmentedSimplexCategory),
 is_nat_z_iso_id eq_ρ
   (monoidal_cat_right_unitor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
 × is_nat_z_iso_id eq_α
     (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory))
  (tensor_Δ_left_unitor_is_id eq_λ)

  
eq_λ: I_pretensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
functor_identity (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory)
eq_ρ: I_posttensor

  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
is_nat_z_iso_id eq_ρ
  (monoidal_cat_right_unitor AugmentedSimplexCategory)

  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =

eq_ρ: I_posttensor

is_nat_z_iso_id eq_ρ
  (monoidal_cat_right_unitor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
 exact (tensor_Δ_right_unitor_is_id eq_ρ). 
eq_λ: I_pretensor
  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
  (monoidal_cat_unit AugmentedSimplexCategory) =
functor_identity (pr1 AugmentedSimplexCategory)
eq_ρ: I_posttensor

  (monoidal_cat_tensor AugmentedSimplexCategory)
is_nat_z_iso_id eq_α
  (monoidal_cat_associator AugmentedSimplexCategory)

  exact (tensor_ord_is_strict_associator_id eq_α).
Defined.
